页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17150v1 公告类型：新 摘要：铌酸钾 (KNbO3) 是一种典型的钙钛矿铁电体，具有大的电光和非线性光学响应、高光学损伤阈值和丰富的温度驱动相变序列，使其成为可调谐光子器件的有前景的平台。在这项工作中，我们开发了 KNbO3 耦合铁电和光学特性的热力学模型。通过将总极化分为晶格和电子贡献，该模型提供了各向异性铁电和光学特性的统一描述。热力学系数是通过拟合自发极化、介电磁化率、晶格参数和折射率的实验测量来确定的。无需进一步拟合，该模型即可定量预测电光系数和压电系数的温度依赖性，与实验测量结果非常一致。通过利用电子偏振运动方程，该模型进一步捕获近红外到可见光谱中的光学色散。这项工作为未来研究 KNbO3 中铁电和光学耦合现象提供了热力学基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17150v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Potassium niobate (KNbO3) is a prototypical perovskite ferroelectric with large electro-optic and nonlinear optical responses, high optical damage thresholds and a rich sequence of temperature-driven phase transformations, making it a promising platform for tunable photonic devices. In this work, we develop a thermodynamic model for the coupled ferroelectric and optical properties of KNbO3. By separating the total polarization into lattice and electronic contributions, the model provides a unified description of both the anisotropic ferroelectric and optical properties. The thermodynamic coefficients are determined by fitting to experimental measurements of the spontaneous polarization, dielectric susceptibilities, lattice parameters, and refractive indices. Without any further fitting, the model quantitatively predicts the temperature dependence of the electro-optic and piezoelectric coefficients in close agreement with experimental measurements. By utilizing the electronic polarization equation of motion, the model further captures the optical dispersion in the near infrared to visible spectrum. This work provides the thermodynamic foundation for future studies of coupled ferroelectric and optical phenomena in KNbO3.

95

球形磁性纳米颗粒中涡旋成核和反转的最小模型#

Minimal model for vortex nucleation and reversal in spherical magnetic nanoparticles
📚 arXiv👤 Michael P. Adams, Andreas Michels📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作构建了球形磁性纳米颗粒涡旋态的半解析最小模型，以双曲函数参数化磁化Ansatz实现均匀态与涡旋态的连续插值，将复杂微磁问题简化为可解析处理的有效哈密顿量。核心创新在于突破了纯数值模拟的局限，首次
arXiv:2601.17176v1 发布类型：新 摘要：超出单域极限的磁性纳米粒子经常会因交换能和静磁能之间的竞争而产生涡旋状磁化纹理。虽然通常使用微磁模拟来研究这种状态，但对涡旋介导的磁滞和成核的透明分析描述仍然很少。在这里，我们开发了球形磁性纳米颗粒中涡旋态的半解析最小框架。在微磁模拟的指导下，我们引入了基于双曲函数的参数化涡旋磁化 Ansatz，该函数在均匀状态和涡旋状态之间连续插值。通过这种方式，我们实现了复杂性的降低，从而…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17176v1 发布类型：新 摘要：超出单域极限的磁性纳米粒子经常会因交换能和静磁能之间的竞争而产生涡旋状磁化纹理。虽然通常使用微磁模拟来研究这种状态，但对涡旋介导的磁滞和成核的透明分析描述仍然很少。在这里，我们开发了球形磁性纳米颗粒中涡旋态的半解析最小框架。在微磁模拟的指导下，我们引入了基于双曲函数的参数化涡旋磁化 Ansatz，该函数在均匀状态和涡旋状态之间连续插值。通过这种方式，我们实现了复杂性的降低，从而获得最小的哈密顿量，从而能够有效地计算磁化曲线，并提供对涡旋介导的磁化反转的深入了解。作为一种应用，我们得出了临界涡旋成核半径和场的分析估计，恢复了布朗经典结果的函数形式并将其扩展到变分框架内。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17176v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic nanoparticles beyond the single-domain limit often develop vortex-like magnetization textures arising from the competition between exchange and magnetostatic energies. While such states are routinely studied using micromagnetic simulations, transparent analytical descriptions of vortex-mediated hysteresis and nucleation remain scarce. Here, we develop a semi-analytical minimal framework for vortex states in spherical magnetic nanoparticles. Guided by micromagnetic simulations, we introduce a parametrized vortex magnetization Ansatz based on hyperbolic functions that continuously interpolates between uniform and vortex states. In this way, we achieve a complexity reduction leading to a minimal Hamiltonian, which enables the efficient computation of magnetization curves and provides insight into vortex-mediated magnetization reversal. As an application, we derive analytical estimates for the critical vortex nucleation radius and field, recovering the functional form of Brown's classic result and extending it within a variational framework.

96

由于铁电纳米团簇的接近而引起的压电薄膜的偏振切换#

Polarization Switching of Piezoelectric Films due to Proximity of Ferroelectric Nanoclusters
📚 arXiv👤 Anna N. Morozovska, Eugene A. Eliseev, Sergei V. Kalin, Long-Qing Chen, Dean R. Evans, Venkatraman Gopalan📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过热力学理论与有限元模拟揭示了铁电纳米团簇邻近效应可显著降低压电薄膜的矫顽场，使原本不可切换的AlN薄膜在远低于击穿场的条件下实现极化翻转。核心创新在于提出利用尖峰状Al₁₋ₓScₓN纳米团簇
arXiv:2601.17214v1 公告类型：新 摘要：利用 Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire 热力学方法和有限元建模，我们研究了纳米团簇形状对由于铁电纳米团簇的接近而在其他不可切换压电薄膜中出现的极化切换和域成核的影响。嵌入压电薄膜中的铁电纳米团簇的边界是成分梯度层。我们分析了由于铁电 Al1-xScxN 簇的接近而允许在显着低于电击穿场的矫顽场下切换压电 AlN 薄膜电极化的条件。由于邻近效应，在尖峰状 Al…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17214v1 公告类型：新 摘要：利用 Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire 热力学方法和有限元建模，我们研究了纳米团簇形状对由于铁电纳米团簇的接近而在其他不可切换压电薄膜中出现的极化切换和域成核的影响。嵌入压电薄膜中的铁电纳米团簇的边界是成分梯度层。我们分析了由于铁电 Al1-xScxN 簇的接近而允许在显着低于电击穿场的矫顽场下切换压电 AlN 薄膜电极化的条件。由于邻近效应，在尖峰状 Al1-xScxN 簇的存在下，纳米图案薄膜的所有元素中的自发极化切换以及相应的矫顽场可以显着降低。我们还探索了具有铁电纳米团簇的压电薄膜中邻近效应的潜在物理机制。内部场在压电薄膜内部去极化（由于 AlN 较大的自发极化）并在铁电团簇中极化（由于 Al1-xScxN 较小的自发极化），降低了团簇中的势垒，并促进纳米域（在团簇中出现）通过压电薄膜的即时生长。由于可以通过将 Sc 离子注入 AlN 薄膜来创建纳米结构材料，因此获得的理论结果可用于通过化学工程创建纳米图案铁电体，为以前无法实现的铁电存储技术带来令人兴奋的前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17214v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Using Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire thermodynamical approach and finite element modelling, we studied the influence of nanoclusters shape on the polarization switching and domain nucleation emerging in otherwise non-switchable piezoelectric films due to the proximity of ferroelectric nanoclusters. The boundary of the ferroelectric nanocluster embedded in the piezoelectric film is a compositionally graded layer. We analyzed the conditions, which allow switching the electric polarization of the piezoelectric AlN film at coercive field significantly lower than the electric breakdown field due to the proximity of ferroelectric Al1-xScxN clusters. Due to proximity effect, the spontaneous polarization switches in all elements of the nanopatterned film, and corresponding coercive fields can be reduced significantly in the presence of spike-like Al1-xScxN clusters. We also explored the underlaying physical mechanisms of the proximity effects in the piezoelectric films with ferroelectric nanoclusters. The internal field, which is depolarizing inside the piezoelectric film (due to the larger spontaneous polarization of AlN) and polarizing in the ferroelectric cluster (due to the smaller spontaneous polarization of Al1-xScxN), lowers the potential barrier in the clusters and facilitates the instant growth of nanodomains (emerging in the clusters) through the piezoelectric film. Since considered nanostructured materials can be created by implantation of Sc ions into AlN films, obtained theoretical results can be useful for creation of nanopatterned ferroelectrics by chemical engineering, with exciting prospects for previously unrealizable ferroelectric memory technologies.

97

交变磁力诱导的可调谐二维狄拉克-韦尔半金属相#

Tunable two-dimensional Dirac-Weyl semimetal phase induced by altermagnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Lizhou Liu, Qing-Feng Sun, Ying-Tao Zhang📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在二维体系中通过面内d波交变磁力实现了可调谐的狄拉克-韦尔半金属相，其核心创新在于利用磁轴旋转连续调控韦尔点位置及边缘态连通性，而面外交变磁则打开部分能隙并保留手性边缘模。这一工作为二维拓扑
arXiv:2601.17402v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们演示了二维可调谐狄拉克-韦尔半金属相，这是通过将面内 d 波交变磁力引入狄拉克系统来实现的。该相包含由费米线边缘态连接的中心狄拉克点和动量分离的韦尔点。韦尔点的位置——以及边缘态的连通性——可以通过旋转交变磁轴来连续调整。相比之下，面外交变磁性间隙了部分体光谱，同时保留了伴随手性边缘模式的单个狄拉克点，如量化边缘偏振所证明的那样。我们的研究结果为操纵二维的狄拉克-韦尔物理和…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17402v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们演示了二维可调谐狄拉克-韦尔半金属相，这是通过将面内 d 波交变磁力引入狄拉克系统来实现的。该相包含由费米线边缘态连接的中心狄拉克点和动量分离的韦尔点。韦尔点的位置——以及边缘态的连通性——可以通过旋转交变磁轴来连续调整。相比之下，面外交变磁性间隙了部分体光谱，同时保留了伴随手性边缘模式的单个狄拉克点，如量化边缘偏振所证明的那样。我们的研究结果为操纵二维的狄拉克-韦尔物理和拓扑边缘传输提供了一个可调平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17402v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We demonstrate a tunable Dirac-Weyl semimetal phase in two dimensions, realized by introducing in-plane d-wave altermagnetism into a Dirac system. This phase hosts both a central Dirac point and momentumseparated Weyl points connected by Fermi line edge states. The Weyl point positions--and thus the edge-state connectivity--can be continuously tuned by rotating the altermagnetic axis. In contrast, out-of-plane altermagnetism gaps part of the bulk spectrum while preserving a single Dirac point accompanied by chiral edge modes, as evidenced by quantized edge polarization. Our findings provide a tunable platform for manipulating Dirac-Weyl physics and topological edge transport in two dimensions.

98

无序自旋 1/2 钙钛矿 BaCu₁/₃Ta₂/₃O₃ 中的突现随机自旋单态#

Emergent Random Spin Singlets in Disordered Spin-1/2 perovskite BaCu₁/₃Ta₂/₃O₃
📚 arXiv👤 Sagar Mahapatra, Francesco De Angelis, Dibyata Rout, Priyanshi Tiwari, Martin Etter, Edmund Welter, M. P. Saravanan, Rajeev Rawat, Satoshi Nishimoto, Carlo Meneghini, Surjeet Singh📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在无序钙钛矿BaCu₁/₃Ta₂/₃O₃中揭示了"突现随机自旋单态"——一种交换耦合广泛分布但非奇异的量子基态。核心创新在于突破了传统无限随机性定点框架，为探索本质有界无序驱动的量子磁态提供
arXiv:2601.17455v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们研究了无序钙钛矿 BaCu₁/₃Ta₂/₃O₃，其中 Cu (自旋-1/2) 和 Ta 随机占据伪立方晶格。同步加速器 X 射线衍射和 X 射线吸收光谱确定了无序的局部性质，揭示了结构约束的磁交换路径的存在。低至 0.1 K 时未观察到磁有序或自旋冻结。交换耦合 J 的广泛但非奇异分布 P(J) 捕获了低温磁和热力学行为。这些结果开启了实现无序量子基态的可能性，其中交换随机…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17455v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们研究了无序钙钛矿 BaCu₁/₃Ta₂/₃O₃，其中 Cu (自旋-1/2) 和 Ta 随机占据伪立方晶格。同步加速器 X 射线衍射和 X 射线吸收光谱确定了无序的局部性质，揭示了结构约束的磁交换路径的存在。低至 0.1 K 时未观察到磁有序或自旋冻结。交换耦合 J 的广泛但非奇异分布 P(J) 捕获了低温磁和热力学行为。这些结果开启了实现无序量子基态的可能性，其中交换随机性广泛但本质上有界，这与传统的无限随机性定点驱动的随机单态相不同。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17455v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the disordered perovskite BaCu₁/₃Ta₂/₃O₃, where Cu (spin-1/2) and Ta randomly occupy a pseudo-cubic lattice. Synchrotron X-ray diffraction and X-ray absorption spectroscopy establish the local nature of the disorder, revealing the presence of structurally constrained magnetic exchange paths. No magnetic ordering or spin freezing is observed down to 0.1 K. The low-temperature magnetic and thermodynamic behavior is captured by a broad but non-singular distribution P(J) of exchange couplings J. These results open the possibility of realizing a disordered quantum ground state where the exchange randomness is broad yet intrinsically bounded, departing from the conventional infinite-randomness fixed point driven random-singlet phase.

99

各向异性旋磁比和正交爱因斯坦-德哈斯效应#

Anisotropic Gyromagnetic Ratio and Orthogonal Einstein-de Haas Effect
📚 arXiv👤 Rui Xue, Zhenhua Qiao, Yang Gao, Qian Niu📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次从理论上预言了正交爱因斯坦-德哈斯效应，揭示了各向异性旋磁比的微观机制：自旋-轨道耦合使声子角动量在自旋序空间中形成偶极结构，且其自旋翻转与自旋守恒部分贡献各异。这一工作为通过自旋群对称性理
arXiv:2601.17474v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们从理论上证明了正交爱因斯坦-德哈斯效应，其中铁磁材料的旋转是由与旋转轴正交的方向上的磁化强度的变化引起的。这相当于各向异性旋磁比。为了揭示其微观起源，我们将自旋轨道耦合视为扰动，积分电子自由度，并证明在共线铁磁体中，由于自旋群对称性的约束，声子角动量在自旋序空间中允许偶极结构。自旋轨道耦合的自旋翻转和自旋守恒部分对这种偶极结构的贡献不同。所有这些特征都在具有铁磁序和 C₁ₕ…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17474v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们从理论上证明了正交爱因斯坦-德哈斯效应，其中铁磁材料的旋转是由与旋转轴正交的方向上的磁化强度的变化引起的。这相当于各向异性旋磁比。为了揭示其微观起源，我们将自旋轨道耦合视为扰动，积分电子自由度，并证明在共线铁磁体中，由于自旋群对称性的约束，声子角动量在自旋序空间中允许偶极结构。自旋轨道耦合的自旋翻转和自旋守恒部分对这种偶极结构的贡献不同。所有这些特征都在具有铁磁序和 C₁ₕ 点群对称性的晶格电子声子模型中得到了例证。我们的工作为揭示声子角动量与一般自旋序构型之间的联系奠定了基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17474v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically demonstrate an orthogonal Einstein-de Haas effect, where the rotation of ferromagnetic materials is caused by the change of magnetization in the direction orthogonal to the rotation axis. This amounts to an anisotropic gyromagnetic ratio. To reveal its microscopic origin, we treat the spin-orbit coupling as a perturbation, integrate out the electronic degree of freedom, and show that in collinear ferromagnets the phonon angular momentum admits a dipolar structure in the spin-order space due to the constraint of the spin group symmetry. The spin-flipping and spin-conserving parts of the spin-orbit coupling contribute differently to such a dipolar structure. All these features are exemplified in a lattice electron-phonon model with ferromagnetic order and C₁ₕ point group symmetry. Our work lays the ground for revealing the connection between phonon angular momentum and general spin-order configurations.

100

狄拉克半金属 EuAuBi 中复杂的自旋动力学诱导变磁相变#

Complex spin dynamics induced metamagnetic phase transitions in Dirac semimetal EuAuBi
📚 arXiv👤 Lipika, Shobha Singh, Anyesh Saraswati, Vikas Chahar, Yan Sun, Pascal Manuel, Devashibhai Adroja, Walter Schnelle, Nitesh Kumar, Jhuma Sannigrahi, Kaustuv Manna📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在狄拉克半金属EuAuBi中发现了磁场诱导的变磁相变与复杂自旋动力学，揭示了三重磁相及倾斜反铁磁相等非平庸自旋织构，并证实其与输运载流子的强耦合。这一体系为探索动量空间与实空间贝里曲率效应的相互
arXiv:2601.17475v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们报告了利用中子衍射、磁化、电输运和比热测量对狄拉克半金属化合物 EuAuBi 单晶的物理性质进行的全面研究。 EuAuBi 结晶为六方结构，空间群为 P63mc（No. 186）。使用密度泛函理论的第一原理计算将其表征为狄拉克半金属，沿 Γ-A 方向在费米能级 (EF ) 附近具有显着的带交叉。从磁性和比热测量中观察到，该晶体在 4 K (TN1)、3.5 K (TN2)…

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17475v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们报告了利用中子衍射、磁化、电输运和比热测量对狄拉克半金属化合物 EuAuBi 单晶的物理性质进行的全面研究。 EuAuBi 结晶为六方结构，空间群为 P63mc（No. 186）。使用密度泛函理论的第一原理计算将其表征为狄拉克半金属，沿 Γ-A 方向在费米能级 (EF ) 附近具有显着的带交叉。从磁性和比热测量中观察到，该晶体在 4 K (TN1)、3.5 K (TN2) 和 2.8 K (TN3) 处表现出三种不同的磁相。然而，零场中子衍射仅解析两个磁相：相应的反铁磁相和倾斜的反铁磁相。场相关的交流和直流磁化测量揭示了 1.5 至 3 T 磁场范围内场感应的非平凡自旋纹理，表现为磁化曲线中的倾斜平台。系统中与磁场相关的纵向电阻率的独特特征进一步证明了传导载流子和这些自旋纹理之间的相互作用。最后，我们展示了 EuAuBi 的综合磁相图，突出显示了材料中存在的多种自旋排列。因此，EuAuBi 作为一种罕见的材料系统出现，其中动量空间和真实空间贝里曲率效应可能共存，为研究它们的相互作用提供了独特的机会。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17475v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report a comprehensive investigation of the physical properties of the Dirac semimetal compound EuAuBi single crystals, using neutron diffraction, magnetization, electrical transport, and specific heat measurements. EuAuBi crystallizes in a hexagonal structure with space group P63mc (No. 186). First-principles calculations using density functional theory characterize it as a Dirac semimetal, with a notable band-crossing in proximity to the Fermi level (EF ) along the Γ-A direction. The crystal exhibits three distinct magnetic phases at 4 K (TN1), 3.5 K (TN2), and 2.8 K (TN3)as observed from magnetic and specific heat measurements. However, zero-field neutron diffraction resolves only two magnetic phases: a commensurate antiferromagnetic phase and a canted antiferromagnetic phase. Field-dependent ac and dc magnetization measurements uncover field-induced non-trivial spin textures in the magnetic field range 1.5 to 3 T, manifested as a tilted plateau in the magnetization curves. The interplay between conduction carriers and these spin textures is further evidenced by unique features in the magnetic field-dependent longitudinal resistivity in the system. Finally, we present a comprehensive magnetic phase diagram of EuAuBi, highlighting diverse spin alignments present in the material. EuAuBi thus emerges as a rare material system in which both momentum-space and real-space Berry curvature effects may coexist, providing a unique opportunity to investigate their interplay.

层状范德华材料中的磁序铒探针#

Erbium Probes of Magnetic Order in a Layered van der Waals Material
📚 arXiv👤 Guadalupe García-Arellano, Kang Xu, Arun Ramanathan, Jiayi Li, Gabriel I. López-Morales, Xavier Roy, Cyrus E. Dreyer, Carlos A. Meriles📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究将CrSBr中晶格嵌入的Er³⁺缺陷作为原子尺度内禀探针，利用电信波段光致发光读出材料内部磁性，突破了传统外探针空间分辨率受限的瓶颈。在反铁磁相变处观测到明显热滞后及磁场调控效应，并发现纳米级磁
arXiv:2601.17516v1 公告类型：新 摘要：人们对表征二维磁体的磁序和动力学越来越感兴趣，但迄今为止大多数努力都依赖于外部探针，这些探针从数十纳米之外询问样本，并不可避免地在该长度范围内进行平均。在这里，我们使用 CrSBr 中内部晶格嵌入的 Er3+ 缺陷作为原子级探针，通过光谱学和温度依赖性共焦成像来获取其电信波段光致发光，以读出材料内部的磁性。在室温下，我们在电信波段观察到狭窄、长寿命的光致发光（PL）线，这是铒发…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17516v1 公告类型：新 摘要：人们对表征二维磁体的磁序和动力学越来越感兴趣，但迄今为止大多数努力都依赖于外部探针，这些探针从数十纳米之外询问样本，并不可避免地在该长度范围内进行平均。在这里，我们使用 CrSBr 中内部晶格嵌入的 Er3+ 缺陷作为原子级探针，通过光谱学和温度依赖性共焦成像来获取其电信波段光致发光，以读出材料内部的磁性。在室温下，我们在电信波段观察到狭窄、长寿命的光致发光（PL）线，这是铒发射体的特征。冷却至 3 K 并重新加热后，Er3+ PL 强度和激发态寿命在 CrSBr 的反铁磁 (AFM) 转变处表现出明显的热滞后，最小值接近 132 K。值得注意的是，我们观察到磁性特征在比大块基准预期更宽的温度范围内持续存在，这表明纳米级磁序局部存在于标称相界之外。此外，0.3 T 的中等面内场将 PL 最小值移动 +8 K，我们暂时将其与场偏置铁磁相关性相关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17516v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: There is growing interest in characterizing magnetic order and dynamics in two-dimensional magnets, yet most efforts to date rely on external probes that interrogate the sample from tens of nanometers away and inevitably average over that length scale. Here we use internal, lattice-embedded Er3+ defects in CrSBr as atomic-scale probes, accessing their telecom-band photoluminescence with spectroscopy and temperature-dependent confocal imaging to read out magnetism from within the material. At room temperature we observe narrow, long-lived photoluminescence (PL) lines in the telecom band, characteristic of erbium emitters. Upon cooling to 3 K and reheating, the Er3+ PL intensity and excited-state lifetime display pronounced thermal hysteresis with a minimum near 132 K, at the reported antiferromagnetic (AFM) transition of CrSBr. Remarkably, we observe magnetic signatures persisting over a broader temperature range than expected from bulk benchmarks, suggesting nanoscale magnetic order that locally survives beyond the nominal phase boundary. Further, a moderate in-plane field of 0.3 T shifts the PL minimum by +8 K, which we tentatively associate to field-biased ferromagnetic correlations.

102

用于模拟通过手性分子的电子传输的可扩展动力学蒙特卡罗平台#

An expandable kinetic Monte Carlo platform for modelling electron transport through chiral molecules
📚 arXiv👤 Silvia Giménez-Santamarina, Andrés Mora Martínez, Gérliz M. Gutiérrez-Finol, Alejandro Gaita-Ariño📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究开发了一种可扩展的动力学蒙特卡罗平台，用于模拟手性分子中的电子输运，核心创新在于能够区分α/β自旋电流并量化自旋-运动-手性耦合产生的自旋过滤效应。研究意义在于为厘清电子磁手性各向异性（eMCh
arXiv:2601.17525v1 公告类型：新 摘要：分子手性以不可忽略的方式与亚原子粒子（主要是电子或光子）的自旋角动量相互作用，是量子输运中各种自旋相关过滤效应的原因。其中，室温下的自旋选择性输运显然是寻找功能性自旋电子器件中最有前途的特性之一。在此背景下，过去 25 年对两种主要效应进行了实验研究，并引起了业界的极大兴趣：所谓的电子磁手性各向异性 (eMChA) 和手性诱导自旋选择性 (CISS)。尽管进行了广泛的研究，但对…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17525v1 公告类型：新 摘要：分子手性以不可忽略的方式与亚原子粒子（主要是电子或光子）的自旋角动量相互作用，是量子输运中各种自旋相关过滤效应的原因。其中，室温下的自旋选择性输运显然是寻找功能性自旋电子器件中最有前途的特性之一。在此背景下，过去 25 年对两种主要效应进行了实验研究，并引起了业界的极大兴趣：所谓的电子磁手性各向异性 (eMChA) 和手性诱导自旋选择性 (CISS)。尽管进行了广泛的研究，但对其微观机制的建模仍缺乏共识。因此，目前尚不清楚这两者是否真正不同，或者它们是否源于共同的物理原因。出于对主要不同理论进行建模并根据可用实验证据对其进行测试的长期目标，我们编写了高效动力学蒙特卡罗代码的核心。当前的代码模拟外部电压下的电子传输，区分 α 和 β 自旋电流，并通过分子的固有电子迁移率以及电子运动、自旋和手性之间的有效耦合来参数化分子。该代码允许获取由这三者之间的有效耦合产生的自旋过滤值。我们获得了一种在低电压下消失的效应，正电压和负电压之间的不对称性通常在电磁手性各向异性实验中发现。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17525v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Molecular chirality interacting in a non-negligible manner with the spin angular momentum of subatomic particles, mainly electrons or photons, is the cause of a variety of spin-dependent filtering effects in quantum transport. Among them, spin-selective transport at room temperature is clearly one of the most promising properties in the quest for functional spintronic devices. In this context, two main effects have been experimentally investigated in the past 25 years and have attracted significant interest within the community: the so-called Electronic Magnetochiral Anisotropy (eMChA) and Chirality Induced Spin Selectivity (CISS). Despite extensive research, there is still a lack of consensus in the modeling of their microscopic mechanisms. As a consequence, it remains unclear whether the two are truly distinct or if they originate from a common physical cause. With the long-term goal of modelling the main different theories and to test them against the available experimental evidence, we programmed the core of an efficient kinetic Monte Carlo code. The current code models electron transport under an external voltage, distinguishes between α and β spin currents, and parametrizes molecules by their intrinsic electron mobility and the effective coupling between electron movement, spin and chirality. The code allows obtaining spin filtering values arising from the effective coupling between these three. We obtain an effect that vanishes at low voltages, with the asymmetry between positive and negative voltages typically found in electrical magnetochiral anisotropy experiments.

103

自旋织构动力学对三维轨道狄拉克半金属的影响#

Effect of Spin-Texture Dynamics on Three-Dimensional Orbital Dirac Semimetals

arXiv:2601.17681v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们在这项工作中考虑狄拉克半金属哈密顿量与通用自旋纹理的最小耦合。一个简单的酉变换可以消除交换项中的空间依赖性，从而产生对狄拉克色散的有效校正。结果获得了完整功能的自由价值。选择不同的音高向量，我们表明在此类系统中会出现许多形式的新现象。例如，线性螺距矢量导致 I 型外尔半金属的产生——我们观察到反常霍尔效应和手性磁效应。反常霍尔系数需要非零螺距矢量，而 CME 与交换耦合成正…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17681v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们在这项工作中考虑狄拉克半金属哈密顿量与通用自旋纹理的最小耦合。一个简单的酉变换可以消除交换项中的空间依赖性，从而产生对狄拉克色散的有效校正。结果获得了完整功能的自由价值。选择不同的音高向量，我们表明在此类系统中会出现许多形式的新现象。例如，线性螺距矢量导致 I 型外尔半金属的产生——我们观察到反常霍尔效应和手性磁效应。反常霍尔系数需要非零螺距矢量，而 CME 与交换耦合成正比。存在磁场时模型的能带结构显示出 Lifshitz 跃迁。引入合适的时间相关节距向量导致在有效哈密顿量的桑贝空间中形成节点球。正如明确证明的那样，该节点球对于 van-Vleck 微扰理论中的所有阶都是稳健的。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17681v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We consider the minimal coupling of a Dirac semimetal Hamiltonian to a generic spin-texture in this work. A simple unitary transformation gauges away the spatial dependence in the exchange term, leading to the generation of effective corrections to the Dirac dispersion. A full function's worth of freedom is obtained as a result. Choosing different pitch vectors, we show that many forms of novel phenomena arise in such systems. For example, a linear pitch vector leads to the generation of type-I Weyl semimetal -- we observe the anomalous Hall effect and the chiral magnetic effect. The anomalous Hall coefficient requires a non-zero pitch vector whereas the CME is proportional to the exchange coupling. The band structure of the model in the presence of a magnetic field shows a Lifshitz transition. The introduction of a suitable time dependent pitch vector leads to the formation of nodal spheres in the Sambe space of effective Hamiltonians. This nodal sphere is robust to all orders in van-Vleck perturbation theory as proven explicitly.

104

两个磁性斯格明子之间类似 RKKY 的相互作用#

RKKY-like interactions between two magnetic skyrmions
📚 arXiv👤 Xuchong Hu, Huaiyang Yuan, Xiangrong Wang📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示手性磁性薄膜中两个斯格明子之间存在固有、各向异性且周期性振荡的类RKKY相互作用，其根源在于斯格明子自旋纹理中普遍存在的波尾。这一发现为斯格明子分子及超结构的设计提供了全新物理机制，对自
arXiv:2601.17727v1 公告类型：新 摘要：理解斯格明子-斯格明子相互作用对于有效操纵跑道和逻辑设备中多个斯格明子的运动至关重要。然而，这些相互作用的基本性质和微观起源仍然知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们研究了手性磁性薄膜中的斯格明子-斯格明子相互作用，并揭示了它们具有固有的、各向异性和振荡特性。具体来说，我们证明了斯格明子之间的吸引力和排斥力以明确的周期振荡，类似于金属中两个磁矩之间观察到的 Ruderman-Kittel…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17727v1 公告类型：新 摘要：理解斯格明子-斯格明子相互作用对于有效操纵跑道和逻辑设备中多个斯格明子的运动至关重要。然而，这些相互作用的基本性质和微观起源仍然知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们研究了手性磁性薄膜中的斯格明子-斯格明子相互作用，并揭示了它们具有固有的、各向异性和振荡特性。具体来说，我们证明了斯格明子之间的吸引力和排斥力以明确的周期振荡，类似于金属中两个磁矩之间观察到的 Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) 耦合。我们的分析揭示了斯格明子自旋纹理中先前未被识别的普遍波尾背后的基本物理原理。值得注意的是，斯格明子之间产生的类似 RKKY 的相互作用对于所有倾斜的斯格明子都是通用的，无论标题中的易磁化轴是来自外场还是晶体磁各向异性。这些发现为斯格明子分子或斯格明子超结构的设计引入了一种新颖的物理原理，在基于斯格明子的自旋电子学和神经形态计算中具有巨大的应用潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17727v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding skyrmion-skyrmion interactions is crucial for effectively manipulating the motion of multiple skyrmions in racetrack and logic devices. However, the fundamental nature and microscopic origins of these interactions remain poorly understood. In this study, we investigate skyrmion-skyrmion interactions in chiral magnetic films and reveal that they possess intrinsic, anisotropic, and oscillatory characteristics. Specifically, we demonstrate that the attractive and repulsive forces between skyrmions oscillate with a well-defined period, akin to the Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) coupling observed between two magnetic moments in metals. Our analysis uncovers the essential physics behind a previously unrecognized universal wavy tail in the skyrmion spin texture. Notably, the resulting RKKY-like interaction between skyrmions is universal for all tilted skyrmions, irrespective of whether the titled easy-axis is from an external field or a crystalline magnetic anisotropy. These findings introduce a novel physical principle for the design of skyrmion molecules or skyrmion superstructures, which hold significant potential for applications in skyrmion-based spintronics and neuromorphic computing.

105

非对称散射驱动大型非线性能斯特和塞贝克效应#

Asymmetric Scattering Drives Large Nonlinear Nernst and Seebeck Effects
📚 arXiv👤 Harsh Varshney, Amit Agarwal📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建了统一描述非线性能斯特与塞贝克效应的半经典理论，首次系统纳入斜散射和侧跳两类外在不对称散射机制，揭示了三层石墨烯中由外在散射主导的巨大非线性热电响应，为高效非线性热电器件设计确立了微观理论基
arXiv:2601.17775v1 公告类型：新 摘要：非线性能斯特效应和塞贝克效应（NNE 和 NSE）为非磁系统中的热电能量转换提供了有前景的途径。虽然诸如非线性德鲁德和贝里曲率偶极子项之类的内在机制已经很成熟，但由无序引起的不对称散射引起的热电响应的外在贡献仍然相对较少被探索，尽管越来越多的实验证据表明它们占主导地位。在这里，我们开发了一种统一的 NNE 和 NSE 半经典理论，该理论结合了斜散射和侧跳过程，确定了 NNE 的…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17775v1 公告类型：新 摘要：非线性能斯特效应和塞贝克效应（NNE 和 NSE）为非磁系统中的热电能量转换提供了有前景的途径。虽然诸如非线性德鲁德和贝里曲率偶极子项之类的内在机制已经很成熟，但由无序引起的不对称散射引起的热电响应的外在贡献仍然相对较少被探索，尽管越来越多的实验证据表明它们占主导地位。在这里，我们开发了一种统一的 NNE 和 NSE 半经典理论，该理论结合了斜散射和侧跳过程，确定了 NNE 的四种不同的外在贡献和 NSE 的两种不同的外在贡献。系统对称分析表明，这些响应在时间反转对称非磁体、PT 对称反铁磁体和非中心对称磁系统（例如交流磁体）中是允许的。作为一个案例研究，我们证明了 ABA 堆叠的三层石墨烯具有由外在散射主导的大非线性能斯特和塞贝克响应，与最近的实验非常一致。我们的结果确立了这些效应的微观起源，并为设计高效非线性热电器件提供了指导原则。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17775v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The nonlinear Nernst and Seebeck effects (NNE and NSE) offer promising routes for thermoelectric energy conversion in non-magnetic systems. While intrinsic mechanisms such as the nonlinear Drude and Berry-curvature-dipole terms are well established, extrinsic contributions to thermoelectric responses arising from disorder-induced asymmetric scattering remain comparatively less explored, despite growing experimental evidence of their dominance. Here, we develop a unified semiclassical theory of NNE and NSE that incorporates skew scattering and side-jump processes, identifying four distinct extrinsic contributions to NNE and two for NSE. A systematic symmetry analysis shows that these responses are allowed in time-reversal-symmetric non-magnets, PT-symmetric antiferromagnets, and non-centrosymmetric magnetic systems such as altermagnets. As a case study, we demonstrate that ABA-stacked trilayer graphene hosts large nonlinear Nernst and Seebeck responses dominated by extrinsic scattering, in excellent agreement with recent experiments. Our results establish the microscopic origin of these effects and provide guiding principles for designing high-efficiency nonlinear thermoelectric devices.

106

零场hopfion环的电流辅助成核#

Electric-current-assisted nucleation of zero-field hopfion rings
📚 arXiv👤 Xiaowen Chen, Dongsheng Song, Filipp N. Rybakov, Nikolai S. Kiselev, Long Li, Wen Shi, Rui Wu, Xuewen Fu, Olle Eriksson, Stefan Bluegel, Haifeng Du, Fengshan Zheng📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究提出了一种电流辅助的零场hopfion环成核方案，突破了此前对复杂制备工艺和特殊样品几何形状的依赖，具有普适性。所生成的hopfion在正负磁场下均表现出高度稳定性，并通过微磁模拟得到验证。此外
arXiv:2601.17790v1 公告类型：新 摘要：磁跳跃子是三维拓扑孤子——打结的、类似涡旋的自旋配置。在手性磁体中，霍菲子可以表现为孤立的结构，也可以与斯格明子弦相连。之前的研究采用了复杂的方案和特殊的样品几何形状来使与一个或几个斯格明子串相连的hopfion成核。在这里，我们介绍了一种简单且与样品形状和尺寸无关的电流辅助成核方案。由此产生的 hopfions 在正磁场和负磁场存在下都表现出非凡的稳定性，与微磁模拟完全一致。…

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17790v1 公告类型：新 摘要：磁跳跃子是三维拓扑孤子——打结的、类似涡旋的自旋配置。在手性磁体中，霍菲子可以表现为孤立的结构，也可以与斯格明子弦相连。之前的研究采用了复杂的方案和特殊的样品几何形状来使与一个或几个斯格明子串相连的hopfion成核。在这里，我们介绍了一种简单且与样品形状和尺寸无关的电流辅助成核方案。由此产生的 hopfions 在正磁场和负磁场存在下都表现出非凡的稳定性，与微磁模拟完全一致。我们还提出了一个综合框架，通过推导相应的同伦群来对 hopfion、skyrmion 和 meron 进行分类。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17790v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic hopfions are three-dimensional topological solitons -- knotted, vortex-like spin configurations. In chiral magnets, hopfions can appear as isolated structures or they can be linked to skyrmion strings. Previous studies employed a sophisticated protocol and a special sample geometry to nucleate such hopfions linked to one or a few skyrmion strings. Here, we introduce an electric-current-assisted nucleation protocol that is simple and independent of the sample shape and size. The resulting hopfions exhibit extraordinary stability in the presence of both positive and negative magnetic fields, in perfect agreement with micromagnetic simulations. We also present a comprehensive framework for classifying hopfions, skyrmions, and merons by deriving the corresponding homotopy group.

107

功能性氧化物膜中不稳定驱动的机械锁定状态#

Instability-driven mechanically locked states in functional oxide membranes
📚 arXiv👤 Varun Harbola, Thomas Emil le Cozannet, Denis Alikin, Shinhee Yun, Edwin Dollekamp, Andrea Roberto Insinga, Rasmus Bjørk, Nikolas Vitaliti, Thomas Sand Jespersen, Katja Isabelle Wurster, Dae-Sung Park, Jochen Mannhart, Nini Pryds📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次将独立式氧化物薄膜（SrTiO₃、BaTiO₃）与光刻腔体结合，利用机械不稳定性构建出几何可调控的双稳态屈曲结构，实现了铁电材料机电势景观的机械锁定与可逆跃迁，为复杂氧化物在纳米机电系统中的
arXiv:2601.17959v1 公告类型：新 摘要：薄固体中的机械不稳定性为设计非线性响应提供了强大的途径，但它们在功能性晶体氧化物中的受控用途在很大程度上仍未得到探索。值得注意的是，通过改变固体的纵横比，可以修改平衡周围的能量景观，以通过非横向变形在横向应力下引起非线性。这些非线性系统可以产生多个局部能量最小值，系统可以通过施加驱动力在状态之间稳定和切换。至关重要的是，氧化物薄膜生长的最新进展使得独立式氧化物膜的制造成为可能，…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.17959v1 公告类型：新 摘要：薄固体中的机械不稳定性为设计非线性响应提供了强大的途径，但它们在功能性晶体氧化物中的受控用途在很大程度上仍未得到探索。值得注意的是，通过改变固体的纵横比，可以修改平衡周围的能量景观，以通过非横向变形在横向应力下引起非线性。这些非线性系统可以产生多个局部能量最小值，系统可以通过施加驱动力在状态之间稳定和切换。至关重要的是，氧化物薄膜生长的最新进展使得独立式氧化物膜的制造成为可能，为其在双稳态结构中的使用铺平了可行的道路，特别是在纳米尺度上。在这里，我们证明了独立式氧化物膜，例如 SrTiO3 (STO) 和 BaTiO3 (BTO)，当转移到光刻定义的腔体上时，会松弛到明确的亚稳态屈曲状态。膜变形由内置残余应变、弯曲刚度和腔体几何形状之间的相互作用决定，从而产生具有不同应变分布的可再现双稳态。通过结合原子力显微镜、接触式开尔文探针测量和有限元建模，我们揭示了这些机械锁定状态直接塑造了铁电 BaTiO3 的机电势景观。我们进一步证明了机械简并态之间的可逆突跃跃迁，将复杂氧化物建立为非线性纳米机电架构的确定性、几何可调构建块。我们的结果说明了利用机械不稳定性来编码和操纵超薄晶体膜中的功能响应的一般策略。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17959v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mechanical instabilities in thin solids offer a powerful route to engineer nonlinear responses, yet their controlled use in functional crystalline oxides has remained largely unexplored. Notably, by changing the aspect ratio of solids, the energy landscape around equilibrium can be modified to induce non-linearities under lateral stresses through non-lateral deformations. These nonlinear systems can develop multiple local energy minima where the system can settle and switch between states through the application of a driving force. Crucially, recent advances in oxide thin film growth have enabled the fabrication of freestanding oxide membranes, paving a viable path for their use in bistable architecture, particularly at the nanoscale. Here, we demonstrate that freestanding oxide membranes, such as SrTiO3 (STO) and BaTiO3 (BTO), relax into well-defined metastable buckling states when transferred onto lithographically defined cavities. The membrane deformation is determined by the interplay between built-in residual strain, bending stiffness, and cavity geometry, resulting in reproducible bistable states with distinct strain distributions. Using a combination of atomic force microscopy, in-contact Kelvin probe measurements, and finite-element modelling, we reveal that these mechanically locked states directly shape the electromechanical potential landscape of ferroelectric BaTiO3. We further demonstrate reversible snapthrough transitions between mechanically degenerate states, establishing complex oxides as deterministic, geometry-tunable building blocks for nonlinear nanoelectromechanical architectures. Our results illustrate a general strategy for exploiting mechanical instabilities to encode and manipulate functional responses in ultrathin crystalline membranes.

108

TaCo2Te2 中磁场诱导的非平凡 Lifshitz 转变#

Magnetic field-induced non-trivial Lifshitz transition in TaCo2Te2
📚 arXiv👤 Suman Kalyan Pradhan, Xiaoming Ma, Jicheng Wang, Weiqi Liu, Yue Dai, Wenxing Chen, Xiaobai Ma, Wenyun Yang, Yu Wu, Zhaochu Luo, Raktim Datta, Arnab Bera, Samik DuttaGupta, Jinbo Yang, Yanglong Hou, Chang Liu, Rui Wu📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破了Lifshitz转变仅在零温发生的传统认知，在TaCo₂Te₂中发现了一种由温度-磁场协同调控的有限温度非常规Lifshitz转变。中子衍射和角分辨光电子能谱排除了结构、磁性及零场电子异常
arXiv:2601.18160v1 公告类型：新 摘要：磁场驱动的 Lifshitz 跃迁通常被认为是涉及费米表面重构且不对称破缺的零温度现象。在这里，我们报告了 TaCo2Te2 中的非常规 Lifshitz 转变，该转变仅在温度和磁场协同调节的狭窄有限温度窗口内出现。体敏输运和热电测量证明了低温下连续的费米表面重整化，其中转变是由临界磁场急剧触发的。至关重要的是，中子衍射揭示了不存在结构或磁性相变，而角分辨光电子能谱显示，在没有…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18160v1 公告类型：新 摘要：磁场驱动的 Lifshitz 跃迁通常被认为是涉及费米表面重构且不对称破缺的零温度现象。在这里，我们报告了 TaCo2Te2 中的非常规 Lifshitz 转变，该转变仅在温度和磁场协同调节的狭窄有限温度窗口内出现。体敏输运和热电测量证明了低温下连续的费米表面重整化，其中转变是由临界磁场急剧触发的。至关重要的是，中子衍射揭示了不存在结构或磁性相变，而角分辨光电子能谱显示，在没有磁场的情况下，电子结构中没有光谱异常。这些观察结果将该机制限制为平衡探针不可见的塞曼驱动过程，建立了费米表面拓扑由温度和磁场共同控制的范例。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18160v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic-field-driven Lifshitz transitions are typically considered zero-temperature phenomena involving Fermi-surface reconstruction without symmetry breaking. Here, we report an unconventional Lifshitz transition in TaCo2Te2 that emerges exclusively within a narrow finite-temperature window under cooperative tuning by both temperature and magnetic field. Bulk-sensitive transport and thermoelectric measurements demonstrate continuous Fermi-surface renormalization at low temperatures, where the transition is sharply triggered by a critical magnetic field. Crucially, neutron diffraction reveals the absence of structural or magnetic phase transitions, while angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy shows no spectral anomalies in electronic structure without magnetic field. These observations constrain the mechanism to a Zeeman-driven process invisible to equilibrium probes, establishing a paradigm where Fermi-surface topology is jointly controlled by temperature and magnetic field.

109

Au2O、Au2O3、Au2O3-x 和纳米片的功能，包括自发极化，使用 DFT 和混合功能#

Functionalities of Au2O, Au2O3, Au2O3-x, and nanosheets, including spontaneous polarization, using DFT and hybrid functional
📚 arXiv👤 Yukio Watanabe📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究采用DFT混合泛函修正了金氧化物的带隙认知，将Au₂O₃带隙从0.85 eV大幅上调至2.86 eV；首次发现Au₂O₃中存在异常大的自发极化，并在2 nm纳米片中仍保持显著铁电性，揭示了一种新
arXiv:2601.18165v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们使用密度泛函理论 (DFT) 来研究 Au2O 和 Au2O3-x (x = 00.08) 的性质，以揭示其卓越的功能。混合泛函理论准确地估计了氧化物的带隙 (Eg)，并且目前的混合泛函计算确定了 Au2O 的 Eg 值为 0.96 eV，Au2O3 的 Eg 值为 2.86 eV，这>是普遍接受的 Au2O3 Eg (0.85 eV) 的 300%。此外，我们在 Au2O…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18165v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们使用密度泛函理论 (DFT) 来研究 Au2O 和 Au2O3-x (x = 00.08) 的性质，以揭示其卓越的功能。混合泛函理论准确地估计了氧化物的带隙 (Eg)，并且目前的混合泛函计算确定了 Au2O 的 Eg 值为 0.96 eV，Au2O3 的 Eg 值为 2.86 eV，这>是普遍接受的 Au2O3 Eg (0.85 eV) 的 300%。此外，我们在 Au2O3 中发现了自发极化（PS），它异常大且有利于催化。即使在 2 nm 厚的 Au2O3 纳米片中，PS 也得以保留，类似于超铁电体，尽管表面重建引起了筛选，但仍产生 0.6 eV 的电势，这是一种新颖的筛选机制。厚度低于 0.8 nm 时，PS 消失，并且在 0.4 nm 处出现反演对称性，这表明寻找顺电相的新方法。 Au2O 在剪切变形下是超软的。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18165v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We used density functional theories (DFT) to investigate the properties of Au2O and Au2O3-x (x = 00.08) to reveal their remarkable functionalities. Hybrid functional theories accurately estimate the band gap (Eg) of oxides, and the present hybrid functional calculations determined Eg values of 0.96 eV for Au2O and 2.86 eV for Au2O3, which is >300% of the commonly accepted Eg of Au2O3 (0.85 eV). Moreover, we discovered spontaneous polarization (PS) in Au2O3, which is unusually large and advantageous for catalysis. The PS was retained even in 2-nm-thick Au2O3 nanosheets, similar to hyperferroelectric, generating a potential of 0.6 eV despite screening caused by surface reconstruction, which is a novel screening mechanism. Below a thickness of 0.8 nm, the PS vanished, and inversion symmetry emerged at 0.4 nm, suggesting a new approach to finding a paraelectric phase. Au2O was supersoft under shear distortion.

110

单层极限下的电压控制拓扑自旋纹理#

Voltage-controlled topological spin textures in the monolayer limit
📚 arXiv👤 Yangliu Wu, Bo Peng, Zhaozhuo Zeng, Chendi Yang, Haipeng Lu, Peiheng Zhou, Jianliang Xie, Difei Liang, Linbo Zhang, Peng Yan, Haizhong Guo, Renchao Che, Longjiang Deng📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在单层CrI₃中通过面外电场打破反演对称性，实现了电可调的自旋-轨道相互作用，从而可控地创建和操纵拓扑自旋纹理。核心创新在于将电压调控与二维极限拓扑磁性相结合，为斯格明子基信息器件及BKT相
arXiv:2601.18277v1 公告类型：新 摘要：低维系统中的相变物理学长期以来一直是人们感兴趣的重要课题。严格二维极限下的长程磁序的发现绕过了默明-瓦格纳定理，迅速成为研究热点。然而，在二维极限下展示非平凡的拓扑自旋纹理仍然难以实现。在这里，我们证明了面外电场打破了反演对称性，同时调制了电子能带结构，从而实现了电可调自旋轨道相互作用，用于在单层 CrI3 中创建和操纵拓扑自旋纹理。理想二维拓扑自旋纹理的实现不仅可以为探测别列…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18277v1 公告类型：新 摘要：低维系统中的相变物理学长期以来一直是人们感兴趣的重要课题。严格二维极限下的长程磁序的发现绕过了默明-瓦格纳定理，迅速成为研究热点。然而，在二维极限下展示非平凡的拓扑自旋纹理仍然难以实现。在这里，我们证明了面外电场打破了反演对称性，同时调制了电子能带结构，从而实现了电可调自旋轨道相互作用，用于在单层 CrI3 中创建和操纵拓扑自旋纹理。理想二维拓扑自旋纹理的实现不仅可以为探测别列津斯基-科斯特利茨-托利斯机制提供实验测试平台，还可以为包括超导性和超流性在内的未解决的量子现象提供潜在的见解。此外，电压控制的自旋轨道相互作用提供了一种新颖的途径来设计具有定制对称性和拓扑的二维自旋纹理，同时为基于斯格明子的下一代信息技术开辟了途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18277v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The physics of phase transitions in low-dimensional systems has long been a subject of significant research interest. Long-range magnetic order in the strict two-dimensional limit, whose discovery circumvented the Mermin-Wagner theorem, has rapidly emerged as a research focus. However, the demonstration of a non-trivial topological spin textures in two-dimensional limit has remained elusive. Here, we demonstrate the out-of-plane electric field breaks inversion symmetry while simultaneously modulating the electronic band structure, enabling electrically tunable spin-orbit interaction for creation and manipulation of topological spin textures in monolayer CrI3. The realization of ideal two-dimensional topological spin textures may offer not only an experimental testbed for probing the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless mechanism, but also potential insights into unresolved quantum phenomena including superconductivity and superfluidity. Moreover, voltage-controlled spin-orbit interaction offers a novel pathway to engineer two-dimensional spin textures with tailored symmetries and topologies, while opening avenues for skyrmion-based next-generation information technologies.

111

NuMagSANS：GPU 加速的开源软件包，用于复杂系统的核和磁小角中子散射可观测值的通用计算#

NuMagSANS: a GPU-accelerated open-source software package for the generic computation of nuclear and magnetic small-angle neutron scattering observables of complex systems
📚 arXiv👤 Michael P. Adams, Andreas Michels📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：NuMagSANS 是一款 GPU 加速的开源软件包，核心创新在于将位置相关的核密度与磁化数据导入、完全样品旋转控制及约 100 个响应函数库集成于一体，实现了复杂磁性材料 SANS 可观测值的高效通
arXiv:2601.18444v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们推出 NuMagSANS，这是一个 GPU 加速的软件包，用于计算核和磁小角中子散射 (SANS) 截面和相关函数。该程序允许用户导入位置相关的核密度和磁化数据，为分析复杂系统（特别是磁性材料）的散射特征提供了很大的灵活性。支持样品的完全旋转控制，从而可以全面探索角度相关的散射特征。 NuMagSANS 包括一个包含大约 100 个响应函数的多功能库，其中包括二维 SANS…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18444v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们推出 NuMagSANS，这是一个 GPU 加速的软件包，用于计算核和磁小角中子散射 (SANS) 截面和相关函数。该程序允许用户导入位置相关的核密度和磁化数据，为分析复杂系统（特别是磁性材料）的散射特征提供了很大的灵活性。支持样品的完全旋转控制，从而可以全面探索角度相关的散射特征。 NuMagSANS 包括一个包含大约 100 个响应函数的多功能库，其中包括二维 SANS 横截面、相关函数和方位平均量。这些功能使用户能够详细了解样品的结构和磁性特征。 GPU 加速可确保快速计算，即使对于大型数据集也是如此，使 NuMagSANS 成为高级 SANS 分析的强大而高效的工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18444v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present NuMagSANS, a GPU-accelerated software package for calculating nuclear and magnetic small-angle neutron scattering (SANS) cross sections and correlation functions. The program allows users to import position-dependent nuclear density and magnetization data, providing a large flexibility for analyzing the scattering signatures of complex systems, particularly magnetic materials. Full rotational control of the sample is supported, allowing a comprehensive exploration of angular-dependent scattering features. NuMagSANS includes a versatile library of approximately 100 response functions that encompass two-dimensional SANS cross sections, correlation functions, and azimuthally averaged quantities. These capabilities allow users to gain detailed insight into the structural and magnetic characteristics of their samples. GPU acceleration ensures rapid computations, even for large data sets, making NuMagSANS a powerful and efficient tool for advanced SANS analysis.

112

块体堆积的第一性原理研究、Jₘ̊ ₑff 图片、磁性哈密顿量、g 因子以及 α-RuCl₃ 的结构扭曲#

First-principles study of bulk stacking, Jₘ̊ ₑff picture, magnetic Hamiltonian, g factors, and structural distortions of α-RuCl₃
📚 arXiv👤 Seung-Ju Hong, Tae Yun Kim, Cheol-Hwan Park📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究首次通过约束密度泛函理论证实α-RuCl₃低温相为R̄3结构，解决了长期争议；创新性地以Néel矢量为量子化轴构建Jₑff图像，并揭示次近邻交换作用与磁矩对传统投影方法的不可忽略性，为准确理解
arXiv:2601.18469v1 公告类型：新 摘要：α-RuCl₃ 是一种候选 Kitaev 材料，在 7 K 以下表现出锯齿形反铁磁有序性。有关该材料的一个有争议的问题是其低温相的体结构。最近，实验普遍认为低温结构和高温结构分别属于Rbar3和C2/m空间群。然而，目前还没有理论研究支持Rbar3型结构作为低温结构。在本研究中，我们使用约束密度泛函理论表明Rbar3结构的能量低于C2/m结构，与实验观察结果一致。然后，我们发现…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18469v1 公告类型：新 摘要：α-RuCl₃ 是一种候选 Kitaev 材料，在 7 K 以下表现出锯齿形反铁磁有序性。有关该材料的一个有争议的问题是其低温相的体结构。最近，实验普遍认为低温结构和高温结构分别属于Rbar3和C2/m空间群。然而，目前还没有理论研究支持Rbar3型结构作为低温结构。在本研究中，我们使用约束密度泛函理论表明Rbar3结构的能量低于C2/m结构，与实验观察结果一致。然后，我们发现，如果我们将角动量量化轴设置为平行于 Néel 向量，则导带最低态几乎具有 Jₑff=1/2 和 mₑff=-1/2 特征；这是从这个角度对 α-RuCl₃ 的 Jₑff 图进行的首次分析。此外，我们计算了单层α-RuCl₃的各向异性磁交换参数和g因子，从而全面了解其磁性。我们的结果表明，传统原子轨道投影方法未捕获的第二最近邻交换相互作用和磁矩对于准确描述 α-RuCl₃ 中的磁性是必要的。此外，计算出的 g 因子与实验测量结果相当吻合，特别是它们的面内和面外分量之间的小各向异性。最后，我们研究了完美 RuCl₆ 八面体的结构扭曲对磁性的影响，该八面体已经大量存在 α-RuCl₃ 且没有任何外部扰动。 （由于字数限制，摘要被删减；完整摘要请参阅 pdf 文件。）

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18469v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: α-RuCl₃ is a candidate Kitaev material that exhibits zigzag antiferromagnetic ordering below 7 K. One contentious issue regarding this material is its bulk structure in the low-temperature phase. Recently, it has become generally accepted from experiments that the low- and high-temperature structures belong to the Rbar3 and C2/m space groups, respectively. However, there was no theoretical study supporting the Rbar3-type structure as the low-temperature structure. In this study, we use constrained density functional theory to show that the Rbar3 structure is lower in energy than the C2/m structure, in agreement with experimental observations. Then, we show that the conduction band minimum states are almost of the Jₑff=1/2 and mₑff=-1/2 character, if we set the angular momentum quantization axis to be parallel to the Néel vector; this is the first analysis of the Jₑff picture for α-RuCl₃ from this perspective. In addition, we compute the anisotropic magnetic exchange parameters and g factors of monolayer α-RuCl₃, thereby providing a comprehensive understanding of its magnetism. Our results demonstrate that both second-nearest-neighbor exchange interactions and magnetic moments not captured by the conventional atomic orbital projection method are necessary for accurate description of the magnetism in α-RuCl₃. Moreover, the calculated g factors are in fairly good agreement with experimental measurements, especially the small anisotropy between their in-plane and out-of-plane components. Finally, we examine the effects of structural distortions from a perfect RuCl₆ octahedron, already present in bulk α-RuCl₃ without any external perturbation, on the magnetic properties. (The abstract is cut here due to the word limit; see the pdf file for the full abstract.)

113

扭曲 MoTe2 中假定的分数拓扑绝缘体的磁特征#

Magnetic Signatures of a Putative Fractional Topological Insulator in Twisted MoTe2
📚 arXiv👤 Yiping Wang, Gillian E. Minarik, Weijie Li, Yves Kwan, Shuai Yuan, Eric Anderson, Chaowei Hu, Julian Ingham, Jeongheon Choe, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Xavier Roy, Jiun-Haw Chu, Raquel Queiroz, James C. Hone, N. Regnault, Xiaodong Xu, Xiaoyang Zhu📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过泵浦探针圆二色性测量，在扭曲MoTe₂的ν=-4/3态中首次发现独特的面外反铁磁行为：在极弱磁场（~2-4 mT）窗口内磁化强度为零，超出后发生一阶相变。该磁特征具有强转角选择性，为判定ν=
arXiv:2601.18508v1 公告类型：新 摘要：电子关联、拓扑和时间反转对称性 (TRS) 之间的相互作用通常会导致物质的奇异量子态。主要例子包括最近在扭曲 MoTe2 双层 (tMoTe2) 中实现的分数陈绝缘体 (FCI) 和与 hBN 对齐的多层石墨烯，其中 TRS 在部分填充的平坦莫尔陈氏带中被破坏。在 tMoTe2 的 FCI 中，最稳健的是每个莫尔晶胞的孔填充 v = -2/3。有趣的是，瞬态光学传感和最近的传输…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18508v1 公告类型：新 摘要：电子关联、拓扑和时间反转对称性 (TRS) 之间的相互作用通常会导致物质的奇异量子态。主要例子包括最近在扭曲 MoTe2 双层 (tMoTe2) 中实现的分数陈绝缘体 (FCI) 和与 hBN 对齐的多层石墨烯，其中 TRS 在部分填充的平坦莫尔陈氏带中被破坏。在 tMoTe2 的 FCI 中，最稳健的是每个莫尔晶胞的孔填充 v = -2/3。有趣的是，瞬态光学传感和最近的传输测量揭示了 v = -4/3 处的相关状态，是 v = -2/3 FCI 填充因子的两倍。在这里，对扭转角 = 3.9 度和 3.7 度的 tMoTe2 采用泵浦探针圆二色性 (CD) 测量，我们发现 v = -4/3 态在小于 ~2-4 mT 的面外磁场有限窗口中表现出磁化强度消失 (m = 0)，并且在较高场下呈现向 + - m 态的一阶相变。这种面外反铁磁 (AFM) 行为在所有其他相关态中明显不存在，并且在较高或较低扭转角 = 4.0 度和 3.3 度的 v = -4/3 态中消失。在 v = -4/3 处观察到的磁特征与使用 TRS 预测的分数拓扑绝缘体 (FTI) 一致，由具有相反手性的 -2/3 FCI 的两个副本组成。我们通过 tMoTe2 相互作用连续介质模型的计算来支持这些发现。我们的工作提出了一种具有 TRS 的分数拓扑绝缘体的候选方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18508v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The interplay among electronic correlation, topology, and time-reversal-symmetry (TRS) often leads to exotic quantum states of matter. Primary examples include the recently realized fractional Chern insulators (FCIs) in twisted MoTe2 bilayers (tMoTe2) and multilayer graphene aligned with hBN, where TRS is broken in partially filled flat moire Chern bands. Among the FCIs in tMoTe2, the most robust is at a hole filling of v = -2/3 per moire unit cell. Interestingly, transient optical sensing and more recent transport measurements revealed a correlated state at v = -4/3, twice the filling factor for the v = -2/3 FCI. Here, employing pump-probe circular dichroism (CD) measurements on tMoTe2 with twist angles = 3.9 degree and 3.7 degree, we find that the v = -4/3 state exhibits vanishing magnetization (m = 0) in finite windows of out-of-plane magnetic field less than ~2-4 mT, and a first order phase transition to + - m states at higher fields. This out-of-plane antiferromagnetic (AFM) like behavior is notably absent for all other correlated states and disappears for the v = -4/3 state at higher or lower twist angles = 4.0 degree and 3.3 degree. The observed magnetic signature at v = -4/3 is consistent with a predicted fractional topological insulator (FTI) with TRS, consisting of two copies of -2/3 FCIs with opposite chiralities. We support these findings with calculations in the interacting continuum model of tMoTe2. Our work presents a candidate for fractional topological insulators with TRS.

114

新型层状Kagome带状结构Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2：静态和动态磁性能#

A New Layered Kagome Strip Structure Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2: Static and Dynamic Magnetic Properties
📚 arXiv👤 Duminda S. Liurukara, Emily D. Williams, Tianran Chen, Stuart Calder, V. Ovidiu Garlea, C. Charlotte Buchanan, Dustin A. Gilbert, Joseph W. Kolis, D. A. Tennant📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：水热合成新型层状Kagome条带结构Na₂Co₃(AsO₄)₂(OH)₂，通过中子衍射揭示k=(0.5,0.5,0.5)反铁磁基态及Co位点各向异性磁矩排列，结合非弹性中子散射与海森堡模型确定交换作用
arXiv:2601.18717v1 公告类型：新 摘要：一维 kagome 条链与二维 kagome 反铁磁体具有许多相同的受挫结构图案，这使得它们对于加深我们对 kagome 晶格磁性的理解很有价值。在本文中，我们报道了条纹 Kagome 体系 Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2 的水热合成以及详细的结构和性能表征。利用单晶X射线衍射对晶体结构进行了表征，结果表明Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2以单斜晶系C2/m结晶。该结构…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18717v1 公告类型：新 摘要：一维 kagome 条链与二维 kagome 反铁磁体具有许多相同的受挫结构图案，这使得它们对于加深我们对 kagome 晶格磁性的理解很有价值。在本文中，我们报道了条纹 Kagome 体系 Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2 的水热合成以及详细的结构和性能表征。利用单晶X射线衍射对晶体结构进行了表征，结果表明Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2以单斜晶系C2/m结晶。该结构具有由 Co2+ 离子构建的一维 kagome 条晶格，并在 TN = 14 K 时经历反铁磁转变。使用中子粉末衍射来表征零场下的磁基态。在磁转变以下，Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2 有序形成具有 k 向量 (0.5, 0.5, 0.5) 的反铁磁结构。在所提出的模型中，Co1 力矩主要局限于 ac 平面，而 Co2 力矩主要沿 b 轴排列。在 5 和 10 meV 磁转变以下的非弹性中子谱中观察到两个平带。非弹性中子谱采用海森堡哈密顿量建模，包括三个最近邻交换相互作用（J1、J2、J3）和强单离子各向异性，以稳定观察到的磁性结构。我们的研究突出了基于Co2+的kagome条状磁晶格化合物Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2的复杂性，这为拓宽我们对受挫kagome磁晶格空间的理解提供了一个很好的平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18717v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: One-dimensional kagome strip chains share much of the same frustrated structural motif as two-dimensional kagome antiferromagnets, making them valuable for deepening our understanding of kagome lattice magnetism. In this paper, we report the hydrothermal synthesis and detailed structural and property characterization of Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2, a striped kagome system. The crystal structure was characterized using single crystal X-ray diffraction, which reveals that Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2 crystallizes in the monoclinic crystal system C2/m. The structure features a one-dimensional kagome strip lattice built from Co2+ ions and undergoes an antiferromagnetic transition at TN = 14 K. The magnetic ground state at zero field was characterized using neutron powder diffraction. Below the magnetic transition, Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2 orders into an antiferromagnetic structure with a k-vector (0.5, 0.5, 0.5). In the proposed model, the Co1 moment is predominantly confined to the ac-plane while the Co2 moment is primarily aligned along the b-axis. Two flat bands were observed in the inelastic neutron spectra below the magnetic transition at 5 and 10 meV. Inelastic neutron spectra were modeled with a Heisenberg Hamiltonian including three nearest-neighbor exchange interactions (J1, J2, J3) and strong single-ion anisotropy to stabilize the observed magnetic structure. Our study highlights the complexity of the Co2+-based kagome strip magnetic lattice compound Na2Co3(AsO4)2(OH)2, which provides an excellent platform to broaden our understanding of the frustrated kagome magnetic lattice space.

115

反铁磁三角晶格中的量子斯格明子#

Quantum skyrmions in the antiferromagnetic triangular lattice
📚 arXiv👤 Inés Corte, Federico Holik, Lorena Rebón, Flavia A. Gómez Albarracín📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在反铁磁体系中探索了量子斯格明子的存在，运用DMRG方法在三角晶格自旋1/2模型中证实了三亚晶格量子反铁磁斯格明子可在宽磁场范围内稳定。这一发现填补了反铁磁量子斯格明子研究的空白，为低耗散、
arXiv:2601.18737v1 公告类型：新 摘要：磁性斯格明子是拓扑准粒子，可能对内存和计算设备有用。反铁磁（AF）斯格明子不存在横向偏转，这使它们成为数据存储应用的合适候选者。在发现长度尺度与晶格常数相当的斯格明子之后，一些工作提出了自旋系统中经典铁磁斯格明子的量子类似物。然而，关于 AF 斯格明子的量子类似物的研究仍然缺乏。在这里，我们使用密度矩阵重正化群 (DMRG) 算法探索三角晶格上具有 Dzyaloshinskii…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.18737v1 公告类型：新 摘要：磁性斯格明子是拓扑准粒子，可能对内存和计算设备有用。反铁磁（AF）斯格明子不存在横向偏转，这使它们成为数据存储应用的合适候选者。在发现长度尺度与晶格常数相当的斯格明子之后，一些工作提出了自旋系统中经典铁磁斯格明子的量子类似物。然而，关于 AF 斯格明子的量子类似物的研究仍然缺乏。在这里，我们使用密度矩阵重正化群 (DMRG) 算法探索三角晶格上具有 Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya 相互作用的 AF 量子自旋 1/2 海森堡模型的相位。我们研究由此产生的基态的磁化强度分布、自旋结构因子和量子纠缠，以表征相应的相并发出量子 AF 斯格明子出现的信号。我们的结果支持三亚晶格量子反铁磁斯格明子纹理在广泛的磁场中稳定。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.18737v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic skyrmions are topological quasiparticles potentially useful for memory and computing devices. Antiferromagnetic (AF) skyrmions present no transverse deflection, making them suitable candidates for data storage applications. After the discovery of skyrmions with length scales comparable to the lattice constant, several works presented quantum analogues of classical ferromagnetic skyrmions in spin systems. However, studies about quantum analogues of AF skyrmions are still lacking. Here, we explore the phases of the AF quantum spin-1/2 Heisenberg model with Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions on the triangular lattice using the density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) algorithm. We study the magnetization profile, spin structure factor and quantum entanglement of the resulting ground states to characterize the corresponding phases and signal the emergence of quantum AF skyrmions. Our results support that three-sublattice quantum antiferromagnetic skyrmion textures are stabilized in a wide range of magnetic fields.

116

具有倾斜单轴各向异性的垂直磁化 Tb/Co 多层膜：实验和建模#

Perpendicularly magnetized Tb/Co multilayers featuring tilted uniaxial anisotropy: Experiments and modeling
📚 arXiv👤 J. C. Rodriguez E., L. Avilés-Félix, M. H. Aguirre, L. M. Rodriguez, D. Salomoni, S. Auffret, R. C. Sousa, I. L. Prejbeanu, A. E. Bruchhausen, E. De Biasi, J. Curiale📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究系统表征了[Tb/Co]×₅多层膜的磁性能，发现补偿温度随Tb厚度线性变化，并首次揭示垂直单轴各向异性存在倾斜，这一模型成功解释了面内磁滞回线的异常特征，为稀土/过渡金属亚铁磁薄膜的设计与应用提
arXiv:2505.14849v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：具有垂直磁各向异性的稀土/过渡金属 (RE/TM) 多层材料是自旋电子应用开发的关键成分。它们的补偿温度取决于稀土和过渡金属的厚度之比，使得它们的磁性能可以随温度调节，同时即使在纳米级器件中也能保持其各向异性。在这项工作中，我们进行了彻底的结构表征，并系统地研究了整个亚铁磁性 [Tb/Co]× ₅ 多层的磁性，其中 Tb 厚度在 0.4 nm - 1.25 nm 范围内变化。…

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2505.14849v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：具有垂直磁各向异性的稀土/过渡金属 (RE/TM) 多层材料是自旋电子应用开发的关键成分。它们的补偿温度取决于稀土和过渡金属的厚度之比，使得它们的磁性能可以随温度调节，同时即使在纳米级器件中也能保持其各向异性。在这项工作中，我们进行了彻底的结构表征，并系统地研究了整个亚铁磁性 [Tb/Co]× ₅ 多层的磁性，其中 Tb 厚度在 0.4 nm - 1.25 nm 范围内变化。观察到补偿温度对 Tb 层厚度的线性依赖性。此外，估计单轴各向异性常数为 330±30 kJ/m³，接近其他作者报告的值。此外，我们提出了一个模型，以更好地理解磁化环的角度依赖性和补偿温度的线性依赖性。我们提出了强有力的证据，证明垂直各向异性必须远离垂直轴倾斜，才能解释观察到的特征，特别是面内环路中的滞后现象。我们的工作增进了对 RE/TM 亚铁磁薄膜中直流磁特性的理解，这有可能影响这些材料所涉及的不同领域。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.14849v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Rare earth/transition metal (RE/TM) multilayers with perpendicular magnetic anisotropy are key ingredients for the development of spintronic applications. Their compensation temperature depends on the ratio of the thicknesses of rare earth and transition metal, allowing their magnetic properties to be tuned with temperature while maintaining their anisotropy even in nanometer-scale devices. In this work, we performed a thorough structural characterization and systematically investigate the magnetic properties of a whole family of ferrimagnetic [Tb/Co]× ₅ multilayers varying the Tb thickness in the range of 0.4 nm - 1.25 nm. A linear dependence of the compensation temperature on the Tb layer thickness was observed. Moreover, a uniaxial anisotropy constant of 330±30 kJ/m³, which is close to the values reported by other authors, was estimated. Additionally, we proposed a model to gain a better understanding of the angular dependence of the magnetization loops and the linear dependence of the compensation temperature. We present strong evidence demonstrating that the perpendicular anisotropy must be tilted away from the perpendicular axis in order to explain the observed features, particularly the hysteresis in the in-plane loops. Our work advances the understanding of DC magnetic properties in thin RE/TM ferrimagnetic films, which has the potential to impact different fields where these materials are involved.

117

蜂窝交替磁体手性分裂磁振子的高阶拓扑态#

Higher-order Topological States in Chiral Split Magnons of Honeycomb Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Xuan Guo, Meng-Han Zhang, Dao-Xin Yao📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次将高阶拓扑理论引入共线交替磁体体系，通过反铁磁层间耦合在玻色子Bogoliubov-de Gennes框架下实现二阶拓扑磁振子绝缘体，预言了各向异性表面态与可调控的空间分布铰链模式。这一工作
arXiv:2507.22996v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们从理论上探索共线交替磁体中的高阶拓扑磁振子，涵盖从局部角模式到传播铰链激励的维度层次结构。通过在玻色子 Bogoliubov-de Gennes 哈密顿量中采用反铁磁层间耦合，我们的工作揭示了各向异性表面状态和沿面相交传播的空间分布铰链模式。我们跟踪 Wannier 中心的绝热演化，以识别二阶拓扑磁振子绝缘体的体极化，其中各种磁振子光谱展示了超出传统拓扑的对称保护能带结构…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2507.22996v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们从理论上探索共线交替磁体中的高阶拓扑磁振子，涵盖从局部角模式到传播铰链激励的维度层次结构。通过在玻色子 Bogoliubov-de Gennes 哈密顿量中采用反铁磁层间耦合，我们的工作揭示了各向异性表面状态和沿面相交传播的空间分布铰链模式。我们跟踪 Wannier 中心的绝热演化，以识别二阶拓扑磁振子绝缘体的体极化，其中各种磁振子光谱展示了超出传统拓扑的对称保护能带结构。利用铰链模式的稳定性和传播特性，这些非常规磁振子展示了原子级终止修改的可操作性。我们的研究将交变磁学与高阶拓扑相结合，推进了基于磁振子的量子计算处理节能集成架构和信息传输。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.22996v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We theoretically explore higher-order topological magnons in collinear altermagnets, encompassing a dimensional hierarchy ranging from localized corner modes to propagating hinge excitations. By employing antiferromagnetic interlayer coupling in bosonic Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian, our work reveals anisotropic surface states and spatially distributed hinge modes propagating along facet intersections. We track the adiabatic evolution of Wannier centers to identify the bulk-polarization with second-order topological magnon insulator, where various magnon spectra demonstrate symmetry-protected band structure beyond conventional topology. Leveraging the stability and propagative properties of hinge modes, these unconventional magnons demonstrate manipulability in atomic-scale modifications of termination. Our study integrate altermagnetism with higher-order topology, which advance magnon-based quantum computing processing energy-efficient integrated architectures and information transfer.

118

通过交变磁性的对称性设计超导体中的亚能隙态#

Engineering subgap states in superconductors by the symmetry of altermagnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Bo Lu, Phillip Mercebach, Pablo Burset, Keiji Yada, Jorge Cayao, Yukio Tanaka, Yuri Fukaya📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次将交变磁性与非常规超导配对的对称性匹配作为设计原则，预言了博戈柳博夫费米面、弯曲/平坦安德烈夫态等可控亚能隙态，为超导量子器件的态工程开辟了新路径。
arXiv:2508.03364v4 公告类型：替换 摘要：结合超导和磁性材料是产生奇异界面亚能隙态的一条有前途的途径。在这方面，交变磁性特别有趣，因为它提高了自旋简并性，同时提供了定制的自旋分裂各向异性。在这里，我们利用交变磁场和非常规配对之间的对称性对比来研究亚能隙态的实现和控制。当交变磁性和非常规超导性的对称性对齐时，我们证明了作为博戈柳博夫费米面的块状零能量平带的出现，从而产生了零偏压电导峰值。 d波交变磁体的对称性和强度强烈…

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2508.03364v4 公告类型：替换 摘要：结合超导和磁性材料是产生奇异界面亚能隙态的一条有前途的途径。在这方面，交变磁性特别有趣，因为它提高了自旋简并性，同时提供了定制的自旋分裂各向异性。在这里，我们利用交变磁场和非常规配对之间的对称性对比来研究亚能隙态的实现和控制。当交变磁性和非常规超导性的对称性对齐时，我们证明了作为博戈柳博夫费米面的块状零能量平带的出现，从而产生了零偏压电导峰值。 d波交变磁体的对称性和强度强烈影响d波以及手性d波和p波超导体的表面安德烈夫态。因此，实现了不同类型的亚带隙态，包括弯曲带和平坦带，可以通过隧道光谱检测到。我们的结果为设计和操纵超导系统中的亚带隙态提供了可靠的途径，这对于超导器件的功能化非常有用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.03364v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Combining superconducting and magnetic materials is a promising path to generate exotic interface subgap states. In this regard, altermagnetism is particularly interesting because it lifts spin degeneracy while providing tailored anisotropy of spin splittings. Here, we investigate the realization and control of subgap states by using the symmetry contrast between altermagnetic fields and unconventional pairings. When the symmetries of altermagnetism and unconventional superconductivity align, we demonstrate the emergence of bulk zero-energy flat bands as the Bogoliubov Fermi surface, giving rise to a zero-bias conductance peak. The symmetry and strength of d-wave altermagnets strongly affect the surface Andreev states from d-wave and chiral d- and p-wave superconductors. As a result, distinct types of subgap states are realized, including curved and flat bands, that can be detected by tunneling spectroscopy. Our results offer a solid route for designing and manipulating subgap states in superconducting systems, which can be useful for functionalizing superconducting devices.

119

具有门控二维莫尔系统的哈伯德工程模型#

Engineering Hubbard models with gated two-dimensional moiré systems
📚 arXiv👤 Yiqi Yang, Yubo Yang, Miguel A. Morales, Shiwei Zhang📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究提出通过调控金属栅极间距，可在门控二维莫尔系统中实现方晶格哈伯德模型的基态有序相（包括条纹相、反铁磁相等），并将定量下折叠方法拓展至三角莫尔系统，为实验实现强关联晶格模型提供了可调控的新平台与具
arXiv:2508.13314v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：晶格模型是研究强相关量子多体系统的强大工具，但它们普遍缺乏精确的解决方案，这促使人们努力在可调谐平台中对其进行模拟。最近，一种有前途的新候选材料出现在二维材料的此类平台上。莫尔电子系统的一个子集可以有效地描述为受莫尔电子势影响的二维电子气 (2D EG)，电子与电子的相互作用被附近的金属栅极屏蔽。在本文中，我们研究了此类系统中晶格模型的实现。我们表明，通过控制栅极间距，方波莫…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2508.13314v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：晶格模型是研究强相关量子多体系统的强大工具，但它们普遍缺乏精确的解决方案，这促使人们努力在可调谐平台中对其进行模拟。最近，一种有前途的新候选材料出现在二维材料的此类平台上。莫尔电子系统的一个子集可以有效地描述为受莫尔电子势影响的二维电子气 (2D EG)，电子与电子的相互作用被附近的金属栅极屏蔽。在本文中，我们研究了此类系统中晶格模型的实现。我们表明，通过控制栅极间距，方波莫尔势中的二维 EG 可以系统地调整为基态表现出类似于方晶格哈伯德模型的阶次的系统，包括条纹相。此外，我们研究了栅极间距和莫尔电势深度的变化如何影响基态阶数。识别出许多反铁磁相以及铁磁相和顺磁相。然后，我们将定量下折叠方法应用于更接近当前实验条件的三角莫尔系统，将它们与所研究的方形晶格参数进行比较，并概述阶段的实验实现路线。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.13314v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Lattice models are powerful tools for studying strongly correlated quantum many-body systems, but their general lack of exact solutions motivates efforts to simulate them in tunable platforms. Recently, a promising new candidate has emerged for such platforms from two-dimensional materials. A subset of moiré systems can be effectively described as a two-dimensional electron gas (2D EG) subject to a moiré potential, with electron-electron interactions screened by nearby metallic gates. In this paper, we investigate the realization of lattice models in such systems. We show that, by controlling the gate separation, a 2D EG in a square moiré potential can be systematically tuned into a system whose ground state exhibits orders analogous to those of the square lattice Hubbard model, including the stripe phase. Furthermore, we study how variations in gate separation and moiré potential depth affect the ground-state orders. A number of antiferromagnetic phases, as well as a ferromagnetic phase and a paramagnetic phase, are identified. We then apply our quantitative downfolding approach to triangular moiré systems closer to current experimental conditions, compare them with the square lattice parameters studied, and outline routes for experimental realization of the phases.

120

用于耐用能量传感器的坚固无铅仿生压电陶瓷#

Strong lead-free bioinspired piezoceramics for durable energy transducers
📚 arXiv👤 Ruxue Yang, Temesgen Tadeyos Zate, Peiren Wang, Soumyajit Mojumder, Elo Overgaard Mogensen, Oriol Gavalda-Diaz, Zihe Li, Ajeet Kumar, James Roscow, Hamideh Khanbareh, Astri Bjørnetun Haugen, Florian Bouville📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究借鉴珍珠层"砖-砂浆"结构，通过胶体工艺在无铅BNT压电陶瓷中构建多尺度仿生微观结构，在保持压电性能的同时，将弯曲强度、断裂韧性和铁电疲劳寿命分别提升2–3倍、1.6–2倍和10–15倍，突破了
arXiv:2508.15382v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：耐用、高性能且环保的无铅压电陶瓷对于下一代可持续能源传感器和机电系统至关重要。虽然通过化学成分、纹理或晶体缺陷，压电陶瓷的性能得到了显着增强，但压电陶瓷本质上机械性能较弱，这对其工作条件和耐用性产生了负面影响。此外，在不牺牲压电性能的情况下提高综合机械耐久性仍然是一个关键挑战。在这里，我们使用可扩展的胶体工艺设计了仿生 Bi0.5Na0.5TiO3 (BNT) 陶瓷，该工艺能…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2508.15382v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：耐用、高性能且环保的无铅压电陶瓷对于下一代可持续能源传感器和机电系统至关重要。虽然通过化学成分、纹理或晶体缺陷，压电陶瓷的性能得到了显着增强，但压电陶瓷本质上机械性能较弱，这对其工作条件和耐用性产生了负面影响。此外，在不牺牲压电性能的情况下提高综合机械耐久性仍然是一个关键挑战。在这里，我们使用可扩展的胶体工艺设计了仿生 Bi0.5Na0.5TiO3 (BNT) 陶瓷，该工艺能够对微观结构进行多尺度控制。该设计包括板状单晶 BNT 砖，这些砖堆叠在一起，沿极化方向产生晶体结构，并通过硅基砂浆粘合在一起，形成砖和砂浆相。与传统合成的 BNT 相比，这种精心设计的微观结构可使弯曲强度提高 2 至 3 倍，断裂韧性提高 1.6 至 2 倍，与普通结构陶瓷相当，且不会牺牲压电性能。此外，仿生 BNT 表现出显着增强的铁电疲劳抗力，失效前场致机电循环次数提高了 10 至 15 倍。这些增益源自拉曼光谱和 XRD 揭示的各向异性残余应力场，它延迟了裂纹萌生事件。此外，我们还证明了在弯曲模式下使用基于悬臂梁的压电换能器具有增强的换能能力和机电抗疲劳性。鉴于其非化学成分来源，这种仿生策略可以广泛适用于其他压电材料系统，适用于功能和结构性能都至关重要的应用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.15382v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Durable, high-performance and eco-friendly lead-free piezoceramics are essential for next-generation sustainable energy transducers and electromechanical systems. While significant performance enhancements have been made, through chemical composition, texture, or crystal defects, piezoceramics are intrinsically weak mechanically, which negatively impact their working conditions and durability. What's more, improving comprehensive mechanical durability without sacrificing piezoelectric performance remains a key challenge. Here, we design bioinspired Bi0.5Na0.5TiO3 (BNT) ceramics using a scalable colloidal process that enables multiscale control over the microstructure. The design comprises plate-like monocrystalline BNT bricks stacked to induce a crystallographic texture along the poling direction, bonded together by a silica-based mortar, forming the brick-and-mortar phase. This deliberate microstructure design yields 2- to 3-fold increase in flexural strength, and 1.6- to 2-fold increase in fracture toughness compared with a BNT synthesized conventionally, comparable to common structural ceramics, without sacrificing the piezoelectric performance. In addition, the bioinspired BNT exhibit dramatically enhanced ferroelectric fatigue resistance, with a 10- to 15-folds improvement in the number of field-induced electromechanical cycles before failure. These gains originate from anisotropic residual stress fields, revealed by Raman spectroscopy and XRD, which delay crack initiation events. Furthermore, we demonstrated enhanced transducing capability and electromechanical fatigue resistance using a cantilever beam-based piezoelectric transducer under bending mode. Given its non-chemical-compositional origin, this bioinspired strategy could be broadly applicable to other piezoelectric material systems for applications where both functional and structural performance are critical.

121

连续介质几何中的磁振子和磁致弹性非线性动力学的经典和量子理论#

Classical and quantum theory of magnonic and magnetoelastic nonlinear dynamics in continuum geometries
📚 arXiv👤 Marco Brühlmann, Yunyoung Hwang, Jorge Puebla, Carlos Gonzalez-Ballestero📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究将Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程与磁弹性哈密顿量统一，首次建立了同时涵盖磁振子非线性（三/四磁振子过程）和磁弹性非线性相互作用的连续介质经典-量子理论框架，并为所有速率给出解
arXiv:2509.16199v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们提供了连续介质系统中自旋和声波耦合非线性动力学的理论。将 Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert 方程与磁弹性哈密顿量相结合，我们推导出磁化强度和声波振幅的经典运动方程，其中包括磁振子非线性（三磁振子过程和四磁振子过程）以及线性和非线性磁弹性相互作用。我们专注于维持表面声波的二维磁性薄膜，我们的模型成功地再现了我们最近在声驱动下声子到磁振子下转换的实验观察结果。我…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2509.16199v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们提供了连续介质系统中自旋和声波耦合非线性动力学的理论。将 Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert 方程与磁弹性哈密顿量相结合，我们推导出磁化强度和声波振幅的经典运动方程，其中包括磁振子非线性（三磁振子过程和四磁振子过程）以及线性和非线性磁弹性相互作用。我们专注于维持表面声波的二维磁性薄膜，我们的模型成功地再现了我们最近在声驱动下声子到磁振子下转换的实验观察结果。我们为方程中的所有速率提供解析表达式，这使得它们特别适合量化。然后，我们量化我们的模型，导出磁振子和声子算子的海森堡-朗之万运动方程，并展示如何计算平均场近似中的量子期望值。我们的工作为量子领域中磁振子的声学控制铺平了道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.16199v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We provide a theory of spin and acoustic wave coupled nonlinear dynamics in continuum systems. Combining the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert equations with the magnetoelastic Hamiltonian, we derive classical equations of motion for the magnetization and acoustic wave amplitudes, that include magnonic nonlinearity -- both three- and four-magnon processes -- as well as linear and nonlinear magnetoelastic interactions. We focus on two-dimensional magnetic films sustaining surface acoustic waves, a geometry where our model successfully reproduces our recent experimental observation of phonon-to-magnon down-conversion under acoustic drive. We provide analytical expressions for all the rates in our equations, which make them particularly suitable for quantization. We then quantize our model, deriving Heisenberg-Langevin equations of motion for magnon and phonon operators, and show how to compute quantum expectation values in the mean field approximation. Our work paves the way toward acoustic control of magnons in the quantum regime.

122

具有非共线反铁磁序和反常霍尔效应的铁磁体#

Ferromagnet with a noncollinear antiferromagnetic order and anomalous Hall effect
📚 arXiv👤 Vladimir A. Zyuzin📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究提出了一种全新的无需自旋轨道耦合即可产生反常霍尔效应的机制：通过传导费米子与局域自旋的间接相互作用，在非共线反铁磁序铁磁体中实现动量依赖的自旋动量锁定。这一发现拓展了反常霍尔效应的物理起源，为设
arXiv:2509.22266v2 发布类型：替换 摘要：本文介绍了一种非共线反铁磁序金属磁系统的理论模型。基于传导费米子通过局域自旋的隧道过程，我们引入了传导费米子与局域自旋的间接相互作用的机制。我们证明了传导费米子与非共线反铁磁序的相互作用会导致动量自旋动量锁定的奇数。这种相互作用类似于拉什巴自旋轨道耦合，但打破了时间反转对称性。结果，我们表明，具有非共线反铁磁序的铁磁体是一种具有反常霍尔效应的绝缘体，无需任何自旋轨道耦合。
阅读原文 ↗

中文摘要

arXiv:2509.22266v2 发布类型：替换 摘要：本文介绍了一种非共线反铁磁序金属磁系统的理论模型。基于传导费米子通过局域自旋的隧道过程，我们引入了传导费米子与局域自旋的间接相互作用的机制。我们证明了传导费米子与非共线反铁磁序的相互作用会导致动量自旋动量锁定的奇数。这种相互作用类似于拉什巴自旋轨道耦合，但打破了时间反转对称性。结果，我们表明，具有非共线反铁磁序的铁磁体是一种具有反常霍尔效应的绝缘体，无需任何自旋轨道耦合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.22266v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this paper we introduce a theoretical model of a metallic magnetic system with noncollinear antiferromagnetic order. We introduce a mechanism of indirect interaction of conducting fermions with localized spins based on the tunneling processes of conducting fermions through the localized spins. We demonstrate that interaction of conducting fermions with noncollinear antiferromagnetic order results in odd in momentum spin-momentum locking. The interaction resembles Rashba spin-orbit coupling but breaks the time-reversal symmetry. As a result, we show that a ferromagnet with the noncollinear antiferromagnetic order is an insulator with anomalous Hall effect occurring without any spin-orbit coupling.

123

吸附引起的表面磁性#

Adsorption-induced surface magnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Miloš Baljozović, Shiladitya Karmakar, André L. Fernandes Cauduro, Mothuku Shyam Sundar, Marco Lozano, Manish Kumar, Diego Soler Polo, Andreas K. Schmid, Ashutosh V. Bedekar, Pavel Jelinek, Karl-Heinz Ernst📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在非磁性Cu(100)表面通过异螺旋烯分子吸附诱导出局域自旋极化态，排除了手性诱导自旋选择性等干扰机制；结合DFT与扩展Newns-Anderson-Grimley模型揭示，强化学吸附导致的
arXiv:2510.03897v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们报告了非磁性 Cu(100) 表面上异螺旋烯分子吸附诱导磁性的出现。自旋极化低能电子显微镜 (SP-LEEM) 测量揭示了对映体纯 7,12,17-三氧杂[11]螺烯 (TO[11]H) 单层的自旋依赖性电子反射率，表明在最顶层铜层中形成了局域自旋极化态。高度定向热解石墨上的清洁 Cu(100) 和 TO[11]H 的对照实验没有显示出这种效应，排除了伪影和手性诱导的自旋…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.03897v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们报告了非磁性 Cu(100) 表面上异螺旋烯分子吸附诱导磁性的出现。自旋极化低能电子显微镜 (SP-LEEM) 测量揭示了对映体纯 7,12,17-三氧杂[11]螺烯 (TO[11]H) 单层的自旋依赖性电子反射率，表明在最顶层铜层中形成了局域自旋极化态。高度定向热解石墨上的清洁 Cu(100) 和 TO[11]H 的对照实验没有显示出这种效应，排除了伪影和手性诱导的自旋选择性作为来源。使用混合泛函的自旋极化密度泛函理论计算将磁性归因于强化学吸附，这会诱导分子 HOMO 与铜 s 态和 d 态之间的杂化，从而驱动界面处的不对称自旋极化电荷重新分布。扩展的 Newns-Anderson-Grimley 模型结合了 Cu d 轨道中的现场库仑排斥，再现了高于阈值相互作用强度的界面自旋极化的出现，突出了杂交参数和库仑相关性的关键作用。这些发现揭示了一种在分子-金属界面感应磁性而无需固有磁性成分的机制，为有机-无机杂化系统中的自旋极化态工程提供了途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.03897v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We report the emergence of adsorption-induced magnetism from heterohelicene molecules on a non-magnetic Cu(100) surface. Spin-polarized low-energy electron microscopy (SP-LEEM) measurements reveal spin-dependent electron reflectivity for enantiopure 7,12,17-trioxa[11]helicene (TO[11]H) monolayers, indicating the formation of a spin-polarized state localized in the topmost copper layer. Control experiments on clean Cu(100) and TO[11]H on highly oriented pyrolytic graphite show no such effect, excluding artifacts and chirality-induced spin selectivity as origins. Spin-polarized density functional theory calculations with hybrid functionals attribute the magnetism to strong chemisorption, which induces hybridization between the molecular HOMO and copper s- and d-states, driving asymmetric spin-polarized charge redistribution at the interface. An extended Newns-Anderson-Grimley model incorporating on-site Coulomb repulsion in Cu d-orbitals reproduces the emergence of interfacial spin polarization above a threshold interaction strength, highlighting the key roles of hybridization parameters and Coulomb correlation. These findings reveal a mechanism for inducing magnetism at molecule-metal interfaces without inherently magnetic components, offering avenues for engineering spin-polarized states in organic-inorganic hybrid systems.

124

单轴各向异性自旋阀发射器中的磁场控制太赫兹调制#

Magnetic Field-Controlled THz Modulation in Uniaxial Anisotropic Spin-Valves Emitters
📚 arXiv👤 Arseniy M. Buryakov, Anastasia V. Gorbatova, Pavel Y. Avdeev, Igor Yu. Pashen'kin, Maksim V. Sapozhnikov, Alexey A. Klimov, Elena D. Mishina, Alexandr S. Sigov, Vladimir L. Preobrazhensky📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电

arXiv:2510.26471v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：单轴自旋电子异质结构在飞秒光激发下构成紧凑的太赫兹发射器，其发射幅度和偏振由所施加的磁场控制。我们在这里展示了超薄、交换偏置 Co/Pt/Co/IrMn 自旋阀中有效的磁可调太赫兹振幅控制。太赫兹自旋电子磁力测量解决了平行和反平行磁化状态之间的可逆切换，并将高发射和低发射状态与 Pt 间隔物中逆自旋霍尔效应产生的电荷瞬变的相长和相消干扰相关联。残余的低发射信号可追溯到 IrM…

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.26471v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：单轴自旋电子异质结构在飞秒光激发下构成紧凑的太赫兹发射器，其发射幅度和偏振由所施加的磁场控制。我们在这里展示了超薄、交换偏置 Co/Pt/Co/IrMn 自旋阀中有效的磁可调太赫兹振幅控制。太赫兹自旋电子磁力测量解决了平行和反平行磁化状态之间的可逆切换，并将高发射和低发射状态与 Pt 间隔物中逆自旋霍尔效应产生的电荷瞬变的相长和相消干扰相关联。残余的低发射信号可追溯到 IrMn 中的自旋电荷转换。正面与背面激励下的相反转证实了发射的 ISHE 起源，而大自旋 Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert 模型再现了其振幅的场依赖性并分离了层特定的贡献。这些结果共同定义了一种晶圆兼容的自旋阀器件架构，可实现高效、低场太赫兹振幅控制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.26471v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Uniaxial spintronic heterostructures constitute compact THz emitters under femtosecond optical excitation, with emission amplitude and polarization governed by the applied magnetic field is presented. We demonstrate here efficient magnetically tunable THz amplitude control in ultrathin, exchange-biased Co/Pt/Co/IrMn spin valve. Terahertz spintronic magnetometry resolves reversible switching between parallel and antiparallel magnetization states and correlates the high- and low-emission regimes with constructive and destructive interference of charge transients generated by the inverse spin Hall effect in the Pt spacer. A residual low-emission signal is traced to spin-to-charge conversion in IrMn. Phase inversion under front- versus back-side excitation confirms the ISHE origin of the emission, while a macrospin Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert model reproduces the field dependence of its amplitude and separates layer-specific contributions. Together, these results define a wafer-compatible spin valve device architecture that enables efficient, low-field THz amplitude control.

金属共线反铁磁体中的反常霍尔效应#

Anomalous Hall effect in metallic collinear antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Vladimir P. Golubinskii, Vladimir A. Zyuzin📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次构建了共线（补偿）Néel反铁磁体产生反常霍尔效应的最小理论模型，揭示其机制源于传导电子与Néel矢量的动量依赖交换耦合及自旋-轨道耦合的协同作用，并通过Dzyaloshinskii不变量与
arXiv:2511.02787v4 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们提出并从理论上研究了显示反常霍尔效应的 Néel 有序共线（补偿）反铁磁体的最小模型。为了简单起见，我们首先考虑在方形晶格上具有两个磁性子晶格的反铁磁体的二维模型。我们提供了 Néel 有序亚铁磁体和 Dzyaloshinskii 弱铁磁体的明确示例。然后研究了金红石晶格上的反铁磁体，属于弱铁磁体类别。我们分析了这些 Néel 有序系统中是否存在自发磁化的 Dzyalos…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2511.02787v4 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们提出并从理论上研究了显示反常霍尔效应的 Néel 有序共线（补偿）反铁磁体的最小模型。为了简单起见，我们首先考虑在方形晶格上具有两个磁性子晶格的反铁磁体的二维模型。我们提供了 Néel 有序亚铁磁体和 Dzyaloshinskii 弱铁磁体的明确示例。然后研究了金红石晶格上的反铁磁体，属于弱铁磁体类别。我们分析了这些 Néel 有序系统中是否存在自发磁化的 Dzyaloshinskii 不变量。对所研究系统的贝里曲率的微观计算证实了这些 Dzyaloshinskii 不变量的有效性。结果表明，这些反铁磁体中的反常霍尔效应机制是由具有 Néel 级的传导费米子的动量依赖交换相互作用和自旋轨道耦合的相互作用引起的。这些物理过程源于对称性破缺，这种对称性使得 Dzyaloshinskii 在系统中保持不变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.02787v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose and theoretically study minimal models of Néel ordered collinear (compensated) antiferromagnets that show the anomalous Hall effect. For simplicity, we first consider two-dimensional models of antiferromagnets with two magnetic sublattices on a square lattice. We provide explicit examples of a Néel ordered ferrimagnet and a Dzyaloshinskii weak ferromagnet. Then antiferromagnet on the rutile lattice, that belongs to the class of weak ferromagnets, is studied. We analyze Dzyaloshinskii's invariants for the existence of spontaneous magnetization in these Néel ordered systems. Microscopic calculations of the Berry curvature for the studied systems confirm the validity of these Dzyaloshinskii's invariants. It is shown that the anomalous Hall effect mechanism in these antiferromagnets arises either from the interplay of momentum-dependent exchange interaction of conducting fermions with the Néel order and the spin-orbit coupling. These physical processes originate from the broken symmetries that permit the Dzyaloshinskii's invariant in the system.

126

铌掺杂设计的范德华铁磁体 CrTe2 中的自旋动力学#

Spin Dynamics in the van der Waals Ferromagnet CrTe2 Engineered by Niobium Doping
📚 arXiv👤 Dhan Raj Lawati, Prem Bahadur Karki, Jitender Kumar, Karishma Prasad, Mohamed A. Elekhtiar, Kai Huang, Bibek Tiwari, Suvechhya Lamichhane, Rupak Timalsina, Zane Hubble, John Watt, Sy-Hwang Liou, Evgeny Y. Tsymbal, Jian Wang, Kapildeb Ambal, Abdelghani Laraoui📅 2026-01-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作通过Nb掺杂实现了二维铁磁体CrTe₂自旋动力学的宽范围调控，将铁磁共振频率从40 GHz降至几GHz，同时保持室温铁磁性，为宽带磁子学及量子磁子学器件提供了可调的范德华材料平台。
arXiv:2512.22058v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：理解和控制二维 (2D) 范德华 (vdW) 铁磁体中的自旋动力学对于其在磁子学和混合量子平台中的应用至关重要。在这里，我们研究了 vdW 铁磁体 1T-CrTe₂ 的自旋动力学，并通过 Cr₁₋ₓNbₓTe₂(x=0-0.2) 中的铌 (Nb) 替代来证明其系统可调性。铁磁共振 (FMR) 光谱显示，Nb 掺杂能够将谐振频率从 40 GHz 宽带调谐到几 GHz，同时吉尔伯…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2512.22058v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：理解和控制二维 (2D) 范德华 (vdW) 铁磁体中的自旋动力学对于其在磁子学和混合量子平台中的应用至关重要。在这里，我们研究了 vdW 铁磁体 1T-CrTe₂ 的自旋动力学，并通过 Cr₁₋ₓNbₓTe₂(x=0-0.2) 中的铌 (Nb) 替代来证明其系统可调性。铁磁共振 (FMR) 光谱显示，Nb 掺杂能够将谐振频率从 40 GHz 宽带调谐到几 GHz，同时吉尔伯特阻尼常数从 ~0.066 适度增加到 ~0.14，同时保持强大的室温铁磁性。互补磁力测量显示，随着铌含量的增加，居里温度和饱和磁化强度同时降低。密度泛函理论计算将观察到的自旋动力学趋势归因于铌引起的磁各向异性和磁交换相互作用的改变。此外，CrTe₂ 薄片（约 100 nm 厚）表现出比块状晶体更低的共振频率，这与厚度相关的磁各向异性一致。这些结果将 Nb 掺杂 CrTe₂ 确立为具有可控自旋动力学的可调谐 vdW 铁磁体，将其功能从自旋电子学扩展到宽带磁子学和量子磁子学。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.22058v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Understanding and controlling spin dynamics in two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) ferromagnets is essential for their application in magnonics and hybrid quantum platforms. Here, we investigate the spin dynamics of the vdW ferromagnet 1T-CrTe₂ and demonstrate their systematic tunability via niobium (Nb) substitution in Cr₁₋ₓNbₓTe₂(x=0-0.2). Ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) spectroscopy reveals that Nb doping enables wide-band tuning of the resonance frequency from 40 GHz down to the few-GHz regime, accompanied by a moderate increase in the Gilbert damping constant from ~0.066 to ~0.14, while preserving robust room-temperature ferromagnetism. Complementary magnetometry shows a concurrent reduction of the Curie temperature and saturation magnetization with increasing Nb content. Density functional theory calculations attribute the observed spin-dynamic trends to Nb-induced modifications of magnetic anisotropy and magnetic exchange interactions. Furthermore, CrTe₂ flakes (~100nm thick) exhibit lower resonance frequencies than bulk crystals, consistent with thickness-dependent magnetic anisotropy. These results establish Nb-doped CrTe₂ as a tunable vdW ferromagnet with controllable spin dynamics, extending its functionality from spintronics to broadband magnonics and quantum magnonics.

五倍提升 SOT 效率与破坏反演对称性的无场磁化切换的协同作用：走向神经形态计算#

Synergy of fivefold boost SOT efficiency and field-free magnetization switching with broken inversion symmetry: Toward neuromorphic computing
📚 arXiv👤 Badsha Sekh, Hasibur Rahaman, Subhakanta Das, Mitali, Ramu Maddu, Kesavan Jawahar, S. N. Piramanayagam📅 2026-01-26⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作通过在Pt SOT层中集成超薄RuO₂（0.5 nm），将阻尼类SOT效率提升5.2倍，并借助Rashba效应与内置界面场实现无场垂直磁化切换，临界翻转电流密度降低3倍。协同增强的SOT与界面磁
arXiv:2601.16222v1 发布类型：新 摘要：利用自旋轨道扭矩 (SOT) 的非易失性神经形态计算 (NC) 元件提供了一种可行的解决方案，以缓解当代计算系统中的内存墙瓶颈。然而，低SOT效率和垂直磁化切换需要平面对称破断场这两个挑战极大地限制了其实际实施。在这项工作中，通过在我们的材料堆栈中集成薄氧化钌 (RuO2) 层，实现了铂 (Pt) SOT 层的增强 SOT 效率和无场垂直磁化切换。通过磁滞回线位移测量确定，与纯…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.16222v1 发布类型：新 摘要：利用自旋轨道扭矩 (SOT) 的非易失性神经形态计算 (NC) 元件提供了一种可行的解决方案，以缓解当代计算系统中的内存墙瓶颈。然而，低SOT效率和垂直磁化切换需要平面对称破断场这两个挑战极大地限制了其实际实施。在这项工作中，通过在我们的材料堆栈中集成薄氧化钌 (RuO2) 层，实现了铂 (Pt) SOT 层的增强 SOT 效率和无场垂直磁化切换。通过磁滞回线位移测量确定，与纯 SOT 层 (Pt) 相比，最佳 RuO2 厚度 (0.5 nm) 使阻尼类 (DL) SOT 效率提高了 5.2 倍，且电阻率相对较低 (90 微欧姆-厘米)。此外，与参考样品相比，我们实现了临界磁化翻转电流密度降低了 3 倍。我们的实验结果还证明，在存在新兴的内置界面场的情况下，Rashba 会引起大量的无场磁化翻转。值得注意的是，可靠的多电阻突触状态是通过调整增强的 SOT 和界面磁性的协同效应来实现的。通过实施人工神经网络进一步评估了突触状态的功能，并在 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 数据集上分别实现了约 95% 和 87% 的图像识别准确率。这项系统研究为实际 NC 应用的节能、无场 SOT 突触铺平了道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.16222v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Non-volatile Neuromorphic Computing (NC) elements utilizing Spin Orbit Torque (SOT) provide a viable solution to alleviate the memory wall bottleneck in contemporary computing systems. However, the two challenges, low SOT efficiency and the need for in plane symmetry breaking field for perpendicular magnetization switching, greatly limit its practical implementation. In this work, the enhanced SOT efficiency of Platinum (Pt) SOT layer and field free perpendicular magnetization switching are achieved by integrating thin Ruthenium Oxide (RuO2) layer in our material stack. The optimal RuO2 thickness (0.5 nm) enhances 5.2 times Damping Like (DL) SOT efficiency compared with pure SOT layer (Pt), as determined by hysteresis loop shift measurements, with a relatively low resistivity (90 micro-Ohm-cm). Moreover, we achieve 3 times reduction of critical magnetization switching current density compared to reference sample. Our experimental findings also demonstrate Rashba-induced substantial field-free magnetization switching in the presence of an emergent built-in interfacial field. Notably, reliable multi resistance synaptic states are achieved by tailoring the synergistic effects of enhanced SOT and interfacial magnetism. The functionality of synaptic states has been further evaluated by implementing an artificial neural network and achieved image recognition accuracies of approximately 95% and 87% on the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets, respectively. This systematic study paves the way to energy-efficient, field-free SOT synapses for practical NC applications.

130

EuZn₂Sb₂单晶薄膜的磁结构#

Magnetic structure of EuZn₂Sb₂ single-crystal thin-film
📚 arXiv👤 Yu Wei Soh, Hsiang Lee, Eugen Weschke, Shinichi Nishihaya, Mikhael T. Sayat, Masaki Uchida, Jian-Rui Soh📅 2026-01-26⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在EuZn₂Sb₂单晶薄膜中实现了铁磁与反铁磁序的层状空间分离，表面铁磁层为外尔半金属，下层反铁磁层为拓扑晶体绝缘体，为构筑磁性拓扑异质结构及拓扑量子器件提供了新平台。
arXiv:2601.16365v1 发布类型：新 摘要：磁性拓扑材料是一类可以容纳受磁序控制的无质量电子的化合物。其中一种化合物是 EuZn₂Sb₂，由于 Eu 磁性和电荷载流子之间的强烈相互作用，它最近引起了人们的兴趣。然而，取决于铕子晶格的基态磁性配置的电子能带结构的拓扑尚未确定。基于我们的ab-initio计算，我们发现面内和面外A型反铁磁（AFM）序分别生成拓扑晶体绝缘体和狄拉克半金属，而铁磁（FM）序则稳定Weyl半金属。…

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.16365v1 发布类型：新 摘要：磁性拓扑材料是一类可以容纳受磁序控制的无质量电子的化合物。其中一种化合物是 EuZn₂Sb₂，由于 Eu 磁性和电荷载流子之间的强烈相互作用，它最近引起了人们的兴趣。然而，取决于铕子晶格的基态磁性配置的电子能带结构的拓扑尚未确定。基于我们的ab-initio计算，我们发现面内和面外A型反铁磁（AFM）序分别生成拓扑晶体绝缘体和狄拉克半金属，而铁磁（FM）序则稳定Weyl半金属。我们对单晶薄膜 EuZn₂Sb₂ 的共振 X 射线弹性散射测量揭示了 textitQ=(0,0,frac12) 处的尖锐磁峰和低于 TN=12.9,K 的宽 textitQ=(0,0,1)，分别与 A 型 AFM 和 FM 阶数相关。我们的测量表明，FM 和 AFM 层沿晶体 c 轴在空间上分离，前者仅限于顶部三个原子层。我们提出 EuZn₂Sb₂ 在表面 FM 层中表现为 Weyl 半金属，在较低的 AFM 层中表现为拓扑晶体绝缘体。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.16365v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic topological materials are a class of compounds which can host massless electrons controlled by the magnetic order. One such compound is EuZn₂Sb₂, which has recently garnered interest due to its strong interplay between the Eu magnetism and charge carriers. However the topology of the electronic band structure, which depends on the ground state magnetic configuration of the europium sublattice, has not been determined. Based on our ab-initio calculations, we find that an in-plane and out-of-plane A-type antiferromagnetic (AFM) order generates a topological crystalline insulator and Dirac semimetal respectively, whereas a ferromagnetic (FM) order stabilizes a Weyl semimetal. Our resonant x-ray elastic scattering measurements of single-crystal thin film EuZn₂Sb₂ reveal both a sharp magnetic peak at textitQ=(0,0,frac12) and broad textitQ=(0,0,1) below TN=12.9,K, which is associated with an A-type AFM and FM order, respectively. Our measurements indicate that the FM and AFM layers are spatially separated along the crystal c axis, with the former limited to the top three atomic layers. We propose that EuZn₂Sb₂ behaves as a Weyl semimetal in the surface FM layers, and as a topological crystalline insulator in the lower AFM layers.

131

Fe₃O₄（磁铁矿）、MnFe₂O₄（雅各布石）和混合锰锌铁氧体中电子、磁子和声子的能量本征态#

Energy Eigenstates of Electrons, Magnons and Phonons in Fe₃O₄ (magnetite), MnFe₂O₄ (jacobsite), and mixed Mn-Zn ferrites
