使用机器学习势准确测量水的热物理性质#

Accurate Thermophysical Properties of Water using Machine-Learned Potentials
📚 arXiv👤 Tobias Hilpert, Georg Kresse📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究以等变图神经网络MACE为核心创新，突破传统机器学习势精度不足的瓶颈，实现DFT级可靠的不确定性量化与热力学重加权；首次将等变机器学习势系统应用于水的热物理性质预测，为复杂凝聚相体系的精确模拟提
arXiv:2601.21103v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：由于底层系统的动态缓慢，从第一原理模拟水仍然是一个重大的计算挑战。尽管机器学习的原子间势（MLP）可以加速这些模拟，但它们通常无法达到可靠的不确定性量化所需的精度水平。在本研究中，我们使用 MACE（一种等变图神经网络架构，已使用广泛的 RPBE-D3 数据库进行训练）来预测密度等压线、扩散常数、径向分布函数和熔点。尽管等变 MACE 模型在计算上比基于核势 (KbPs…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21103v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：由于底层系统的动态缓慢，从第一原理模拟水仍然是一个重大的计算挑战。尽管机器学习的原子间势（MLP）可以加速这些模拟，但它们通常无法达到可靠的不确定性量化所需的精度水平。在本研究中，我们使用 MACE（一种等变图神经网络架构，已使用广泛的 RPBE-D3 数据库进行训练）来预测密度等压线、扩散常数、径向分布函数和熔点。尽管等变 MACE 模型在计算上比基于核势 (KbPs) 等更简单的架构更昂贵，但它们的总能量误差显着降低，可以以最小的偏差实现可靠的热力学重新加权。我们的结果与之前使用 KbPs 进行的研究结果一致；然而，等变模型可以根据真实密度泛函理论 (DFT) 系综进行验证，从而提供了关键优势。这些发现将等变 MLP 确立为强大而可靠的工具，用于以 DFT 级精度研究水的热物理性质。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21103v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Simulating water from first principles remains a significant computational challenge due to the slow dynamics of the underlying system. Although machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLPs) can accelerate these simulations, they often fail to achieve the required level of accuracy for reliable uncertainty quantification. In this study, we use MACE - an equivariant graph neural network architecture that has been trained using an extensive RPBE-D3 database - to predict density isobars, diffusion constants, radial distribution functions, and melting points. Although equivariant MACE models are computationally more expensive than simpler architectures, such as kernel-based potentials (KbPs), their significantly lower total energy errors allow for reliable thermodynamic reweighting with minimal bias. Our results are consistent with those of previous studies using KbPs; however, equivariant models can be validated against the ground-truth density functional theory (DFT) ensemble, providing a critical advantage. These findings establish equivariant MLPs as robust and reliable tools for investigating the thermophysical properties of water with DFT-level accuracy.

09

平衡传播训练成功对网络架构的依赖#

Dependence of Equilibrium Propagation Training Success on Network Architecture
📚 arXiv👤 Qingshan Wang, Clara C. Wanjura, Florian Marquardt📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破了平衡传播训练仅适用于密集连接网络的理论局限，首次系统证明了局部连接晶格架构在XY模型上可达到与密集网络相当的性能，为受连接约束的物理神经形态硬件实现提供了关键架构设计依据。
arXiv:2601.21945v1 发布类型：交叉 摘要：人工智能的快速崛起导致能源消耗的不可持续增长。这推动了神经形态计算和基于物理的学习机训练的进步，作为数字神经网络的替代品。许多理论研究都集中在简单的架构，例如全对全或密集连接的分层网络。然而，这些通过实验实现可能具有挑战性，例如由于连接限制。在这项工作中，我们研究了广泛的基于物理的平衡传播训练方法的性能，以实现更现实的架构选择，特别是局部连接的晶格。我们训练 XY 模型并探索…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21945v1 发布类型：交叉 摘要：人工智能的快速崛起导致能源消耗的不可持续增长。这推动了神经形态计算和基于物理的学习机训练的进步，作为数字神经网络的替代品。许多理论研究都集中在简单的架构，例如全对全或密集连接的分层网络。然而，这些通过实验实现可能具有挑战性，例如由于连接限制。在这项工作中，我们研究了广泛的基于物理的平衡传播训练方法的性能，以实现更现实的架构选择，特别是局部连接的晶格。我们训练 XY 模型并探索架构对各种基准任务的影响，跟踪训练期间空间分布响应和耦合的演变。我们的结果表明，仅具有本地连接的稀疏网络可以实现与密集网络相当的性能。我们的研究结果为进一步扩展基于现实环境中的平衡传播的架构提供了指导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21945v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The rapid rise of artificial intelligence has led to an unsustainable growth in energy consumption. This has motivated progress in neuromorphic computing and physics-based training of learning machines as alternatives to digital neural networks. Many theoretical studies focus on simple architectures like all-to-all or densely connected layered networks. However, these may be challenging to realize experimentally, e.g. due to connectivity constraints. In this work, we investigate the performance of the widespread physics-based training method of equilibrium propagation for more realistic architectural choices, specifically, locally connected lattices. We train an XY model and explore the influence of architecture on various benchmark tasks, tracking the evolution of spatially distributed responses and couplings during training. Our results show that sparse networks with only local connections can achieve performance comparable to dense networks. Our findings provide guidelines for further scaling up architectures based on equilibrium propagation in realistic settings.

10

使用量子计算机设计量子技术#

Designing quantum technologies with a quantum computer
📚 arXiv👤 Juan Naranjo, Thi Ha Kyaw, Gaurav Saxena, Kevin Ferreira, Jack S. Baker📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究构建了首个面向固态自旋量子技术的量子计算机辅助设计框架，核心创新在于将格雷编码映射、量子位智能交换聚合与多参考选择量子Krylov快速转发（sQKFF）算法相结合，在NISQ及早期容错硬件上实现
arXiv:2601.22091v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：固体中相互作用的自旋系统支撑着广泛的量子技术，从量子传感器和单光子源到基于自旋缺陷的量子寄存器和处理器。我们开发了一个量子计算机辅助框架，使用通用电子自旋共振哈密顿量来模拟此类设备，其中包含零场分裂、塞曼效应、超精细相互作用、偶极子-偶极子自旋-自旋项和电子-声子退相干。在此模型中，我们结合了格雷编码的量子位到量子位映射、量子位智能交换聚合和多参考选择量子 Krylov…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.22091v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：固体中相互作用的自旋系统支撑着广泛的量子技术，从量子传感器和单光子源到基于自旋缺陷的量子寄存器和处理器。我们开发了一个量子计算机辅助框架，使用通用电子自旋共振哈密顿量来模拟此类设备，其中包含零场分裂、塞曼效应、超精细相互作用、偶极子-偶极子自旋-自旋项和电子-声子退相干。在此模型中，我们结合了格雷编码的量子位到量子位映射、量子位智能交换聚合和多参考选择量子 Krylov 快速转发 (sQKFF) 混合算法来访问长时间动态，同时保持与 NISQ 和早期容错硬件约束的兼容性。数值模拟演示了高达 sim100 ns 的自相关函数的计算，以及微波吸收光谱和 ell₁ 相干范数，与未优化的实现相比，Trotterized 时间演化电路的门数和电路深度减少了 18-30%。我们使用金刚石中的氮空位中心作为测试平台，根据经典模拟对框架进行基准测试，并将 sQKFF 中的参考状态选择确定为在固定硬件成本下控制精度的主要因素。该方法为使用量子计算机在实验现实条件下设计、比较和优化固态自旋量子位技术提供了灵活的蓝图。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22091v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Interacting spin systems in solids underpin a wide range of quantum technologies, from quantum sensors and single-photon sources to spin-defect-based quantum registers and processors. We develop a quantum-computer-aided framework for simulating such devices using a general electron spin resonance Hamiltonian incorporating zero-field splitting, the Zeeman effect, hyperfine interactions, dipole-dipole spin-spin terms, and electron-phonon decoherence. Within this model, we combine Gray-encoded qudit-to-qubit mappings, qubit-wise commuting aggregation, and a multi-reference selected quantum Krylov fast-forwarding (sQKFF) hybrid algorithm to access long-time dynamics while remaining compatible with NISQ and early fault-tolerant hardware constraints. Numerical simulations demonstrate the computation of autocorrelation functions up to sim100 ns, together with microwave absorption spectra and the ell₁₋ₙₒᵣₘ of coherence, achieving 18-30% reductions in gate counts and circuit depth for Trotterized time-evolution circuits compared to unoptimized implementations. Using the nitrogen vacancy center in diamond as a testbed, we benchmark the framework against classical simulations and identify the reference-state selection in sQKFF as the primary factor governing accuracy at fixed hardware cost. This methodology provides a flexible blueprint for using quantum computers to design, compare, and optimize solid-state spin-qubit technologies under experimentally realistic conditions.

11

非平衡主动噪声增强扩散模型中的生成记忆#

Non-equilibrium active noise enhances generative memory in diffusion models
📚 arXiv👤 Agnish Kumar Behera, Alexandra Lamtyugina, Aditya Nandy, Daiki Goto, Carlos Floyd, Suriyanarayanan Vaikuntanathan📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统扩散模型对白高斯噪声的依赖，引入非平衡主动噪声作为信息载体。核心创新在于利用非马尔可夫浴的时间相关性构建"生成记忆"，使高级语义信息在辅助自由度中持久存留，显著延缓信息衰减。这一机制促进
arXiv:2411.07233v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：生成扩散模型已成为对高维分布进行采样的强大工具，但它们通常依赖于白高斯噪声和噪声表来破坏和重建信息。在这里，我们证明，使用主动的、时间相关的噪声源使生成过程失去平衡，从根本上改变了系统的信息热力学。我们表明，将数据耦合到活跃的非马尔可夫浴会产生“记忆效应”，其中高级语义信息（例如类同一性或分子亚稳定性）存储在辅助自由度的时间相关性中。使用费希尔信息分析，…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2411.07233v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：生成扩散模型已成为对高维分布进行采样的强大工具，但它们通常依赖于白高斯噪声和噪声表来破坏和重建信息。在这里，我们证明，使用主动的、时间相关的噪声源使生成过程失去平衡，从根本上改变了系统的信息热力学。我们表明，将数据耦合到活跃的非马尔可夫浴会产生“记忆效应”，其中高级语义信息（例如类同一性或分子亚稳定性）存储在辅助自由度的时间相关性中。使用费希尔信息分析，我们证明与被动布朗运动相比，这种主动机制显着减缓了信息衰减的速度。至关重要的是，这种记忆效应有助于在反向生成过程中更早、更鲁棒地对称性破缺（形态形成），从而使系统能够解析多尺度结构，让人想起在典型的噪声过程中被冲掉的分子构型中的亚稳态。我们的结果表明，受活性物质物理学启发的非平衡协议为利用生成扩散恢复高维能量景观提供了一条热力学上独特且潜在有利的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2411.07233v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Generative diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for sampling high-dimensional distributions, yet they typically rely on white gaussian noise and noise schedules to destroy and reconstruct information. Here, we demonstrate that driving the generative process out of equilibrium using active, temporally correlated noise sources fundamentally alters the information thermodynamics of the system. We show that coupling the data to an active non-Markovian bath creates a `memory effect' where high-level semantic information (such as class identity or molecular metastability) is stored in the temporal correlations of auxiliary degrees of freedom. Using Fisher information analysis, we prove that this active mechanism significantly retards the rate of information decay compared to passive Brownian motion. Crucially, this memory effect facilitates an earlier and more robust symmetry breaking (speciation) during the reverse generative process, allowing the system to resolve multi-scale structures, reminiscent of metastable states in molecular configurations that are washed out in the typical noising processes. Our results suggest that non-equilibrium protocols, inspired by active matter physics, offer a thermodynamically distinct and potentially advantageous pathway for recovering high-dimensional energy landscapes using generative diffusion.

12

大宽度限制下具有张量权重和涌现费米威克规则的神经网络#

The neural networks with tensor weights and emergent fermionic Wick rules in the large-width limit
📚 arXiv👤 Guojun Huang, Kai Zhou📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作在神经网络量子场论（NN-QFT）框架中，将复值神经网络的末层权重从标量推广为Clifford代数张量，首次在大宽度极限下导出矩阵值输出及涌现的费米型Wick规则，以行列式形式刻画关联函数。这一
arXiv:2507.05303v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：在本文中，我们在神经网络量子场论 (NN-QFT) 框架内研究具有张量值隐藏到输出权重的复值神经网络 (CVNN)。对于具有标量权重的标准 CVNN，我们推导生成函数并识别在无限宽度限制中出现的精确高斯过程及其相关的有效量子态。当最后一层权重提升为 Clifford 代数值张量时，网络输出变为复矩阵值，并且在网络输出的大宽度相关函数中引入类似费米子的符号…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2507.05303v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：在本文中，我们在神经网络量子场论 (NN-QFT) 框架内研究具有张量值隐藏到输出权重的复值神经网络 (CVNN)。对于具有标量权重的标准 CVNN，我们推导生成函数并识别在无限宽度限制中出现的精确高斯过程及其相关的有效量子态。当最后一层权重提升为 Clifford 代数值张量时，网络输出变为复矩阵值，并且在网络输出的大宽度相关函数中引入类似费米子的符号结构。我们证明，在无限宽度限制下，具有相同数量的 fdag 和 f 的相关器遵循费米威克规则，并且可以写成从标量欧几里得核 S(x,y)=łangle fdag(x)f(y)ångle 构建的行列式。这提供了欧几里得相关器和费曼规则级别的 NN-QFT 的符号结构扩展，即使尚未构建网络参数的微观格拉斯曼路径积分表示。因此，我们的分析将 NN-QFT 对应推向了纯玻色高斯场之外，并提出了一种在 QFT 对应的神经架构中编码类费米子对称性的可能途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.05303v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In this paper, we study complex-valued neural network (CVNNs) with tensor-valued hidden-to-output weights within the framework of neural-network quantum field theory (NN-QFT). For standard CVNNs with scalar weights, we derive the generating functional and identify the exact Gaussian process that arises in the infinite-width limit, together with its associated effective quantum state. When the last-layer weights are promoted to Clifford-algebra-valued tensors, the network output becomes complex matrix-valued, and a fermion-like sign structure in the large-width correlation functions of the network output is induced. We show that, in the infinite-width limit, correlators with equal numbers of fdag and f obey fermionic Wick rules and can be written as determinants built from a scalar Euclidean kernel S(x,y)=łangle fdag(x)f(y)ångle. This provides a sign-structured extension of NN-QFT at the level of Euclidean correlators and Feynman rules, even though a microscopic Grassmann path integral representation for the network parameters has not yet been constructed. Our analysis thus pushes the NN-QFT correspondence beyond purely bosonic Gaussian fields and suggests a possible route to encoding fermion-like symmetries in neural architectures for QFT correspondence.

13

量子化学中神经网络量子态的确定性框架#

A Deterministic Framework for Neural Network Quantum States in Quantum Chemistry
📚 arXiv👤 Zheng Che📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作针对神经网络量子态在Fock空间随机优化中的采样噪声与混合缓慢问题，构建了确定性优化框架，以自适应子空间替代蒙特卡罗采样，结合二阶微扰修正实现次线性缩放，为强关联体系的高精度电子结构计算提供了稳
arXiv:2601.21310v1 公告类型：新 摘要：离散 Fock 空间中神经网络量子态 (NQS) 的随机优化受到采样方差和缓慢混合的限制。我们提出了一个确定性框架，可以在动态自适应配置子空间内优化神经回流模拟，并通过二阶微扰理论进行校正。这种方法消除了蒙特卡罗噪声，并通过混合 CPU-GPU 实现，展示了相对于子空间大小的次线性缩放。 H2O 和 N2 中的键解离基准以及强相关的铬二聚体 Cr2 验证了该方法在大希尔伯特空间…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21310v1 公告类型：新 摘要：离散 Fock 空间中神经网络量子态 (NQS) 的随机优化受到采样方差和缓慢混合的限制。我们提出了一个确定性框架，可以在动态自适应配置子空间内优化神经回流模拟，并通过二阶微扰理论进行校正。这种方法消除了蒙特卡罗噪声，并通过混合 CPU-GPU 实现，展示了相对于子空间大小的次线性缩放。 H2O 和 N2 中的键解离基准以及强相关的铬二聚体 Cr2 验证了该方法在大希尔伯特空间中的准确性和稳定性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21310v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Stochastic optimization of Neural Network Quantum States (NQS) in discrete Fock spaces is limited by sampling variance and slow mixing. We present a deterministic framework that optimizes a neural backflow ansatz within dynamically adaptive configuration subspaces, corrected by second-order perturbation theory. This approach eliminates Monte Carlo noise and, through a hybrid CPU-GPU implementation, exhibits sub-linear scaling with respect to subspace size. Benchmarks on bond dissociation in H2O and N2, and the strongly correlated chromium dimer Cr2, validate the method's accuracy and stability in large Hilbert spaces.

14

基于 PINN 的 2010 年日本丰后海峡慢滑事件期间断层滑动演化的短期预测#

PINN-based short-term forecasting of fault slip evolution during the 2010 slow slip event in the Bungo Channel, Japan
📚 arXiv👤 Masayuki Kano, Rikuto Fukushima📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将物理信息神经网络（PINN）与空间非均匀摩擦模型结合，实现了仅利用早期滑动加速度数据即可稳定预测慢滑移演化，克服了传统均匀摩擦模型导致的不稳定快滑问题，为地震短临预测和灾害评估提供了新
arXiv:2601.21516v1 发布类型：新 摘要：监测和预测断层滑移演化对于了解地震周期和评估未来地震灾害至关重要。本研究提出了一种基于物理的数据同化框架，将大地测量观测与断层力学相结合，引入摩擦特性的空间异质性，特别关注短期断层滑动预测。所提出的方法采用物理信息神经网络（PINN）来计算断层滑动演化并优化摩擦特性的空间分布，并通过改变要同化的数据周期应用于2010年日本西南部丰后海峡下方的慢滑动事件。当仅同化滑移加速度的初始…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21516v1 发布类型：新 摘要：监测和预测断层滑移演化对于了解地震周期和评估未来地震灾害至关重要。本研究提出了一种基于物理的数据同化框架，将大地测量观测与断层力学相结合，引入摩擦特性的空间异质性，特别关注短期断层滑动预测。所提出的方法采用物理信息神经网络（PINN）来计算断层滑动演化并优化摩擦特性的空间分布，并通过改变要同化的数据周期应用于2010年日本西南部丰后海峡下方的慢滑动事件。当仅同化滑移加速度的初始阶段时，推断西南四国下方存在速度减弱摩擦区域，对应于慢滑移事件的初始成核区域。结果表明，即使仅同化滑动加速度数据，基于 PINN 的数据同化框架也能成功预测慢瞬态滑动，而基于摩擦均匀模型的预测会导致不稳定的快速滑动。这种差异可以解释为引入摩擦异质性的结果，这使得滑移区域的特征尺寸和临界成核尺寸都是可变的，从而导致与观察结果一致的稳定滑移演化。当同化较长的观测周期时，在滑移减弱斑块周围会出现速度增强区域，逐渐限制滑移传播的方向。该速度加强区域被解释为由断层物理学施加的机械约束，连接再现观测到的大地测量时间序列所需的滑移区域。结果突出了基于 PINN 的数据同化结合大地测量和断层力学的能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21516v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Monitoring and forecasting fault slip evolution are fundamental for understanding earthquake cycles and assessing future seismic hazards. This study proposes a physics-based data assimilation framework that integrates geodetic observations with fault mechanics introducing spatial heterogeneity in frictional properties, with a particular focus on short-term fault slip forecasting. The proposed method employs physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) to calculate fault slip evolutions and to optimize the spatial distribution of frictional properties and is applied to the 2010 slow slip event beneath the Bungo Channel, southwest Japan, by changing the data period to be assimilated. When only the initial phase of slip acceleration is assimilated, a velocity-weakening frictional region is inferred beneath southwest Shikoku, corresponding to the initial nucleation are of the slow slip event. Out results demonstrate that the PINN-based data assimilation framework successfully forecasts slow transient slip even when only slip acceleration data are assimilated, whereas forecasts based on frictionally homogeneous models result in unstable fast slip. This difference can be interpreted as a consequence of introducing frictional heterogeneity, which allows both the characteristic size of the slipping region and the critical nucleation size to be variable, leading to stable slip evolution consistent with observations. When longer observation periods are assimilated, a velocity-strengthening region emerges around the slip-weakening patch, progressively restricting the direction of slip propagation. This velocity-strengthening region is interpreted as a mechanical constraint imposed by fault physics, linking the slip regions required to reproduce the observed geodetic time series. The results highlight the capability of PINN-based data assimilation incorporating geodetic observations and fault mechanics.

15

最少开关的表面跳跃，结合深度学习潜力和长短期记忆网络传播器，用于模拟真实的光化学过程#

Fewest-Switches Surface Hopping with Combined Deep Learning Potential and Long Short-Term Memory Network Propagator for Simulating Realistic Photochemical Processes
📚 arXiv👤 Zhenxing Zhu, Diandong Tang, Lin Shen, Wei-Hai Fang📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将长短期记忆网络与等变神经网络结合，重构了最少开关表面跳跃方法，以极少参考轨迹实现高维真实分子体系的高效光化学动力学模拟，为复杂光化学反应的规模化计算提供了新途径。
arXiv:2601.21703v1 公告类型：新 摘要：最少开关表面跳跃（FSSH）是模拟分子系统光化学过程最流行的方法。最近，我们构建了长短期记忆（LSTM）网络作为 FSSH 动力学模拟中电子子系统的传播器。 Tully 的三个模型的集体结果得到了令人满意的再现。在目前的工作中，我们开发了一个扩展的 LSTM-FSSH 框架来模拟真实的光化学反应。 LSTM的输入特征以及训练过程被重新设计，以有效地表示高维核自由度。等变神经网络…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21703v1 公告类型：新 摘要：最少开关表面跳跃（FSSH）是模拟分子系统光化学过程最流行的方法。最近，我们构建了长短期记忆（LSTM）网络作为 FSSH 动力学模拟中电子子系统的传播器。 Tully 的三个模型的集体结果得到了令人满意的再现。在目前的工作中，我们开发了一个扩展的 LSTM-FSSH 框架来模拟真实的光化学反应。 LSTM的输入特征以及训练过程被重新设计，以有效地表示高维核自由度。等变神经网络与 LSTM 集成，构建基态和激发态的绝热势能面。模拟了 CH₂NH 和偶氮苯的光异构化，表明与作为参考的传统 FSSH 模拟相比，我们新提出的 LSTM-FSSH 方法可以准确地产生激发态寿命和产物产率。训练 LSTM 网络只需要 10 个参考轨迹，然后可以通过非常有效的 LSTM-FSSH 动力学模拟生成轨迹集合，以获得集体结果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21703v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fewest-switches surface hopping (FSSH) is the most popular method for simulating photochemical processes of molecular systems. Recently, we have constructed long short-term memory (LSTM) networks as a propagator for electronic subsystems in FSSH dynamics simulations. The collective results on Tully's three models have been reproduced satisfactorily. In the present work, we develop an extended LSTM-FSSH framework to simulate realistic photochemical reactions. The input features of LSTM as well as the training procedure are redesigned to represent high-dimensional nuclear degrees of freedom in an effective way. Equivariant neural networks are integrated with LSTM to build adiabatic potential energy surfaces in ground and excited states. Photoisomerizations of CH₂NH and azobenzene are simulated, showing that our new proposed LSTM-FSSH method can produce excited-state lifetimes and product yields accurately in comparison with conventional FSSH simulations as reference. Only 10 reference trajectories are required for training LSTM networks, and then a trajectory ensemble can be generated with very efficient LSTM-FSSH dynamics simulations to obtain collective results.

通过稀疏流现场观测快速估计全球海面温度#

Rapid estimation of global sea surface temperatures from sparse streaming in situ observations
📚 arXiv👤 Cassidy All, Kevin Ho, Maya Magnuski, Christopher Nicolaides, Louisa B. Ebby, Mohammad Farazmand📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出稀疏离散经验插值法（S-DEIM），将经验插值与循环神经网络相结合，仅利用0.2%稀疏原位观测即可重建高分辨率全球海面温度场，较传统方法精度提升约40%，为天气预报与气候预测提供了高效的无模型
arXiv:2601.21913v1 公告类型：新 摘要：根据交错的海表温度 (SST) 测量结果重建高分辨率海表温度 (SST) 对于天气预报和气候预测至关重要。然而，当海表温度测量稀疏时，所推断的海表温度场相当不准确。在这里，我们展示了稀疏离散经验插值法（S-DEIM）在不使用模型的情况下根据稀疏原位观测重建高分辨率海表温度场的能力。 S-DEIM 估计由两项组成，一项是使用经验插值根据瞬时原位观测计算得出的，另一项是使用循环神经…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21913v1 公告类型：新 摘要：根据交错的海表温度 (SST) 测量结果重建高分辨率海表温度 (SST) 对于天气预报和气候预测至关重要。然而，当海表温度测量稀疏时，所推断的海表温度场相当不准确。在这里，我们展示了稀疏离散经验插值法（S-DEIM）在不使用模型的情况下根据稀疏原位观测重建高分辨率海表温度场的能力。 S-DEIM 估计由两项组成，一项是使用经验插值根据瞬时原位观测计算得出的，另一项是使用循环神经网络 (RNN) 从历史时间序列观测中学习的。我们使用美国国家海洋和大气管理局 1989-2021 年每周高分辨率海表温度数据集（构成训练数据）来训练 RNN。随后，我们检查了S-DEIM在2022年1月至2023年1月的测试数据上的性能。对于该测试数据，S-DEIM从100个原位观测中推断出高分辨率海表温度，仅占高分辨率空间网格的0.2%。我们表明，所得到的 S-DEIM 重建比早期的经验插值方法（例如 DEIM 和 Q-DEIM）准确率高出约 40%。此外，91% 的 S-DEIM 估计值落在真实 SST 的 ± 1ⁱ̧rcC 范围内。我们还证明了 S-DEIM 在传感器放置方面具有鲁棒性：即使传感器随机分布，S-DEIM 重建误差也仅恶化 1-2%。 S-DEIM 的计算效率也很高。训练 RNN 仅离线执行一次，大约需要一分钟。训练完成后，S-DEIM 重建的计算时间不到一秒。因此，S-DEIM 可用于根据稀疏流观测数据实时快速重建海表温度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21913v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reconstructing high-resolution sea surface temperatures (SST) from staggered SST measurements is essential for weather forecasting and climate projections. However, when SST measurements are sparse, the resulting inferred SST fields are rather inaccurate. Here, we demonstrate the ability of Sparse Discrete Empirical Interpolation Method (S-DEIM) to reconstruct the high-resolution SST field from sparse in situ observations, without using a model. The S-DEIM estimate consists of two terms, one computed from instantaneous in situ observations using empirical interpolation, and the other learned from the historical time series of observations using recurrent neural networks (RNNs). We train the RNNs using the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration's weekly high-resolution SST dataset spanning the years 1989-2021 which constitutes the training data. Subsequently, we examine the performance of S-DEIM on the test data, comprising January 2022 to January 2023. For this test data, S-DEIM infers the high-resolution SST from 100 in situ observations, constituting only 0.2% of the high-resolution spatial grid. We show that the resulting S-DEIM reconstructions are about 40% more accurate than earlier empirical interpolation methods, such as DEIM and Q-DEIM. Furthermore, 91% of S-DEIM estimates fall within ± 1ⁱ̧rcC of the true SST. We also demonstrate that S-DEIM is robust with respect to sensor placement: even when the sensors are distributed randomly, S-DEIM reconstruction error deteriorates only by 1-2%. S-DEIM is also computationally efficient. Training the RNN, which is performed only once offline, takes approximately one minute. Once trained, the S-DEIM reconstructions are computed in less than a second. As such, S-DEIM can be used for rapid SST reconstruction from sparse streaming observational data in real time.

17

作为物理替代模型的条件去噪模型#

Conditional Denoising Model as a Physical Surrogate Model
📚 arXiv👤 José Afonso, Pedro Viegas, Rodrigo Ventura, Vasco Guerra📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：条件去噪模型（CDM）跳出"软约束损失+后处理"的常规范式，转而学习物理流形的几何结构，将推理转化为向平衡流形的确定性定点投影。该模型以生成式去噪作为隐式正则化，无需显式嵌入控制方程即可实现更强的物理
arXiv:2601.21021v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：复杂物理系统的代理建模通常面临数据拟合准确性和物理一致性之间的权衡。物理一致的方法通常将物理定律视为损失函数内的软约束，这种策略经常无法保证严格遵守控制方程，或者依赖于本质上不学习底层解几何的后处理校正。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了条件去噪模型（CDM），这是一种旨在学习物理流形本身的几何形状的生成模型。通过训练网络从噪声状态恢复干净状态，模型学习一个连续指向有效解子空间的向…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21021v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：复杂物理系统的代理建模通常面临数据拟合准确性和物理一致性之间的权衡。物理一致的方法通常将物理定律视为损失函数内的软约束，这种策略经常无法保证严格遵守控制方程，或者依赖于本质上不学习底层解几何的后处理校正。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了条件去噪模型（CDM），这是一种旨在学习物理流形本身的几何形状的生成模型。通过训练网络从噪声状态恢复干净状态，模型学习一个连续指向有效解子空间的向量场。我们引入了一种与时间无关的公式，将推理转换为确定性的定点迭代，有效地将噪声近似投影到平衡流形上。经过低温等离子体物理和化学基准验证，CDM 实现了比物理一致基准更高的参数和数据效率。至关重要的是，我们证明了去噪目标充当了强大的隐式正则化器：尽管在训练期间从未看到控制方程，但该模型比使用显式物理损失训练的基线更严格地遵守物理约束。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21021v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Surrogate modeling for complex physical systems typically faces a trade-off between data-fitting accuracy and physical consistency. Physics-consistent approaches typically treat physical laws as soft constraints within the loss function, a strategy that frequently fails to guarantee strict adherence to the governing equations, or rely on post-processing corrections that do not intrinsically learn the underlying solution geometry. To address these limitations, we introduce the Conditional Denoising Model (CDM), a generative model designed to learn the geometry of the physical manifold itself. By training the network to restore clean states from noisy ones, the model learns a vector field that points continuously towards the valid solution subspace. We introduce a time-independent formulation that transforms inference into a deterministic fixed-point iteration, effectively projecting noisy approximations onto the equilibrium manifold. Validated on a low-temperature plasma physics and chemistry benchmark, the CDM achieves higher parameter and data efficiency than physics-consistent baselines. Crucially, we demonstrate that the denoising objective acts as a powerful implicit regularizer: despite never seeing the governing equations during training, the model adheres to physical constraints more strictly than baselines trained with explicit physics losses.

18

LLM4Fluid：大型语言模型作为流体动力学的通用神经求解器#

LLM4Fluid: Large Language Models as Generalizable Neural Solvers for Fluid Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Qisong Xiao, Xinhai Chen, Qinglin Wang, Xiaowei Guo, Binglin Wang, Weifeng Chen, Zhichao Wang, Yunfei Liu, Rui Xia, Hang Zou, Gencheng Liu, Shuai Li, Jie Liu📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：LLM4Fluid首次将预训练大语言模型转化为流体动力学的通用神经求解器，核心创新在于物理信息解缠的降阶建模与模态对齐策略，使LLM能直接处理物理序列。该方法突破了传统深度学习在新流动条件下泛化差、需
arXiv:2601.21681v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：深度学习已成为流体动力学时空建模的一种有前途的范例。然而，现有方法通常对看不见的流动条件的泛化能力有限，并且在应用于新场景时通常需要重新训练。在本文中，我们提出了 LLM4Fluid，这是一种时空预测框架，它利用大型语言模型（LLM）作为流体动力学的通用神经求解器。该框架首先通过物理信息解缠机制增强的降阶建模将高维流场压缩到紧凑的潜在空间中，有效减轻空间特征纠缠，同时保…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.21681v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：深度学习已成为流体动力学时空建模的一种有前途的范例。然而，现有方法通常对看不见的流动条件的泛化能力有限，并且在应用于新场景时通常需要重新训练。在本文中，我们提出了 LLM4Fluid，这是一种时空预测框架，它利用大型语言模型（LLM）作为流体动力学的通用神经求解器。该框架首先通过物理信息解缠机制增强的降阶建模将高维流场压缩到紧凑的潜在空间中，有效减轻空间特征纠缠，同时保留基本的流结构。然后，经过预训练的 LLM 充当时间处理器，根据时间序列提示自动回归预测物理序列的动态。为了弥合提示和物理序列之间的模态差距（否则可能会降低预测准确性），我们提出了一种专用的模态对齐策略，可以解决表征不匹配并稳定长期预测。跨不同流场景的大量实验表明，LLM4Fluid 可以作为强大且可泛化的神经解算器，无需重新训练，实现最先进的精度，同时展示强大的零样本和上下文学习功能。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/qisongxiao/LLM4Fluid 上公开获取。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.21681v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep learning has emerged as a promising paradigm for spatio-temporal modeling of fluid dynamics. However, existing approaches often suffer from limited generalization to unseen flow conditions and typically require retraining when applied to new scenarios. In this paper, we present LLM4Fluid, a spatio-temporal prediction framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) as generalizable neural solvers for fluid dynamics. The framework first compresses high-dimensional flow fields into a compact latent space via reduced-order modeling enhanced with a physics-informed disentanglement mechanism, effectively mitigating spatial feature entanglement while preserving essential flow structures. A pretrained LLM then serves as a temporal processor, autoregressively predicting the dynamics of physical sequences with time series prompts. To bridge the modality gap between prompts and physical sequences, which can otherwise degrade prediction accuracy, we propose a dedicated modality alignment strategy that resolves representational mismatch and stabilizes long-term prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse flow scenarios demonstrate that LLM4Fluid functions as a robust and generalizable neural solver without retraining, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy while exhibiting powerful zero-shot and in-context learning capabilities. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/qisongxiao/LLM4Fluid.

19

在合成湍流环境中利用多 UAS 群观测重建四维大气风场的物理信息#

Physics Informed Reconstruction of Four-Dimensional Atmospheric Wind Fields Using Multi-UAS Swarm Observations in a Synthetic Turbulent Environment
📚 arXiv👤 Abdullah Tasim, Wei Sun📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究核心创新在于将Bi-LSTM局部风估计与物理信息神经网络(PINN)相融合，实现多无人机群协同观测下的四维大气风场重建。其意义在于突破传统观测的时空间隙限制，为低空边界层风场监测、风电功率预测及
arXiv:2601.22111v1 发布类型：cross 摘要：准确重建大气风场对于天气预报、灾害预测和风能评估等应用至关重要，但传统仪器在低层大气边界层内留下了时空间隙。无人机系统 (UAS) 提供灵活的现场测量，但各个平台仅沿其飞行轨迹采样风，限制了完整的风场恢复。这项研究提出了一个利用协调无人机群获得的测量数据重建四维大气风场的框架。使用合成湍流环境和高保真多旋翼模拟来生成训练和评估数据。使用双向长短期记忆网络 (Bi-LST…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.22111v1 发布类型：cross 摘要：准确重建大气风场对于天气预报、灾害预测和风能评估等应用至关重要，但传统仪器在低层大气边界层内留下了时空间隙。无人机系统 (UAS) 提供灵活的现场测量，但各个平台仅沿其飞行轨迹采样风，限制了完整的风场恢复。这项研究提出了一个利用协调无人机群获得的测量数据重建四维大气风场的框架。使用合成湍流环境和高保真多旋翼模拟来生成训练和评估数据。使用双向长短期记忆网络 (Bi-LSTM) 根据 UAS 动力学估计局部风分量，并将其同化到物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 中，以重建空间和时间上的连续风场。对于本地风估计，双向 LSTM 在低风条件下北向和东向分量的均方根误差 (RMSE) 分别为 0.064 和 0.062 m/s，在中风条件下增加到 0.122 到 0.129 m/s，在强风条件下增加到 0.271 到 0.273 m/s，而垂直分量表现出更高的误差，RMSE 值为 0.029至 0.091 m/s。物理信息重建可恢复 1000 米高度范围内风场的主要空间和时间结构，同时保留平均流向和垂直切变。在中等风力条件下，重建的平均风场在评估的 UAS 配置中实现了 0.118 至 0.154 m/s 之间的总体 RMSE，其中使用五个 UAS 群获得的误差最低。这些结果表明，协调的 UAS 测量可以实现准确且可扩展的四维风场重建，而无需专用的风传感器或固定基础设施。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.22111v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate reconstruction of atmospheric wind fields is essential for applications such as weather forecasting, hazard prediction, and wind energy assessment, yet conventional instruments leave spatio-temporal gaps within the lower atmospheric boundary layer. Unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) provide flexible in situ measurements, but individual platforms sample wind only along their flight trajectories, limiting full wind-field recovery. This study presents a framework for reconstructing four-dimensional atmospheric wind fields using measurements obtained from a coordinated UAS swarm. A synthetic turbulence environment and high-fidelity multirotor simulation are used to generate training and evaluation data. Local wind components are estimated from UAS dynamics using a bidirectional long short-term memory network (Bi-LSTM) and assimilated into a physics-informed neural network (PINN) to reconstruct a continuous wind field in space and time. For local wind estimation, the bidirectional LSTM achieves root-mean-square errors (RMSE) of 0.064 and 0.062 m/s for the north and east components in low-wind conditions, increasing to 0.122 to 0.129 m/s under moderate winds and 0.271 to 0.273 m/s in high-wind conditions, while the vertical component exhibits higher error, with RMSE values of 0.029 to 0.091 m/s. The physics-informed reconstruction recovers the dominant spatial and temporal structure of the wind field up to 1000 m altitude while preserving mean flow direction and vertical shear. Under moderate wind conditions, the reconstructed mean wind field achieves an overall RMSE between 0.118 and 0.154 m/s across evaluated UAS configurations, with the lowest error obtained using a five-UAS swarm. These results demonstrate that coordinated UAS measurements enable accurate and scalable four-dimensional wind-field reconstruction without dedicated wind sensors or fixed infrastructure.

电磁器件的近实时全波逆设计#

Near Real-time Full-wave Inverse Design of Electromagnetic Devices
📚 arXiv👤 Jui-Hung Sun, Mohamed Elsawaf, Yifei Zheng, Ho-Chun Lin, Chia Wei Hsu, Constantine Sideris📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：预计算数值格林函数法将电磁逆设计的迭代成本降至毫秒级，实现线性复杂度与16000倍加速，使复杂电磁器件的分钟级近实时优化成为可能，突破了传统全波仿真耗时数周的设计瓶颈。
arXiv:2501.18054v4 公告类型：替换 摘要：逆向设计能够自动发现和优化设备，其性能显着超过传统的人工设计。然而，现有的逆向设计电磁设备的方法需要在每次迭代或生成大型数据集时进行计算昂贵且耗时的全波电磁仿真，以训练神经网络代理模型。这项工作介绍了预计算数值格林函数方法，这是一种超快电磁逆设计方法。设计的静态组件被纳入从单个完全并行预计算步骤获得的数值格林函数中，从而将优化期间评估候选设计的成本降低到仅与修改区域的大小成正…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2501.18054v4 公告类型：替换 摘要：逆向设计能够自动发现和优化设备，其性能显着超过传统的人工设计。然而，现有的逆向设计电磁设备的方法需要在每次迭代或生成大型数据集时进行计算昂贵且耗时的全波电磁仿真，以训练神经网络代理模型。这项工作介绍了预计算数值格林函数方法，这是一种超快电磁逆设计方法。设计的静态组件被纳入从单个完全并行预计算步骤获得的数值格林函数中，从而将优化期间评估候选设计的成本降低到仅与修改区域的大小成正比。引入了低秩矩阵更新技术，该技术进一步将该方法的成本降低到每次迭代的毫秒数，而没有任何近似或精度的妥协。该方法被证明具有线性时间复杂度，与使用传统电磁求解器相比，将逆向设计的总运行时间减少了几个数量级。考虑的设计示例展示了高达 16,000 倍的加速，将设计过程从几天到几周缩短到几分钟。该方法能够实现复杂结构的实用且超快速的设计，而这对于先前的逆向设计方法来说是极其耗时的。

English Abstract

arXiv:2501.18054v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Inverse design enables automating the discovery and optimization of devices achieving performance significantly exceeding that of traditional human-engineered designs. However, existing methodologies to inverse-design electromagnetic devices require computationally expensive and time-consuming full-wave electromagnetic simulation at each iteration or generation of large datasets for training neural-network surrogate models. This work introduces the Precomputed Numerical Green Function method, an approach for ultrafast electromagnetic inverse design. The static components of the design are incorporated into a numerical Green function obtained from a single fully-parallelized precomputation step, reducing the cost of evaluating candidate designs during optimization to only being proportional to the size of the region under modification. A low-rank matrix update technique is introduced that further decreases the cost of the method to milliseconds per iteration without any approximations or compromises in accuracy. This method is shown to have linear time complexity, reducing the total runtime for an inverse design by several orders of magnitude compared to using conventional electromagnetics solvers. The design examples considered demonstrate speedups of up to 16,000x, shortening the design process from multiple days to weeks down to minutes. The approach enables practical and ultrafast design of complex structures that are prohibitively time-consuming for prior inverse design methods.

Data-Driven Probabilistic Air-Sea Flux Parameterization

arXiv:2503.03990v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确量化海气通量对于理解海气相互作用和改善耦合的天气和气候系统非常重要。这项研究引入了一个概率框架来表示海气通量的高度可变性质，这是确定性批量算法中所缺少的。假设高斯分布以输入变量为条件，我们使用人工神经网络和涡协方差测量数据通过最小化负对数似然损失来估计均值和方差。经过训练的神经网络为现有的批量算法提供了替代的平均通量估计，并量化了平均估计的不确定性。可以通过从预测分布中采…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2503.03990v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确量化海气通量对于理解海气相互作用和改善耦合的天气和气候系统非常重要。这项研究引入了一个概率框架来表示海气通量的高度可变性质，这是确定性批量算法中所缺少的。假设高斯分布以输入变量为条件，我们使用人工神经网络和涡协方差测量数据通过最小化负对数似然损失来估计均值和方差。经过训练的神经网络为现有的批量算法提供了替代的平均通量估计，并量化了平均估计的不确定性。可以通过从预测分布中采样来构建海气湍流通量的随机参数化。单柱强制上层海洋模型的测试表明，通量算法的变化会季节性地影响海面温度和混合层深度。随机运行中的集合分布在春季重新分层期间最为明显。

English Abstract

arXiv:2503.03990v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurately quantifying air-sea fluxes is important for understanding air-sea interactions and improving coupled weather and climate systems. This study introduces a probabilistic framework to represent the highly variable nature of air-sea fluxes, which is missing in deterministic bulk algorithms. Assuming Gaussian distributions conditioned on the input variables, we use artificial neural networks and eddy-covariance measurement data to estimate the mean and variance by minimizing negative log-likelihood loss. The trained neural networks provide alternative mean flux estimates to existing bulk algorithms, and quantify the uncertainty around the mean estimates. Stochastic parameterization of air-sea turbulent fluxes can be constructed by sampling from the predicted distributions. Tests in a single-column forced upper-ocean model suggest that changes in flux algorithms influence sea surface temperature and mixed layer depth seasonally. The ensemble spread in stochastic runs is most pronounced during spring restratification.

从电化学界面的自由能分布中导出有效的电极-离子相互作用#

Deriving effective electrode-ion interactions from free-energy profiles at electrochemical interfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Fabrice Roncoroni, Abrar Faiyad, Yichen Li, Tao Ye, Ashlie Martini, David Prendergast📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究揭示了经典力场中Lennard-Jones混合规则对离子-金属相互作用描述的定性偏差，提出了一种系统修正交叉项参数的方法；同时验证了通用机器学习原子间势（UMA）在带电界面模拟中的可靠性，并将分
arXiv:2507.23031v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：了解带电金属-电解质界面的离子吸附对于电化学系统的精确建模至关重要。在这里，我们利用经典力场和机器学习原子间势（MLIP）的增强采样分子动力学系统地研究了 Au(111)-水界面上 Na⁺、Cl⁻ 和 F⁻ 离子的自由能分布。我们的经典元动力学结果揭示了预测的离子吸附对 Lennard-Jones 参数的强烈依赖性，强调了如果不小心，标准混合规则可能会导致对离子-金属相互作用…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2507.23031v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：了解带电金属-电解质界面的离子吸附对于电化学系统的精确建模至关重要。在这里，我们利用经典力场和机器学习原子间势（MLIP）的增强采样分子动力学系统地研究了 Au(111)-水界面上 Na⁺、Cl⁻ 和 F⁻ 离子的自由能分布。我们的经典元动力学结果揭示了预测的离子吸附对 Lennard-Jones 参数的强烈依赖性，强调了如果不小心，标准混合规则可能会导致对离子-金属相互作用的定性错误描述。我们提出了一种系统方法，用于调整交叉项 LJ 参数，以控制吸附能量，使其与更准确的模型一致。作为从头计算模型的替代模型，我们采用了最近发布的通用原子模型 (UMA) MLIP，该模型验证了经典趋势，并显示出对氯化物的强特异性吸附、对氟化物的弱吸附以及对钠的无特异性吸附，这与实验和理论预期一致。通过将分子级吸附自由能集成到双电层的连续介质模型中，我们表明特定离子吸附显着改变了界面离子群、零电荷电势和系统的微分电容。我们的结果强调了力场参数化和先进原子间势对于带电界面离子特异性效应的预测建模的至关重要性，并为桥接分子模拟和连续电化学模型提供了一个强大的框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.23031v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Understanding ion adsorption at electrified metal-electrolyte interfaces is essential for accurate modeling of electrochemical systems. Here, we systematically investigate the free energy profiles of Na⁺, Cl⁻, and F⁻ ions at the Au(111)-water interface using enhanced sampling molecular dynamics with both classical force fields and machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs). Our classical metadynamics results reveal a strong dependence of predicted ion adsorption on the Lennard-Jones parameters, highlighting that --without due care-- standard mixing rules can lead to qualitatively incorrect descriptions of ion-metal interactions. We present a systematic methodology for tuning the cross-term LJ parameters to control adsorption energetics in agreement with more accurate models. As a surrogate for an ab initio model, we employed the recently released Universal Models for Atoms (UMA) MLIP, which validates classical trends and displays strong specific adsorption for chloride, weak adsorption for fluoride, and no specific adsorption for sodium, in agreement with experimental and theoretical expectations. By integrating molecular-level adsorption free energies into continuum models of the electric double layer, we show that specific ion adsorption substantially alters the interfacial ion population, the potential of zero charge, and the differential capacitance of the system. Our results underscore the critical importance of force field parameterization and advanced interatomic potentials for the predictive modeling of ion-specific effects at electrified interfaces and provide a robust framework for bridging molecular simulations and continuum electrochemical models.

小型人工神经网络物理直觉的通用推广理论#

Universal Generalization Theory for Physical Intuitions from Small Artificial Neural Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Jingruo Peng, Shuze Zhu📅 2026-01-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究以变分原理为核心训练机制，使小型神经网络能从有限相似样本中快速习得物理直觉，并首次从解流形与欧拉-拉格朗日算子平稳性角度建立统一理论框架，揭示了网络规模存在直觉涌现的阈值，为理解人类与人工智能的
arXiv:2508.19537v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：物理直觉是人类大脑的固有功能，但对物理直觉如何形成的理解仍然难以捉摸。在这封信中，我们提出了一种机制，可以模拟人脑如何从有限的观察中快速发展直觉理解。根据物理学中众所周知的变分原理构思出一种训练算法，小型人工神经网络可以通过学习一些高度相似的样本来拥有强大的物理直觉，从而掌握短时线和量子谐振子的问题。我们的模拟表明，变分原理是人工物理直觉的控制机制。这种概括可以用统一的理论来…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2508.19537v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：物理直觉是人类大脑的固有功能，但对物理直觉如何形成的理解仍然难以捉摸。在这封信中，我们提出了一种机制，可以模拟人脑如何从有限的观察中快速发展直觉理解。根据物理学中众所周知的变分原理构思出一种训练算法，小型人工神经网络可以通过学习一些高度相似的样本来拥有强大的物理直觉，从而掌握短时线和量子谐振子的问题。我们的模拟表明，变分原理是人工物理直觉的控制机制。这种概括可以用统一的理论来解释：当网络逼近解流形时，就会出现这种概括，其中欧拉-拉格朗日算子相对于观测特征是平稳的。我们的理论还合理地证明，人工神经网络大小存在一个阈值，低于该阈值就不可能获得令人满意的物理直觉。我们的工作提供了关于如何将强大的物理直觉表达为人类或人工智能的见解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.19537v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Physical intuitions are native functions from human brains, yet the understanding of how physical intuitions are formulated has remained elusive. In this Letter, we propose a mechanism that simulates how human brain can quickly develop intuitional understandings from limited observations. Conceiving a training algorithm adapted from the well-known variational principle in physics, small artificial neural networks can possess strong physical intuitions that master the problems of brachistochrone and quantum harmonic oscillators, by learning from a few highly similar samples. Our simulations suggest that the variational principle is the governing mechanism for artificial physical intuitions. This generalization is explained by a unified theory: it arises when the network approximates a solution manifold where the Euler-Lagrange operator is stationary with respect to observation features. Our theory also rationalizes that there is a threshold of artificial neural network size below which satisfactory physical intuitions are not possible. Our work offers insights into how strong physical intuition can be formulated as humans or as artificial intelligences.

24

机器学习引导的钨单原子促进羟基氧化物用于无贵金属的水电解#

Machine-learning-guided tungsten single atoms promote oxyhydroxides for noble-metal-free water electrolysis
📚 Nature Communications👤 Jaehyun Kim, Ik Seon Kwon, Jiheon Lim, Sol A Lee 等13位作者📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究通过机器学习原子间势高效筛选近四千种构型，发现原子级分散钨修饰的NiFe羟基氧化物可突破非贵金属析氧催化剂的活性瓶颈，并在碱性膜电解槽中实现超高电流密度与长时稳定运行，为计算驱动电催化剂设计树立
降低电催化剂析氧反应的过电势对于高效可再生电力驱动的电解至关重要。活性贵金属催化剂面临浸出和稀缺的问题，而非贵金属替代品则面临固有活性有限的问题。在这里，我们将计算指导与实验验证相结合，以确定 NiFe 羟基氧化物中原子分散的钨，即 W1-NiFeOOH，作为一种有前途的无贵金属析氧反应催化剂。基于等变变压器的机器学习原子间势加速了域外吸附能预测，并从 3,976 个单原子合并的金属羟基氧化物构型中提名 W1-NiFeOOH。循环电沉…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

降低电催化剂析氧反应的过电势对于高效可再生电力驱动的电解至关重要。活性贵金属催化剂面临浸出和稀缺的问题，而非贵金属替代品则面临固有活性有限的问题。在这里，我们将计算指导与实验验证相结合，以确定 NiFe 羟基氧化物中原子分散的钨，即 W1-NiFeOOH，作为一种有前途的无贵金属析氧反应催化剂。基于等变变压器的机器学习原子间势加速了域外吸附能预测，并从 3,976 个单原子合并的金属羟基氧化物构型中提名 W1-NiFeOOH。循环电沉积 W1-NiFeOOH 在 2.0 V 下实现了 13.1 A cm-2 的高电流密度，并在使用商业膜的碱性交换膜水电解中保持稳定 500 小时。原位光谱和密度泛函理论计算表明，次表面W促进剂在邻近的Ni-O-Fe边缘活性位点诱导协同电子重新分布，从而降低去质子化步骤的质子耦合电子转移势垒并促进转变为活性γ相。这种集成的计算实验工作流程为可持续能源系统的经济高效的催化剂设计提供了蓝图。

English Abstract

Lowering the overpotential of oxygen evolution reaction with electrocatalysts is essential for efficient renewable-electricity-driven electrolysis. Active noble-metal catalysts suffer from leaching and scarcity, while non-noble alternatives face limited intrinsic activity. Here we combine computational guidance with experimental validation to identify atomically dispersed tungsten within NiFe oxyhydroxide, namely W1-NiFeOOH, as a promising noble-metal-free oxygen evolution reaction catalyst. An equivariant transformer-based machine-learning interatomic potential accelerates out-of-domain adsorption energy predictions and nominates W1-NiFeOOH from 3,976 single-atom-incorporated metal oxyhydroxide configurations. Cyclic-electrodeposited W1-NiFeOOH achieves a high current density of 13.1 A cm-2at 2.0 V and remains stable for 500 hours in alkaline exchange-membrane water electrolysis with commercial membranes. In situ spectroscopy and density functional theory calculations suggest that subsurface W promoter induces synergistic electron redistribution at neighboring Ni-O-Fe edge active sites, thereby lowering the proton-coupled electron-transfer barrier for the deprotonation step and facilitating transformation into the active γ-phase. This integrated computational-experimental workflow provides a blueprint for cost-effective catalyst design for sustainable energy systems.

[原始信息] Nature Communications, Published online: 29 January 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-68735-3 Sustainable hydrogen production requires efficient oxygen evolution catalysts. Here, the authors identify non-noble single-atom catalysts via machine learning-assisted computational screening and reveal their active-site mechanisms for high-performance anion exchange membrane water electrolysis.

25

深度学习多分散硬棒的小角散射#

Deep Learning the Small-Angle Scattering of Polydisperse Hard Rods
📚 arXiv👤 Lijie Ding, Changwoo Do📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究以变分自编码器神经网络学习多分散硬棒系统参数到散射函数的映射，突破了Percus-Yevick近似在各向异性相互作用和高浓度下的理论局限，显著提升了小角散射数据拟合精度，为复杂胶体体系的定量结构
arXiv:2601.20033v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了一种深度学习框架，用于建模和分析多分散硬棒系统的小角度散射数据，这是一种广泛使用的各向异性胶体颗粒模型。我们使用基于变分自动编码器的神经网络来学习从系统参数（例如体积分数、杆长度和多分散性）到散射函数的映射。用于训练和测试此类神经网络模型的数据集是使用 HOOMD-blue 的硬粒子蒙特卡罗包对 20,000 个硬球柱进行马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗模拟而获得的。生成了四个数据…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20033v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了一种深度学习框架，用于建模和分析多分散硬棒系统的小角度散射数据，这是一种广泛使用的各向异性胶体颗粒模型。我们使用基于变分自动编码器的神经网络来学习从系统参数（例如体积分数、杆长度和多分散性）到散射函数的映射。用于训练和测试此类神经网络模型的数据集是使用 HOOMD-blue 的硬粒子蒙特卡罗包对 20,000 个硬球柱进行马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗模拟而获得的。生成了四个数据集，每个数据集都有 5,500 对系统参数和相应的散射函数。我们使用其中一个数据集来研究学习的可行性，并使用三个具有不同多分散分布的附加数据集来证明我们方法的通用性。神经网络模型通过准确捕获分析模型通常无法解决的各向异性相互作用和高浓度效应，超越了 Percus-Yevick 近似的基本局限性。该框架在再现散射函数方面实现了显着更高的精度，并支持用于定量数据分析的最小二乘拟合例程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20033v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a deep learning framework for modeling and analyzing the small-angle scattering data of polydisperse hard-rod systems, a widely used models for anisotropic colloidal particles. We use a variational autoencoder-based neural network to learn the mapping from the system parameters such as the volume fraction, rod length, and polydispersity, to the scattering function. The dataset for training and testing such neural network model is obtained from Markov chain Monte Carlo simulation of 20,000 hard spherocylinders using the hard particle Monte Carlo package from the HOOMD-blue. Four datasets were generated, each with 5,500 pairs of system parameters and corresponding scattering functions. We use one of the dataset to investigate the feasibility of the learning, and three additional datasets with different polydisperse distribution to demonstrate the generality of our approach. The neural network model transcends the fundamental limitations of the Percus-Yevick approximation by accurately capturing anisotropic interactions and high-concentration effects that analytical models often fail to resolve. This framework achieves significantly higher accuracy in reproducing scattering functions and enables a least-square fitting routine for quantitative data analysis.

26

Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络应用于材料特性预测#

Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks Applied to Materials Property Prediction
📚 arXiv👤 Ryan Jacobs, Lane E. Schultz, Dane Morgan📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次系统评估了Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）在材料性能预测中的实际表现，发现其参数效率与可解释性优势在材料科学领域并未自动转化为优于随机森林的预测精度，且拟合难度显著更高。核心
arXiv:2601.20097v1 公告类型：新 摘要：Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络 (KAN) 被提议作为基于多层感知器 (MLP-NN) 的传统神经网络架构的替代方案。 KAN 相对于 MLP-NN 的潜在优势，包括显着提高的参数效率和增加的可解释性，使它们成为监督机器学习问题中很有前途的新回归模型。我们将 KAN 应用于材料属性的预测，重点关注由实验数据和计算数据组成的 33 种不同属性。我们将 KAN 结果与随机…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20097v1 公告类型：新 摘要：Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络 (KAN) 被提议作为基于多层感知器 (MLP-NN) 的传统神经网络架构的替代方案。 KAN 相对于 MLP-NN 的潜在优势，包括显着提高的参数效率和增加的可解释性，使它们成为监督机器学习问题中很有前途的新回归模型。我们将 KAN 应用于材料属性的预测，重点关注由实验数据和计算数据组成的 33 种不同属性。我们将 KAN 结果与随机森林进行比较，随机森林通常只需很少的优化即可在各种属性预测上提供出色的性能。 KAN 在大约 35%、60% 和 5% 的时间里比随机森林更差、不相上下或更好，而且在实践中 KAN 比随机森林更难拟合。通过调整网络架构，我们发现与标准 KAN 相比，属性拟合通常会导致错误率降低 10-20%，并且通常会给出与随机森林相当的结果。在预测反应堆压力容器转变温度变化的特定背景下，我们通过比较简单 KAN 模型（例如，< 50 个参数）的预测和 KAN 拟合建议的闭合形式表达式与先前发布的深度 MLP-NN 和使用脆化物理领域专业知识创建的手动调整模型，探索了 KAN 的参数效率和可解释能力。我们发现，简单的 KAN 模型和由此产生的封闭式表达式产生的预测误差与具有相当数量参数的已建立的手动调整模型相当，并且基本上不需要领域专业知识来生成。这些发现增强了 KAN 在材料科学中机器学习的潜在适用性，并表明应该将 KAN 作为预测材料特性的回归模型进行探索。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20097v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) were proposed as an alternative to traditional neural network architectures based on multilayer perceptrons (MLP-NNs). The potential advantages of KANs over MLP-NNs, including significantly enhanced parameter efficiency and increased interpretability, make them a promising new regression model in supervised machine learning problems. We apply KANs to prediction of materials properties, focusing on a diverse set of 33 properties consisting of both experimental and calculated data. We compare the KAN results to random forest, a method that generally gives excellent performance on a wide range of properties predictions with very little optimization. The KANs were worse, on par, or better than random forest about 35%, 60%, and 5% of the time, respectively, and KANs are in practice more difficult to fit than random forest. By tuning the network architecture, we found property fits often resulted in 10-20% lower errors compared to the standard KAN, and typically gave results comparable to random forest. In the specific context of predicting reactor pressure vessel transition temperature shifts, we explored the parameter efficiency and the interpretable power of KANs by comparing predictions of simple KAN models (e.g., < 50 parameters) and closed-form expressions suggested by the KAN fits to previously published deep MLP-NNs and hand-tuned models created using domain expertise of embrittlement physics. We found that simple KAN models and the resulting closed-form expressions produce prediction errors on par with established hand-tuned models with a comparable number of parameters, and required essentially no domain expertise to produce. These findings reinforce the potential applicability of KANs for machine learning in materials science and suggest that KANs should be explored as a regression model for prediction of materials properties.

27

利用机器学习潜力揭示应变对石墨烯-水接触角的影响#

Revealing Strain Effects on the Graphene-Water Contact Angle Using a Machine Learning Potential
📚 arXiv👤 Darren Wayne Lim, Xavier R. Advincula, William C. Witt, Fabian L. Thiemann, Christoph Schran📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究以机器学习势驱动的纳秒级分子动力学模拟，首次为独立式石墨烯-水接触角提供了原子级第一性原理基准（72.1°），并揭示拉伸应变增强疏水性、压缩应变诱发各向异性润湿及接触角滞后的新机制，为解释实验分
arXiv:2601.20134v1 公告类型：新 摘要：了解水如何润湿石墨烯对于预测和控制其在纳米流体、传感和能源应用中的行为至关重要。润湿的一个关键指标是液滴与表面形成的接触角，但石墨烯的实验测量范围很广，并且对于独立式石墨烯尚未达成共识。在这里，我们使用接近从头计算精度的机器学习潜力来执行纳秒级分子动力学，并为这个未解决的问题提供原子第一原理基准。我们发现，经过有限尺寸校正后，水在独立式石墨烯上的接触角为 72.1 ± 1.5…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20134v1 公告类型：新 摘要：了解水如何润湿石墨烯对于预测和控制其在纳米流体、传感和能源应用中的行为至关重要。润湿的一个关键指标是液滴与表面形成的接触角，但石墨烯的实验测量范围很广，并且对于独立式石墨烯尚未达成共识。在这里，我们使用接近从头计算精度的机器学习潜力来执行纳秒级分子动力学，并为这个未解决的问题提供原子第一原理基准。我们发现，经过有限尺寸校正后，水在独立式石墨烯上的接触角为 72.1 ± 1.5 deg。我们还表明，纳米级水滴的三相接触线与独立石墨烯的固有热波纹强烈耦合，并且石墨烯的润湿特性对机械应变高度敏感。拉伸应变使石墨烯的疏水性明显增强，而压缩应变则引起液滴“冲浪”的连贯波纹，从而导致明显的各向异性润湿和接触角滞后。我们的结果表明，石墨烯的润湿特性不仅受其化学性质的影响，还受其动态形态的影响，为实验测量的可变性提供了额外的解释。此外，机械应变可能是控制石墨烯技术中润湿的实用途径，对纳米流体和纳米过滤应用具有良好的效果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20134v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding how water wets graphene is critical for predicting and controlling its behavior in nanofluidic, sensing, and energy applications. A key measure of wetting is the contact angle made by a liquid droplet against the surface, yet experimental measurements for graphene span a wide range, and no consensus has emerged for free-standing graphene. Here, we use a machine learning potential with approaching ab initio accuracy to perform nanosecond-scale molecular dynamics and provide an atomistic first-principles benchmark for this unsolved problem. We find the contact angle of water on free-standing graphene, after finite-size correction, to be 72.1 ± 1.5 deg. We also show that the three-phase contact line of a nanoscale water droplet couples strongly to the intrinsic thermal ripples of free-standing graphene, and that graphene's wetting properties are highly sensitive to mechanical strain. Tensile strain makes graphene significantly more hydrophobic, while compressive strain induces coherent ripples that the droplet "surfs", resulting in pronounced anisotropic wetting and contact angle hysteresis. Our results demonstrate that graphene's wetting properties are governed not only by its chemistry but also by its dynamic morphology, offering an additional explanation for the variability of experimental measurements. Furthermore, mechanical strain may be a practical route to controlling wetting in graphene-based technologies, with promising consequences for nanofluidic and nano-filtration applications.

28

方向性和节点异质性重塑超图渗透的关键性#

Directionality and node heterogeneity reshape criticality in hypergraph percolation
📚 arXiv👤 Yunxue Sun, Xueming Liu, Ginestra Bianconi📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次构建融合方向性与节点异质性的有向超图渗流理论框架，揭示这两个特征以结构依赖方式重塑临界行为，甚至导致异常临界指数。理论在代谢网络中得到验证，为定向高阶网络鲁棒性分析提供了新工具。
arXiv:2601.20726v1 公告类型：新 摘要：有向和异构超图捕获具有节点之间本质上不对称功能依赖性的定向高阶交互。因此，某些节点的损坏可以抑制整个超边，而其他节点的故障只会削弱相互作用。代谢反应网络提供了这种不对称依赖性的直观示例。在这里，我们开发了一个用于有向超图中渗透的消息传递和统计力学框架，该框架明确地结合了方向性和节点异质性。值得注意的是，我们表明这些超图特征对超图渗透的关键属性具有根本性影响，以依赖于网络结构的方…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20726v1 公告类型：新 摘要：有向和异构超图捕获具有节点之间本质上不对称功能依赖性的定向高阶交互。因此，某些节点的损坏可以抑制整个超边，而其他节点的故障只会削弱相互作用。代谢反应网络提供了这种不对称依赖性的直观示例。在这里，我们开发了一个用于有向超图中渗透的消息传递和统计力学框架，该框架明确地结合了方向性和节点异质性。值得注意的是，我们表明这些超图特征对超图渗透的关键属性具有根本性影响，以依赖于网络结构的方式重塑关键性。具体来说，我们得出异常临界指数，该指数取决于在最大相关的重尾机制中是否考虑节点或超边渗流。这些理论预测在合成超图模型和真实定向代谢网络上得到了验证，为表征现实世界定向异构高阶网络的鲁棒性和弹性开辟了新的视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20726v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Directed and heterogeneous hypergraphs capture directional higher-order interactions with intrinsically asymmetric functional dependencies among nodes. As a result, damage to certain nodes can suppress entire hyperedges, whereas failure of others only weakens interactions. Metabolic reaction networks offer an intuitive example of such asymmetric dependencies. Here we develop a message-passing and statistical mechanics framework for percolation in directed hypergraphs that explicitly incorporates directionality and node heterogeneity. Remarkably, we show that these hypergraph features have a fundamental effect on the critical properties of hypergraph percolation, reshaping criticality in a way that depends on network structure. Specifically, we derive anomalous critical exponents that depend on whether node or hyperedge percolation is considered in maximally correlated, heavy-tailed regimes. These theoretical predictions are validated on synthetic hypergraph models and on a real directed metabolic network, opening new perspectives for the characterization of the robustness and resilience of real-world directed, heterogeneous higher-order networks.

29

混合精度的神经量子态#

Neural Quantum States in Mixed Precision
📚 arXiv👤 Massimo Solinas, Agnes Valenti, Nawaf Bou-Rabee, Roeland Wiersema📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次为混合精度Metropolis-Hastings MCMC采样建立了严格的误差分析框架，并证明神经量子态变分蒙特卡罗的核心采样步骤可在半精度下运行而不损失精度。这一突破显著降低了量子多体模拟
arXiv:2601.20782v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：科学计算长期以来依赖双精度（64 位浮点）算法来保证现实世界现象模拟的准确性。然而，图形处理单元 (GPU) 等硬件加速器的可用性不断增加，使得低精度格式因其卓越的性能、减少的内存占用和提高的能源效率而变得有吸引力。在这项工作中，我们研究了混合精度算术在基于神经网络的变分蒙特卡罗（VMC）中的作用，VMC 是一种广泛使用的方法，用于解决计算上棘手的量子多体系统。我们首先…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20782v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：科学计算长期以来依赖双精度（64 位浮点）算法来保证现实世界现象模拟的准确性。然而，图形处理单元 (GPU) 等硬件加速器的可用性不断增加，使得低精度格式因其卓越的性能、减少的内存占用和提高的能源效率而变得有吸引力。在这项工作中，我们研究了混合精度算术在基于神经网络的变分蒙特卡罗（VMC）中的作用，VMC 是一种广泛使用的方法，用于解决计算上棘手的量子多体系统。我们首先推导 Metropolis-Hastings MCMC 精度降低所引入的误差的一般分析界限，然后根据 VMC 用例凭经验验证这些界限。我们证明了算法的重要部分，特别是量子态采样，可以以半精度执行，而不会损失精度。更广泛地说，这项工作提供了一个理论框架来评估混合精度算术在依赖 MCMC 采样的机器学习方法中的适用性。在 VMC 的背景下，我们还展示了混合精度策略的实际有效性，从而实现了量子多体系统的更具可扩展性和节能的模拟。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20782v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Scientific computing has long relied on double precision (64-bit floating point) arithmetic to guarantee accuracy in simulations of real-world phenomena. However, the growing availability of hardware accelerators such as Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) has made low-precision formats attractive due to their superior performance, reduced memory footprint, and improved energy efficiency. In this work, we investigate the role of mixed-precision arithmetic in neural-network based Variational Monte Carlo (VMC), a widely used method for solving computationally otherwise intractable quantum many-body systems. We first derive general analytical bounds on the error introduced by reduced precision on Metropolis-Hastings MCMC, and then empirically validate these bounds on the use-case of VMC. We demonstrate that significant portions of the algorithm, in particular, sampling the quantum state, can be executed in half precision without loss of accuracy. More broadly, this work provides a theoretical framework to assess the applicability of mixed-precision arithmetic in machine-learning approaches that rely on MCMC sampling. In the context of VMC, we additionally demonstrate the practical effectiveness of mixed-precision strategies, enabling more scalable and energy-efficient simulations of quantum many-body systems.

30

热模拟计算：逆向设计元结构在矩阵向量乘法中的应用#

Thermal Analog Computing: Application to Matrix-vector Multiplication with Inverse-designed Metastructures
📚 arXiv👤 Caio Silva, Giuseppe Romano📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究首次将逆向设计的超结构引入热模拟计算领域，以热传导为信号载体实现矩阵向量乘法。通过可微分热传输求解器与拓扑优化，在2×2和3×3矩阵运算中达到99%以上精度，并成功应用于离散傅里叶变换与卷积滤波
arXiv:2503.22603v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：现代工作负载不断增长的计算需求重新激发了人们对神经形态和模拟计算等节能范例的兴趣。这些系统中的基本运算是矩阵向量乘法 (MVM)，在信号处理和机器学习中普遍存在。在这里，我们使用逆向设计的元结构来演示 MVM，该元结构利用热传导作为信号载体。所提出的方法基于有效热导率对具有多个输入和输出端口的系统的概括：输入信号被编码为一组应用温度，而输出由在指定端子处收集的功率表示。元结构…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2503.22603v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：现代工作负载不断增长的计算需求重新激发了人们对神经形态和模拟计算等节能范例的兴趣。这些系统中的基本运算是矩阵向量乘法 (MVM)，在信号处理和机器学习中普遍存在。在这里，我们使用逆向设计的元结构来演示 MVM，该元结构利用热传导作为信号载体。所提出的方法基于有效热导率对具有多个输入和输出端口的系统的概括：输入信号被编码为一组应用温度，而输出由在指定端子处收集的功率表示。元结构是通过基于密度的拓扑优化获得的，由可微分热传输求解器和自动微分实现，在大多数情况下在维度为 2×2 和 3×3 的矩阵池中实现 >99% 的精度。我们应用这种称为热模拟计算的方法来实现与实际任务相关的矩阵，包括离散傅里叶变换和卷积滤波器。这些发现为热活跃环境中的模拟信息处理开辟了新途径，包括微电子和热控制系统中的温度梯度传感。

English Abstract

arXiv:2503.22603v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The rising computational demand of modern workloads has renewed interest in energy-efficient paradigms such as neuromorphic and analog computing. A fundamental operation in these systems is matrix-vector multiplication (MVM), ubiquitous in signal processing and machine learning. Here, we demonstrate MVM using inverse-designed metastructures that exploit heat conduction as the signal carrier. The proposed approach is based on a generalization of effective thermal conductivity to systems with multiple input and output ports: The input signal is encoded as a set of applied temperatures, while the output is represented by the power collected at designated terminals. The metastructures are obtained via density-based topology optimization, enabled by a differentiable thermal transport solver and automatic differentiation, achieving an accuracy >99% in most cases across a pool of matrices with dimensions 2×2 and 3×3. We apply this methodology -- termed thermal analog computing -- to realize matrices relevant to practical tasks, including the discrete Fourier transform and convolutional filters. These findings open new avenues for analog information processing in thermally active environments, including temperature-gradient sensing in microelectronics and thermal control systems.

31

连通性决定了稀疏神经网络量子态的能力#

Connectivity determines the capability of sparse neural network quantum states
📚 arXiv👤 Brandon Barton, Juan Carrasquilla, Christopher Roth, Agnes Valenti📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将彩票假说拓展至量子多体基态近似任务，发现稀疏神经网络的精度仅由连通结构决定、与初始化无关，并揭示了由哈密顿量确定的普适标度行为及稀疏诱导的量子相变特征，为神经网络量子态的压缩与可解释性提供了新
arXiv:2505.22734v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：彩票假说（LTH）假设，在过参数化神经网络中，存在稀疏子网络，在与原始初始化隔离的情况下进行训练时，这些子网络能够匹配原始模型的性能。我们将这一假设扩展到近似量子多体哈密顿量的基态的无监督任务，这个问题相当于找到指数大矩阵的最低特征向量的神经网络压缩。重点关注两个具有代表性的量子哈密顿量，横向场伊辛模型（TFIM）和环面码（TC），我们证明稀疏神经网络可…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2505.22734v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：彩票假说（LTH）假设，在过参数化神经网络中，存在稀疏子网络，在与原始初始化隔离的情况下进行训练时，这些子网络能够匹配原始模型的性能。我们将这一假设扩展到近似量子多体哈密顿量的基态的无监督任务，这个问题相当于找到指数大矩阵的最低特征向量的神经网络压缩。重点关注两个具有代表性的量子哈密顿量，横向场伊辛模型（TFIM）和环面码（TC），我们证明稀疏神经网络可以达到与密集神经网络相当的精度，即使在参数计数上修剪超过一个数量级时也是如此。至关重要的是，与原始 LTH 不同的是，我们发现在单独训练时，性能仅取决于稀疏子网络的结构，而不取决于具体的初始化。此外，我们确定了跨网络规模和物理模型持续存在的通用缩放行为，其中缩放区域的边界由底层哈密顿量确定。在高误差缩放开始时，我们观察到稀疏引起的量子相变的特征，该相变在浅层网络中是一阶的。最后，我们证明剪枝通过将稀疏子网络的结构与哈密顿量的基础物理联系起来来增强可解释性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.22734v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) posits that within overparametrized neural networks, there exist sparse subnetworks that are capable of matching the performance of the original model when trained in isolation from the original initialization. We extend this hypothesis to the unsupervised task of approximating the ground state of quantum many-body Hamiltonians, a problem equivalent to finding a neural-network compression of the lowest-lying eigenvector of an exponentially large matrix. Focusing on two representative quantum Hamiltonians, the transverse field Ising model (TFIM) and the toric code (TC), we demonstrate that sparse neural networks can reach accuracies comparable to their dense counterparts, even when pruned by more than an order of magnitude in parameter count. Crucially, and unlike the original LTH, we find that performance depends only on the structure of the sparse subnetwork, not on the specific initialization, when trained in isolation. Moreover, we identify universal scaling behavior that persists across network sizes and physical models, where the boundaries of scaling regions are determined by the underlying Hamiltonian. At the onset of high-error scaling, we observe signatures of a sparsity-induced quantum phase transition that is first-order in shallow networks. Finally, we demonstrate that pruning enhances interpretability by linking the structure of sparse subnetworks to the underlying physics of the Hamiltonian.

32

AiiDA-TrainsPot：神经网络原子间势的自动化训练#

AiiDA-TrainsPot: Towards automated training of neural-network interatomic potentials
📚 arXiv👤 Davide Bidoggia, Nataliia Manko, Maria Peressi, Antimo Marrazzo📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：AiiDA-TrainsPot 实现了神经网络原子间势训练的全流程自动化，其核心创新在于将动态校准的主动学习策略与多后端模块化架构相结合，显著降低了对用户专业门槛的要求。该工作为大规模材料模拟提供了高
arXiv:2509.11703v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：构建神经网络原子间势（NNIP）仍然是一项复杂的任务，需要机器学习和电子结构计算方面的专业知识。在这里，我们介绍 AiiDA-TrainsPot，这是一种自动化、开源且用户友好的工作流程，它通过协调密度泛函理论计算、数据增强策略和经典分子动力学来简化精确 NNIP 的创建。我们的主动学习策略利用委员会分歧与从头参考错误的动态校准，以确保可靠的不确定性估计…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2509.11703v2 公告类型：replace-cross 摘要：构建神经网络原子间势（NNIP）仍然是一项复杂的任务，需要机器学习和电子结构计算方面的专业知识。在这里，我们介绍 AiiDA-TrainsPot，这是一种自动化、开源且用户友好的工作流程，它通过协调密度泛函理论计算、数据增强策略和经典分子动力学来简化精确 NNIP 的创建。我们的主动学习策略利用委员会分歧与从头参考错误的动态校准，以确保可靠的不确定性估计。我们使用电子结构描述符和降维来分析这个校准标准的效率，并表明在决定根据第一原理计算什么时，它可以最大限度地减少误报和漏报。 AiiDA-TrainsPot 采用模块化设计，支持多个 NNIP 后端，既可以从头开始训练 NNIP，也可以对基础模型进行微调。我们通过针对原始和有缺陷的碳同素异形体（包括无定形碳）以及单层 mathrmWₓMo₁₋ₓTe₂ 合金中的结构相变的自动化培训活动展示了其功能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.11703v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Crafting neural-network interatomic potentials (NNIPs) remains a complex task, demanding specialized expertise in both machine learning and electronic-structure calculations. Here, we introduce AiiDA-TrainsPot, an automated, open-source, and user-friendly workflow that streamlines the creation of accurate NNIPs by orchestrating density-functional-theory calculations, data augmentation strategies, and classical molecular dynamics. Our active-learning strategy leverages on-the-fly calibration of committee disagreement against ab initio reference errors to ensure reliable uncertainty estimates. We use electronic-structure descriptors and dimensionality reduction to analyze the efficiency of this calibrated criterion, and show that it minimizes both false positives and false negatives when deciding what to compute from first principles. AiiDA-TrainsPot has a modular design that supports multiple NNIP backends, enabling both the training of NNIPs from scratch and the fine-tuning of foundation models. We demonstrate its capabilities through automated training campaigns targeting pristine and defective carbon allotropes, including amorphous carbon, as well as structural phase transitions in monolayer mathrmWₓMo₁₋ₓTe₂ alloys.

33

学习可微弱形式修正以加速有限元模拟#

Learning Differentiable Weak-Form Corrections to Accelerate Finite Element Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Junoh Jung, Emil Constantinescu📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出可微弱形式学习方法，以参数化双线性算子直接在变分层面修正动量方程，替代传统的强形式黑箱源项。核心创新在于将机器学习与有限元弱形式深度融合，保持数值结构和不可压缩性等物理属性，实现了粗网格上长
arXiv:2601.20019v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了一种可微的弱形式学习方法，用于加速有限元模拟。我们没有在控制方程的强形式中引入黑盒源项，而是使用参数化双线性算子直接以变分（弱）形式增强动量方程。这些算子的系数是从高分辨率模拟中学习的，以便可以在粗网格上表示未解决的小规模动态。在弱形式级别应用校正使学习模型与有限元离散化保持一致，保留关键的数值结构并更好地尊重不可压缩流的基本属性。在相同的设置下，该方法产生的解决方案…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20019v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了一种可微的弱形式学习方法，用于加速有限元模拟。我们没有在控制方程的强形式中引入黑盒源项，而是使用参数化双线性算子直接以变分（弱）形式增强动量方程。这些算子的系数是从高分辨率模拟中学习的，以便可以在粗网格上表示未解决的小规模动态。在弱形式级别应用校正使学习模型与有限元离散化保持一致，保留关键的数值结构并更好地尊重不可压缩流的基本属性。在相同的设置下，该方法产生的解决方案在较长时间内比类似的强形式校正更准确、更稳定。我们在 Firedrake 有限元求解器中实现了所提出的方法，并在基准问题上对其进行了评估，包括一维对流扩散方程和二维不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程。通过将 PyTorch 与 Firedrake 伴随框架耦合来实现端到端可微分训练。在这些测试中，学习到的变分算子提高了长期准确性，同时降低了计算成本。总的来说，我们的结果表明，弱形式学习为不可压缩流的精确和稳定的粗网格模拟提供了一条原则性的、结构保持的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20019v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a differentiable weak-form learning approach for accelerating finite element simulations. Rather than introducing black-box source terms in the strong form of the governing equations, we augment the momentum equation directly in the variational (weak) form with parameterized bilinear operators. The coefficients of these operators are learned from high-resolution simulations so that unresolved small-scale dynamics can be represented on coarse grids. Applying the correction at the weak-form level aligns the learned model with the finite element discretization, preserving key numerical structure and better respecting the fundamental properties of incompressible flow. In the same setting, the approach yields solutions that are more accurate and more stable over long time horizons than comparable strong-form corrections. We implement the proposed method in the Firedrake finite element solver and evaluate it on benchmark problems, including the one-dimensional convection-diffusion equation and the two-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. End-to-end differentiable training is enabled by coupling PyTorch with the Firedrake adjoint framework. Across these tests, the learned variational operators improve long-term accuracy while reducing computational cost. Overall, our results suggest that weak-form learning provides a principled, structure-preserving route to accurate and stable coarse-grid simulations of incompressible flows.

34

基于物理的深度学习将大地测量数据和断层摩擦联系起来#

Physics-informed deep learning links geodetic data and fault friction
📚 arXiv👤 Rikuto Fukushima, Masayuki Kano, Kazuro Hirahara, Makiko Ohtani📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将物理信息神经网络（PINN）引入断层力学反演，以神经网络参数化空间可变的摩擦异质性，突破了传统高维优化瓶颈。以2010年Bungo慢滑移事件为例，成功实现了摩擦特性与大地测量数据的定量
arXiv:2601.20136v1 公告类型：新 摘要：基于实验室导出的摩擦定律的断层滑动建模显着增强了我们对断层力学的理解。模型预测和观测之间的一致性支持了这样的假设：观测到的滑移多样性，包括快速地震和慢速瞬态滑移（慢滑移事件；SSE），源于摩擦不均匀性。然而，由于高维优化的困难，缺乏充分结合断层力学的大地测量观测摩擦不均匀性的定量评估。在这项研究中，我们的目标是利用物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 将摩擦异质性与大地测量观测联系起…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20136v1 公告类型：新 摘要：基于实验室导出的摩擦定律的断层滑动建模显着增强了我们对断层力学的理解。模型预测和观测之间的一致性支持了这样的假设：观测到的滑移多样性，包括快速地震和慢速瞬态滑移（慢滑移事件；SSE），源于摩擦不均匀性。然而，由于高维优化的困难，缺乏充分结合断层力学的大地测量观测摩擦不均匀性的定量评估。在这项研究中，我们的目标是利用物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 将摩擦异质性与大地测量观测联系起来，以解决这一差距。 PINN 采用神经网络来表示空间可变的摩擦特性，使其估计变得可行。以日本西南部的 2010 年 Bungo SSE 为目标，我们的估计揭示了异质摩擦与四国西南部的局部 SSE 成核以及随后的向西传播相一致。 SSE 计算的断层滑移成功地再现了观测到的地表位移的时空模式。这种基于 PINN 的反演提供了通过与观测进行定量比较来验证的机械一致的断层滑移模型。此外，我们预测了未来的断层滑动演化，证明了同化多个 SSE 周期观测结果的重要性。我们的结果证明了 PINN 在增进对断层力学的理解和实现基于物理的断层滑动预测方面的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20136v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fault slip modeling, based on laboratory-derived friction laws, has significantly enhanced our understanding of fault mechanics. Agreement between model predictions and observations supports the hypothesis that observed slip diversity, including fast earthquakes and slow transient slips (Slow Slip Events; SSEs), originates from frictional heterogeneity. However, quantitative assessments of frictional heterogeneity from geodetic observations while fully incorporating fault mechanics are lacking due to the difficulties of high-dimensional optimization. In this study, we aim to address this gap using Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) to link frictional heterogeneity with geodetic observations. PINNs employ a neural network to represent the spatially variable frictional properties, making their estimation feasible. Targeting the 2010 Bungo SSE in southwest Japan, our estimation reveals heterogeneous friction coinciding with localized SSE nucleation in southwest Shikoku, and subsequent westward propagation. The calculated fault slip of SSE successfully reproduces the spatio-temporal pattern of observed surface displacements. This PINN-based inversion provides a mechanically consistent fault slip model validated through quantitative comparison with observations. Furthermore, we predict the future fault slip evolution, demonstrating the importance of assimilating observations spanning multiple SSE cycles. Our results demonstrate the potential of PINN for advancing understanding of fault mechanics and enabling physics-based fault slip forecasting.

35

使用机器学习在 CYGNO 实验中搜索暗物质的触发优化和事件分类#

Trigger Optimization and Event Classification for Dark Matter Searches in the CYGNO Experiment Using Machine Learning
📚 arXiv👤 F. D. Amaro, R. Antonietti, E. Baracchini, L. Benussi, C. Capoccia, M. Caponero, L. G. M. de Carvalho, G. Cavoto, I. A. Costa, A. Croce, M. D'Astolfo, G. D'Imperio, G. Dho, E. Di Marco, J. M. F. dos Santos, D. Fiorina, F. Iacoangeli, Z. Islam, E. Kemp, H. P. Lima Jr, G. Maccarrone, R. D. P. Mano, D. J. G. Marques, G. Mazzitelli, P. Meloni, A. Messina, C. M. B. Monteiro, R. A. Nobrega, G. M. Oppedisano, I. F. Pains, E. Paoletti, F. Petrucci, S. Piacentini, D. Pierluigi, D. Pinci, F. Renga, A. Russo, G. Saviano, P. A. O. C. Silva, N. J. Spooner, R. Tesauro, S. Tomassini, D. Tozzi📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：CYGNO实验针对光学TPC产生的大尺度稀疏图像，开发了两种互补的机器学习方案：一是基于无监督卷积自编码器的在线数据缩减，在消费级GPU上实现25毫秒/帧的快速推理，保留93%信号的同时丢弃97.8%
arXiv:2601.20626v1 公告类型：新 摘要：CYGNO 实验采用光学读出时间投影室 (TPC)，利用精细解析的闪烁图像来搜索罕见的低能量相互作用。虽然光学读出提供了丰富的拓扑信息，但它会产生大而稀疏的百万像素图像，这对实时触发、数据缩减和背景辨别提出了挑战。我们总结了 CYGNO 中开发的两种互补的机器学习方法。首先，我们提出了一种基于重建的异常检测的快速且完全无监督的在线数据缩减策略。专门在基座图像（即禁用 GEM 放…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20626v1 公告类型：新 摘要：CYGNO 实验采用光学读出时间投影室 (TPC)，利用精细解析的闪烁图像来搜索罕见的低能量相互作用。虽然光学读出提供了丰富的拓扑信息，但它会产生大而稀疏的百万像素图像，这对实时触发、数据缩减和背景辨别提出了挑战。我们总结了 CYGNO 中开发的两种互补的机器学习方法。首先，我们提出了一种基于重建的异常检测的快速且完全无监督的在线数据缩减策略。专门在基座图像（即禁用 GEM 放大时获取的帧）上训练的卷积自动编码器学习探测器噪声形态，并通过局部重建残差突出显示粒子引起的结构，从中提取紧凑的感兴趣区域 (ROI)。在真实原型数据上，所选配置保留 (93.0 +/- 0.2)% 的重建信号强度，同时丢弃 (97.8 +/- 0.1)% 的图像区域，在消费级 GPU 上每帧推理时间约为 25 毫秒。其次，我们报告了无标签分类（CWoLa）框架在镅-铍中子源获取的数据上的弱监督应用。仅使用混合 AmBe 和标准数据集（无事件级标签），卷积分类器学习识别类似核反冲的拓扑。所实现的性能接近混合物成分所施加的理论极限，并分离出具有与核反冲一致的紧凑、近似圆形形态的高分群体。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20626v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The CYGNO experiment employs an optical-readout Time Projection Chamber (TPC) to search for rare low-energy interactions using finely resolved scintillation images. While the optical readout provides rich topological information, it produces large, sparse megapixel images that challenge real-time triggering, data reduction, and background discrimination. We summarize two complementary machine-learning approaches developed within CYGNO. First, we present a fast and fully unsupervised strategy for online data reduction based on reconstruction-based anomaly detection. A convolutional autoencoder trained exclusively on pedestal images (i.e. frames acquired with GEM amplification disabled) learns the detector noise morphology and highlights particle-induced structures through localized reconstruction residuals, from which compact Regions of Interest (ROIs) are extracted. On real prototype data, the selected configuration retains (93.0 +/- 0.2)% of reconstructed signal intensity while discarding (97.8 +/- 0.1)% of the image area, with ~25 ms per-frame inference time on a consumer GPU. Second, we report a weakly supervised application of the Classification Without Labels (CWoLa) framework to data acquired with an Americium--Beryllium neutron source. Using only mixed AmBe and standard datasets (no event-level labels), a convolutional classifier learns to identify nuclear-recoil-like topologies. The achieved performance approaches the theoretical limit imposed by the mixture composition and isolates a high-score population with compact, approximately circular morphologies consistent with nuclear recoils.

36

H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght)系统中第一性原理启发的化学动力学降阶模型#

First-Principle-Inspired Reduced-Order Models of Chemical-Kinetics in H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght) System
📚 arXiv👤 Hye Su Jeong, Tae Woong Jeong, Sung Min Jo📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究针对H₂+H碰撞系统，核心创新在于构建了两种降阶模型：改进双温度模型与混合粗粒模型，显著提升了非平衡能量转移和解离动力学的预测精度。其应用价值体现在天王星大气进入场景的气动热预测中，对流热通量差
arXiv:2601.20660v1 公告类型：新 摘要：在本研究中，通过利用第一原理准经典轨迹模拟和深入的主方程分析，为 H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght) 系统提出了两种不同的降阶模型。采用最新可用的从头算势能面构建了一套新的在较宽温度范围内有效的旋转状态到状态动力学数据库。首先，通过结合主方程模型参数提出了改进的双温度模型，从而能够对内能耦合和非平衡解离预测进行高级处理。其次，通过将针对各种…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20660v1 公告类型：新 摘要：在本研究中，通过利用第一原理准经典轨迹模拟和深入的主方程分析，为 H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght) 系统提出了两种不同的降阶模型。采用最新可用的从头算势能面构建了一套新的在较宽温度范围内有效的旋转状态到状态动力学数据库。首先，通过结合主方程模型参数提出了改进的双温度模型，从而能够对内能耦合和非平衡解离预测进行高级处理。其次，通过将针对各种温度进行全局优化的基于图的方法与基于离心屏障的粗粒方法相结合，提出了一种混合粗粒模型。与先前研究中现有的粗粒度和 2T 模型相比，所提出的降阶模型在预测非平衡能量转移和解离动力学方面提供了显着提高的准确性。此外，与天王星行星进入相关的气动热加热预测揭示了与现有2T改进2T方法相比，对流热通量差异为16.5%，这证明了H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght)系统中化学动力学精确建模的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20660v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In the present study, two-different reduced-order models are proposed for H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght) system by leveraging first-principle quasi-classical trajectory simulations and in-depth master equation analyses. The most recent available ab-initio potential energy surface is adopted to construct a new set of rovibrational state-to-state kinetic database valid over a wide range of temperatures. Firstly, a modified two-temperature model is proposed by incorporating the master equation-informed model parameters, enabling the advanced treatment of the internal energy coupling and the nonequilibrium dissociation predictions. Secondly, a hybrid coarse-graining model is proposed by combining a graph-based approach optimized globally for a wide range of temperatures with a centrifugal-barrier-based coarse-graining method. The proposed reduced-order models offer significantly improved accuracy in predicting the nonequilibrium energy transfer and dissociation dynamics compared to the existing coarse-graining and 2T models in previous studies. In addition, aerothermal heating prediction relevant to Uranus planetary entry reveals 16.5% of convective heat flux discrepancy compared to the present modified 2T approach with the existing 2T, demonstrating the importance of accurate modeling of the chemical-kinetics in the H₂łeft(X¹Σ_g⁺ⁱ̊ght)+Hłeft({}²Si̊ght) system.

37

粗糙表面低速和高速流动大涡模拟的机器学习墙模型#

Machine-learning wall model of large-eddy simulation for low- and high-speed flows over rough surfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Rong Ma, Adrian Lozano-Duran📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于首次将机器学习墙模型拓展至粗糙表面的可压缩湍流全速域（马赫数0~3.3），并通过信息论方法实现无量纲输入的自动筛选，同时引入谱归一化神经高斯过程量化模型不确定性。其意义在于为航空发
arXiv:2601.20786v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了一种用于大涡模拟的壁模型，该模型结合了表面粗糙度效应，适用于低速和高速流动、过渡条件和完全粗糙条件。该模型使用人工神经网络实现，并在粗糙壁上可压缩湍流通道流的直接数值模拟数据库上进行训练。该数据集包含 372 个案例，涵盖各种不规则粗糙度地形，包括高斯分布和威布尔分布、马赫数 0~3.3 和摩擦雷诺数 180~2000。我们采用信息论、无量纲学习方法来识别对无量纲壁摩…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20786v1 公告类型：新 摘要：我们提出了一种用于大涡模拟的壁模型，该模型结合了表面粗糙度效应，适用于低速和高速流动、过渡条件和完全粗糙条件。该模型使用人工神经网络实现，并在粗糙壁上可压缩湍流通道流的直接数值模拟数据库上进行训练。该数据集包含 372 个案例，涵盖各种不规则粗糙度地形，包括高斯分布和威布尔分布、马赫数 0~3.3 和摩擦雷诺数 180~2000。我们采用信息论、无量纲学习方法来识别对无量纲壁摩擦和壁热通量具有最高预测能力的输入。预测伴随着从谱归一化神经高斯过程得出的置信度得分，该过程量化了偏离训练数据集的区域的不确定性。首先在 110 个湍流河道流情况下对模型性能进行先验评估，得出的预测误差低于 4%。该模型在不同测试用例的壁建模大涡模拟中进行事后评估。其中包括超过 160 个具有粗糙壁的亚音速和超音速湍流通道流、具有高斯粗糙度的跨音速高压涡轮 (HPT) 叶片、具有砂纸粗糙度的高速压缩坡道以及三个具有沙粒粗糙度的高超音速钝体。结果表明，所提出的壁面模型通常可以实现壁面剪应力的后验预测精度在 10% 以内，壁面热通量的后验预测精度在 15% 以内，并且对通道流动和 HPT 叶片情况具有很高的置信度。在粗壁压缩坡道和高超声速钝体中，模型捕获了加热增强，误差范围为 0%~20%。在错误最高的情况下，性能下降可以通过置信度分数的下降来正确检测到。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20786v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a wall model for large-eddy simulation that incorporates surface-roughness effects and is applicable across low- and high-speed flows, for both transitional and fully rough conditions. The model, implemented using an artificial neural network, is trained on a direct numerical simulation database of compressible turbulent channel flows over rough walls. The dataset contains 372 cases spanning a wide range of irregular roughness topographies, including Gaussian and Weibull distributions, Mach numbers 0~3.3, and friction Reynolds numbers 180~2000. We employ an information-theoretic, dimensionless learning method to identify the inputs with the highest predictive power for the dimensionless wall friction and wall heat flux. Predictions are accompanied by a confidence score derived from a spectrally normalized neural Gaussian process, which quantifies uncertainty in regions that deviate from the training dataset. The model performance is first evaluated a-priori on 110 turbulent channel flow cases, yielding prediction errors below 4%. The model is assessed a-posteriori in wall-modeled large-eddy simulations across diverse test cases. These include over 160 subsonic and supersonic turbulent channel flows with rough walls, a transonic high-pressure turbine (HPT) blade with Gaussian roughness, a high-speed compression ramp with sandpaper roughness, and three hypersonic blunt bodies with sand-grain roughness. Results show that the proposed wall model typically achieves a-posteriori predictive accuracy within 10% for wall shear stress and within 15% for wall heat flux, with high confidence in the channel flows and HPT blade cases. In the rough-wall compression ramp and hypersonic blunt bodies, the model captures the heating augmentation with errors ranging 0%~20%. In the cases with the highest errors, the reduced performance is correctly detected by a drop in the confidence score.

38

3D 光声计算机断层扫描中基于学习的空间脉冲响应补偿框架#

A Learning-based Framework for Spatial Impulse Response Compensation in 3D Photoacoustic Computed Tomography
📚 arXiv👤 Kaiyi Yang, Seonyeong Park, Gangwon Jeong, Hsuan-Kai Huang, Alexander A. Oraevsky, Umberto Villa, Mark A. Anastasio📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出一种数据域学习框架，通过U-Net或物理启发的Deconv-Net将大面阵换能器的空间脉冲响应（SIR）畸变测量映射为理想点传感器数据，再快速解析重建。核心创新在于以学习补偿替代昂贵优化重建
arXiv:2601.20291v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：光声计算机断层扫描（PACT）是一种很有前景的成像方式，它结合了光学对比与超声检测的优点。使用具有较大表面积的超声换能器可以提高检测灵敏度。然而，当采用忽略换能器的空间脉冲响应（SIR）的计算高效的分析重建方法时，重建图像的空间分辨率将受到损害。尽管基于优化的重建方法可以明确地考虑 SIR 效应，但其计算成本通常很高，特别是在三维 (3D) 应用中。为了满足准确而快速的…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2601.20291v1 公告类型：cross 摘要：光声计算机断层扫描（PACT）是一种很有前景的成像方式，它结合了光学对比与超声检测的优点。使用具有较大表面积的超声换能器可以提高检测灵敏度。然而，当采用忽略换能器的空间脉冲响应（SIR）的计算高效的分析重建方法时，重建图像的空间分辨率将受到损害。尽管基于优化的重建方法可以明确地考虑 SIR 效应，但其计算成本通常很高，特别是在三维 (3D) 应用中。为了满足准确而快速的 3D PACT 图像重建的需求，本研究提出了一个框架，用于建立在数据域中运行的学习 SIR 补偿方法。学习的补偿方法将 SIR 损坏的 PACT 测量数据映射到理想化点状传感器记录的补偿数据。随后，补偿后的数据可以与忽略 SIR 效应的计算有效的重建方法一起使用。研究了学习补偿模型的两种变体，它们采用 U-Net 模型和专门设计的物理启发模型（称为 Deconv-Net）。快速且分析的训练数据生成过程也是所提出框架的组成部分。该框架在虚拟成像研究中经过严格验证，证明了分辨率的提高以及对噪声变化、物体复杂性和声速异质性的鲁棒性。当应用于体内乳腺成像数据时，学习到的补偿模型揭示了被 SIR 引起的伪影所掩盖的精细结构。据我们所知，这是 3D PACT 成像中学习 SIR 补偿的首次演示。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.20291v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Photoacoustic computed tomography (PACT) is a promising imaging modality that combines the advantages of optical contrast with ultrasound detection. Utilizing ultrasound transducers with larger surface areas can improve detection sensitivity. However, when computationally efficient analytic reconstruction methods that neglect the spatial impulse responses (SIRs) of the transducer are employed, the spatial resolution of the reconstructed images will be compromised. Although optimization-based reconstruction methods can explicitly account for SIR effects, their computational cost is generally high, particularly in three-dimensional (3D) applications. To address the need for accurate but rapid 3D PACT image reconstruction, this study presents a framework for establishing a learned SIR compensation method that operates in the data domain. The learned compensation method maps SIR-corrupted PACT measurement data to compensated data that would have been recorded by idealized point-like transducers. Subsequently, the compensated data can be used with a computationally efficient reconstruction method that neglects SIR effects. Two variants of the learned compensation model are investigated that employ a U-Net model and a specifically designed, physics-inspired model, referred to as Deconv-Net. A fast and analytical training data generation procedure is also a component of the presented framework. The framework is rigorously validated in virtual imaging studies, demonstrating resolution improvement and robustness to noise variations, object complexity, and sound speed heterogeneity. When applied to in-vivo breast imaging data, the learned compensation models revealed fine structures that had been obscured by SIR-induced artifacts. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of learned SIR compensation in 3D PACT imaging.

39

用于预测介电纳米复合材料断裂的混合机电相场和深度学习框架#

A hybrid electromechanical phase-field and deep learning framework for predicting fracture in dielectric nanocomposites
📚 arXiv👤 Aamir Dean, Jaykumar Mavani, Betim Bahtiri, Behrouz Arash, Raimund Rolfes📅 2026-01-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将机电相场断裂模型与ResNet-U-Net深度学习替代模型相结合，突破了传统有限元模拟介电纳米复合材料裂纹扩展时计算成本高昂的瓶颈。核心发现是：利用更平滑、全局覆盖的电势场数据训练CN
arXiv:2508.07469v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确有效地预测介电材料中的裂纹扩展是结构健康监测和智能系统设计中的关键挑战。这项工作提出了一种混合建模框架，它将机电相场断裂模型与基于深度学习的替代建模相结合，以预测介电纳米复合材料板中的断裂演化。底层有限元模拟使用变分相场公式捕获机械变形和由裂纹引起的电场扰动之间的耦合。高保真模拟输出（即相场损伤变量和电势场）用于训练具有 ResNet-U-Net 架构的卷积神经网络 (C…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2508.07469v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确有效地预测介电材料中的裂纹扩展是结构健康监测和智能系统设计中的关键挑战。这项工作提出了一种混合建模框架，它将机电相场断裂模型与基于深度学习的替代建模相结合，以预测介电纳米复合材料板中的断裂演化。底层有限元模拟使用变分相场公式捕获机械变形和由裂纹引起的电场扰动之间的耦合。高保真模拟输出（即相场损伤变量和电势场）用于训练具有 ResNet-U-Net 架构的卷积神经网络 (CNN)，以对裂纹路径进行像素级分割。该研究系统地比较了在多个 ResNet 主干上接受相场数据和电势数据训练的 CNN 的性能。结果表明，电势场虽然间接编码损伤，但由于其更平滑的梯度分布和全局空间覆盖，可提供卓越的分割精度、更快的收敛速度和增强的泛化能力。所提出的框架显着降低了计算成本，同时保持了高精度，在适当适应基于传感器的输入数据时提供了潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.07469v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The accurate and efficient prediction of crack propagation in dielectric materials is a critical challenge in structural health monitoring and the design of smart systems. This work presents a hybrid modeling framework that combines an electromechanical phase-field fracture model with deep learning-based surrogate modeling to predict fracture evolution in dielectric nanocomposite plates.
